However, most prior work implicitly assumes reliable critic feedback and focuses on planning strategies, while paying limited attention to the robustness of the error-correction process itself, which can be impacted by misaligned error categories and ineffective or incorrect corrections. Here, we hypothesize that RAG performance can be improved without explicit error categorization. We propose RePAIR, a response-action learning paradigm that directly maps flawed RAG outputs to error-mitigating action plans without relying on fine-grained error taxonomies and explicit critic supervision. Across multiple benchmarks, RePAIR consistently improves agentic RAG performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RePAIR，一种无需显式错误分类和批评家监督的响应-动作学习范式，以提升检索增强生成（RAG）系统的鲁棒性与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有agentic RAG系统依赖可靠但常不稳定的批评反馈，且错误修正过程易受错误类别错配和无效/错误修正影响；作者关注提升误差修正过程本身的鲁棒性，而非仅优化规划策略。
AI.method: 提出RePAIR范式，通过直接学习将有缺陷的RAG输出映射为纠错动作计划，绕过细粒度错误分类和显式批评监督。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，RePAIR持续提升了agentic RAG的整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 无需显式错误分类和批评监督，也能有效提升RAG系统的纠错能力与事实准确性；RePAIR为构建更鲁棒的agentic RAG提供了新思路。

title: FormalASR: End-to-End Spoken Chinese to Formal Text
summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems are typically optimized for verbatim transcription, which preserves disfluencies, filler words, and informal spoken structures that are often unsuitable for downstream writing-oriented applications. A common workaround is a two-stage ASR+LLM pipeline for post-editing, but this design increases latency and memory cost and is difficult to deploy on-device. We present FormalASR, two compact end-to-end models (0.6B and 1.7B) that directly transcribe spoken Chinese into formal written text. To enable this setting, we build WenetSpeech-Formal and Speechio-Formal, two large-scale spoken-to-formal datasets constructed by LLM-based rewriting and quality filtering. We then fine-tune Qwen3-ASR at two scales (0.6B and 1.7B) with supervised fine-tuning. Experiments on WenetSpeech-Formal and Speechio-Formal show that FormalASR achieves up to 37.4% relative CER reduction over verbatim baselines, while also improving ROUGE-L and BERTScore. FormalASR requires no post-processing LLM at deployment time, providing a lightweight, on-device solution for spoken-to-formal transcription.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FormalASR，两个轻量级端到端模型（0.6B和1.7B），直接将中文语音转为正式书面语，无需部署后处理大模型，显著降低延迟与内存开销，并在CER、ROUGE-L和BERTScore上优于基线。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR系统侧重逐字转录，保留口语中不适用于写作场景的冗余成分；两阶段ASR+LLM方案存在高延迟、高内存成本及难于端侧部署的问题。
AI.method: 构建两个大规模语音到正式文本数据集WenetSpeech-Formal和Speechio-Formal（基于LLM重写+质量过滤），并在其上对Qwen3-ASR进行监督微调，得到0.6B和1.7B两个规模的FormalASR模型。
AI.result: 在两个正式化数据集上，FormalASR相较逐字ASR基线实现最高37.4%的相对CER下降，同时提升ROUGE-L和BERTScore；部署时无需额外LLM，支持轻量、端侧运行。
AI.conclusion: FormalASR验证了端到端语音到正式文本建模的可行性与高效性，为写作导向型语音应用提供了实用、低资源消耗的解决方案。

title: Aerial Inspection Behaviors via RL-based Quadrotor Control for Under-canopy Forest Environments
comment: Submitted to 2026 IEEE 22nd International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering
summary: This paper addresses the problem of using a deep Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based low-level Quadrotor controller within an autonomous Quadrotor navigation stack for aerial inspection missions in under-canopy forest environments. Specifically, the article presents an end-to-end (mapping states to RPMs) Quadrotor control policy that achieves inspection view-pose tracking (simultaneous position and yaw reference tracking), which is crucial for various target inspection behaviors and point-to-point navigation in forests. To ensure safe and reliable deployment of the end-to-end RL controller in long-range missions, this article utilizes a higher navigation guidance layer comprising of a Traveling Salesman Problem planner (TSP) and a Rapidly-exploring Random Tree Star (RRT*) planner. Over a known map of a forest and a set of user-specified inspection regions, the TSP planner finds the optimal visitation sequence. Between two target regions, collision-free paths that respect the tracking limitations of the lower end-to-end RL policy are generated by an RRT* planner. Through five target inspection scenarios, this article demonstrates that an RL-based motor-level stabilizing controller, supported by a navigation guidance layer, can be used effectively as the low-level inspection execution module for under-canopy forest inspection missions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度强化学习（RL）低层控制器与高层导航引导层（TSP+RRT*）的自主四旋翼林下巡检系统，实现了端到端的姿态与位置跟踪控制，并在多种目标巡检场景中验证了其安全性与有效性。
AI.motivation: 在林下森林等复杂、受限环境中实现安全可靠的自主巡检，需兼顾低层控制精度与高层路径规划的安全性与实时性，传统分层控制方法难以满足高动态、强约束下的视点姿态跟踪需求。
AI.method: 设计端到端的RL低层控制器（直接映射状态到电机RPM），并构建包含TSP序列规划器和RRT*路径规划器的高层导航引导层；TSP用于优化多目标区域访问顺序，RRT*生成满足RL控制器跟踪能力约束的无碰撞路径。
AI.result: 在五个林下目标巡检场景中成功验证了该混合架构的有效性：RL控制器能稳定执行视点姿态跟踪，高层规划器保障长距离任务中的安全性与可行性。
AI.conclusion: RL驱动的电机级控制器可作为林下巡检任务中可靠的低层执行模块，其性能可通过与经典几何规划器协同的分层架构得以保障，为复杂环境下的自主无人机作业提供了可行范式。

title: Knowing When Not to Predict: Self Supervised Learning and Abstention for Safer DR Screening
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is now a standard way to pretrain medical image models, but performance is still mostly judged by downstream accuracy. For safety-critical screening tasks such as diabetic retinopathy grading, this is not enough: a model must also know when its predictions are unreliable and defer uncertain cases for clinical review. In this work, we examine how the length of SSL pretraining influences calibrated confidence and confidence-based abstention. We evaluate multiple SSL checkpoints under a fixed fine-tuning protocol and assess calibrated confidence, coverage, selective accuracy, and selective macro-F1. Across datasets and data regimes, SSL pretraining improves selective prediction compared to training from scratch. Unlike prior SSL studies that primarily evaluate downstream accuracy or AUROC, we analyze how SSL pretraining duration influences confidence behavior under calibrated confidence-based abstention. However, once accuracy saturates, selective performance can still change markedly across checkpoints, and longer pretraining does not consistently improve reliability. These results underscore the importance of abstention-aware evaluation and suggest that pretraining length should be treated as an important reliability-related design choice rather than only a computational detail. Code is available at GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文研究自监督学习（SSL）预训练时长对医学图像模型置信度校准与基于置信度的拒绝预测（abstention）性能的影响，发现预训练时长虽提升下游准确率，但不总能改善模型可靠性，强调需以拒绝预测为导向评估SSL预训练策略。
AI.motivation: 在糖尿病视网膜病变等安全关键筛查任务中，仅追求下游准确率不足，模型还需具备可靠的不确定性估计能力，以便对高风险预测主动拒绝并交由临床复核。
AI.method: 在固定微调协议下，系统评估多个不同预训练时长的SSL检查点，使用校准置信度、覆盖率、选择性准确率和选择性宏F1等指标衡量其选择性预测性能。
AI.result: SSL预训练整体优于从头训练；但当准确率饱和后，不同检查点的选择性性能仍显著变化，且更长预训练并不一致提升可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 预训练时长应被视为影响模型可靠性的重要设计因素，而非仅计算开销问题；需采用以拒绝预测为中心的评估范式来指导SSL在医疗AI中的应用。

title: Learning to Hand Off: Provably Convergent Workflow Learning under Interface Constraints
summary: We study workflow learning in a setting where specialized agents hand off control through a shared artifact, each agent observes only a local function of that artifact and its own private state, and no centralized learner accesses joint trajectories -- the operating regime of multi-agent LLM pipelines that span organizational, vendor, or trust boundaries. We formalize this regime as an interface-constrained semi-Markov decision process (IC-SMDP), whose decision epochs occur at handoff times, and design IC-$Q$, an asynchronous decentralized $Q$-learning algorithm in which cross-agent coordination at every handoff is exactly one scalar. Our main result is a finite-sample bound for neural IC-$Q$ that decomposes into three independently controllable error sources: neural function-approximation error, interface representation gap, and a mixing-time residual, under the random option-duration discount. Establishing this bound requires lifting the approximate information state (AIS) framework from single-agent primitive-step MDPs to multi-agent SMDPs and controlling Markovian noise under random duration, neither of which has been done in prior work. To our knowledge this is the first finite-sample guarantee for neural $Q$-learning under decentralized partial observability. Four experiments: a controlled synthetic IC-SMDP that validates the bound term-by-term, multi-LLM mathematical reasoning, multi-agent routing, and multi-agent CPU programming, show that IC-$Q$ matches a centralized oracle without any agent observing joint trajectories, with each of the three error sources scaling along its corresponding axis as the bound predicts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向多智能体工作流学习的新框架IC-SMDP及配套算法IC-Q，首次为去中心化部分可观测环境下的神经Q学习提供了有限样本理论保证，并在多个多LLM任务上验证了理论预测。
AI.motivation: 解决多智能体大语言模型（LLM）流水线中因组织、供应商或信任边界导致无法集中观测联合轨迹的去中心化学习问题，现有方法缺乏理论保障。
AI.method: 形式化定义接口约束型半马尔可夫决策过程（IC-SMDP），提出异步去中心化Q学习算法IC-Q，仅需每次交接传递一个标量；将近似信息状态（AIS）框架扩展至多智能体SMDP，并处理随机持续时间下的马尔可夫噪声。
AI.result: 给出了神经IC-Q的有限样本误差界，分解为神经逼近误差、接口表征差距和混合时间残差三部分；在合成IC-SMDP、多LLM数学推理、多智能体路由与CPU编程四个实验中验证了理论预测的误差分量可独立调控且算法性能媲美中心化Oracle。
AI.conclusion: IC-Q是首个具备有限样本理论保证的去中心化部分可观测神经Q学习方法，为跨边界的多LLM系统提供了可证明可靠的协同学习基础。

title: M3DocDep: Multi-modal, Multi-page, Multi-document Dependency Chunking with Large Vision-Language Models
summary: In long, multi-page industrial documents, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) depends heavily on whether chunk boundaries follow the document's true structure. Existing text-centric chunkers and generative hierarchy parsers often miss cross-page parent-child relations, figure/table-caption bindings, and boundary cues, which leads to fragmented or redundant chunks and degrades both retrieval and answer quality. We propose M3DocDep, an LVLM-based pipeline that first recovers block-level dependencies and then constructs chunks along the recovered document tree. The pipeline uses SharedDet as a common DP+OCR preprocessing layer, extracts multimodal block embeddings with boundary-aware SoftROI pooling, scores candidate parent-child edges with a biaffine head, decodes a globally valid dependency tree with MST constraints, and builds tree-guided chunks annotated with section paths and page ranges. Under a shared-block evaluation protocol, M3DocDep improves STEDS by +28.5 to +39.6 percent on DHP benchmarks, retrieval nDCG by +1.1 to +15.3 percent, and QA ANLS by +4.5 to +15.3 percent on corpus-level RAG benchmarks. These results show that recovering document dependencies before chunking yields more coherent retrieval units for long, multi-page multimodal documents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出M3DocDep，一种基于LVLM的文档依赖恢复与树形分块方法，通过多模态块嵌入、双仿射边评分和最小生成树解码，显著提升长文档RAG中的结构感知分块效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本的分块器和生成式层次解析器难以捕捉跨页父子关系、图表-标题绑定及边界线索，导致分块碎片化或冗余，损害检索与问答质量。
AI.method: M3DocDep采用SharedDet作为DP+OCR预处理层，利用边界感知SoftROI池化提取多模态块嵌入，通过双仿射头评分候选父子边，并在最小生成树约束下解码全局有效依赖树，最终构建带章节路径与页码范围的树导向分块。
AI.result: 在DHP基准上STEDS提升28.5–39.6%，检索nDCG提升1.1–15.3%，QA ANLS提升4.5–15.3%。
AI.conclusion: 在分块前恢复文档依赖关系，能生成更连贯的检索单元，显著提升长多页多模态文档的RAG性能。

title: DECOR: Auditing LLM Deception via Information Manipulation Theory
summary: Large language models can deceive by subtly manipulating truthful information -- omitting key facts, shifting focus, or obscuring meaning -- making such behavior difficult to detect. Existing black-box methods rely on coarse-grained judgments, offering limited interpretability and failing to pinpoint which facts were distorted and how. We introduce DECOR, a multi-agent framework grounded in Information Manipulation Theory for fine-grained auditing of strategic deception in LLM responses. DECOR decomposes input contexts into atomic informational units and scores each unit against the response across four dimensions of manipulation, producing interpretable manipulation profiles that are aggregated into a global deception index. We comprehensively evaluate DECOR on both single-turn and multi-turn deception detection benchmarks spanning real-world domains, and show that DECOR achieves state-of-the-art performance on both, outperforming competitive baselines. The framework generalizes across 15 frontier models, and ablation studies confirm the contribution of each key design component. Our findings demonstrate that fine-grained, theory-grounded auditing of information manipulation offers an effective and interpretable path for LLM deception detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DECOR框架，基于信息操纵理论，通过多智能体实现对大语言模型（LLM）响应中策略性欺骗行为的细粒度审计，显著提升可解释性与检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒方法难以检测LLM通过省略关键事实、转移焦点或模糊语义等细微方式实施的欺骗行为，且缺乏可解释性和定位能力。
AI.method: 提出DECOR多智能体框架，将输入上下文分解为原子信息单元，并从四个操纵维度对每个单元与响应进行打分，生成可解释的操纵画像并聚合为全局欺骗指数。
AI.result: 在单轮与多轮欺骗检测基准上均达到SOTA；泛化至15个前沿模型；消融实验验证各核心组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于理论驱动的细粒度信息操纵审计是提升LLM欺骗检测效果与可解释性的有效路径。

title: CLUE: Adaptively Prioritized Contextual Cues by Leveraging a Unified Semantic Map for Effective Zero-Shot Object-Goal Navigation
summary: Zero-shot object-goal navigation (ZSON) is a challenging problem in robotics that requires a comprehensive understanding of both language and visual observations. Contextual cues from rooms and objects are critical, but their relative importance depends on the target: some objects are strongly tied to specific room types, while others are better predicted by nearby co-located objects. Existing methods overlook this distinction, leading to inefficient and inaccurate exploration. We present CLUE, a novel navigation framework that adaptively balances the use of contextual rooms and objects by leveraging commonsense knowledge extracted from an offline large language model (LLM). By estimating a target's association with room types using LLM, the agent prioritizes room cues for predictable objects and object cues for those with weak room associations. Our framework constructs a unified semantic value map that integrates both types of contextual information, adaptively weighted by the target's ambiguity to guide exploration. Combined with multi-viewpoint verification and an exploration strategy informed by contextual cues, CLUE achieves robust and efficient navigation. Extensive experiments in simulation and real-world deployments show that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both success rate (SR) and success weighted by path length (SPL), demonstrating its effectiveness and practicality for real-world navigation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLUE框架，通过利用大语言模型提取的常识知识，自适应地平衡房间和物体上下文线索，以提升零样本目标导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了目标物体与房间或共现物体之间关联性的差异，导致探索效率低且不准确。
AI.method: CLUE框架利用离线大语言模型估计目标物体与房间类型的关联性，据此自适应地加权房间和物体上下文线索，构建统一语义价值地图，并结合多视角验证与上下文引导的探索策略。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界部署实验中，CLUE在成功率（SR）和路径长度加权成功率（SPL）上均持续超越当前最优基线。
AI.conclusion: CLUE通过常识驱动的自适应上下文融合，显著提升了零样本目标导航的鲁棒性与实用性。

title: Towards Data-Efficient Video Pre-training with Frozen Image Foundation Models
summary: Video foundation models achieve strong performance across many video understanding tasks, but typically require large-scale pre-training on massive video datasets, resulting in substantial data and compute costs. In contrast, modern image foundation models already provide powerful spatial representations. This raises an important question: can competitive video models be built by reusing these spatial representations and pre-training only for temporal reasoning? We take initial steps toward exploring a lightweight training paradigm that freezes a pre-trained image foundation model and trains only a recurrent temporal module to process streaming video. By reusing an image foundation model as a spatial encoder, this approach could significantly reduce the amount of video data and compute required compared to end-to-end video pre-training. In this work, we explore the feasibility of this approach before investing in computing for video pre-training. Our empirical findings across multiple video understanding tasks suggest that strong temporal performance can emerge without large-scale video pre-training, motivating future work on recurrent video foundation models obtained by pre-training a temporal module on top of a frozen image foundation model. Code: https://github.com/tue-mps/towards-video-image-frozen .

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了一种轻量级视频模型训练范式：冻结预训练图像基础模型，仅训练一个循环时序模块来处理视频流，从而减少对大规模视频数据和计算资源的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有视频基础模型需要大规模视频数据预训练，导致高昂的数据和计算成本；而现代图像基础模型已具备强大的空间表征能力，因此探索能否仅通过增强时序推理能力来构建有竞争力的视频模型。
AI.method: 冻结预训练图像基础模型作为空间编码器，仅训练一个循环（recurrent）时序模块来建模视频中的时间动态。
AI.result: 在多个视频理解任务上的实验表明，无需大规模视频预训练即可获得较强的时序建模性能。
AI.conclusion: 该轻量级范式可行且具有潜力，为未来基于冻结图像模型+预训练时序模块的视频基础模型研究提供了依据。

title: Progressive Autonomy as Preference Learning: A Formalization of Trust Calibration for Agentic Tool Use
summary: We formalize trust calibration for agentic tool use (deciding when an automated agent's proposed action may execute autonomously versus require human approval) as a preference-learning problem. A policy gateway maintains a Gaussian-process posterior over a latent human risk-tolerance function, observed through a probit likelihood on binary approve/deny feedback, and escalates to the human exactly where the approval outcome is most uncertain. We show this is structurally an instance of Preferential Bayesian Optimization, inheriting its inference machinery (approximate Gaussian-process classification) and its sample-efficiency argument (uncertainty-targeted querying), while differing in objective: classifying an action space into allow/block/ask regions rather than optimizing a design.

AI.tldr: 本文将代理工具使用的信任校准形式化为偏好学习问题，通过高斯过程建模人类风险容忍度，并基于不确定性主动请求人工审批。
AI.motivation: 解决自动化代理在工具使用中如何合理决定何时自主执行、何时需人工审批的信任校准问题。
AI.method: 构建策略网关，利用高斯过程后验建模潜在的人类风险容忍函数，通过probit似然函数处理二元批准/拒绝反馈，并在批准结果最不确定处主动交由人类决策。
AI.result: 证明该方法本质上是偏好贝叶斯优化（Preferential Bayesian Optimization）的一种结构实例，继承其推理机制与样本高效性优势，但目标不同：划分允许/阻止/询问三类动作区域，而非设计优化。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为代理信任校准提供了理论严谨、数据高效的主动学习方案，兼顾安全性与自动化程度。

title: Query-Aware Flow Diffusion for Graph-Based RAG with Retrieval Guarantees
comment: Published at the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2026. 38 pages, 5 figures, 10 tables
summary: Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems leverage interconnected knowledge structures to capture complex relationships that flat retrieval struggles with, enabling multi-hop reasoning. Yet most existing graph-based methods suffer from (i) heuristic designs lacking theoretical guarantees for subgraph quality or relevance and/or (ii) the use of static exploration strategies that ignore the query's holistic meaning, retrieving neighborhoods or communities regardless of intent. We propose Query-Aware Flow Diffusion RAG (QAFD-RAG), a training-free framework that dynamically adapts graph traversal to each query's holistic semantics. The central innovation is query-aware traversal: during graph exploration, edges are dynamically weighted by how well their endpoints align with the query's embedding, guiding flow along semantically relevant paths while avoiding structurally connected but irrelevant regions. These query-specific reasoning subgraphs enable the first statistical guarantees for query-aware graph retrieval, showing that QAFD-RAG recovers relevant subgraphs with high probability under mild signal-to-noise conditions. The algorithm converges exponentially fast, with complexity scaling with the retrieved subgraph size rather than the full graph. Experiments on question answering and text-to-SQL tasks demonstrate consistent improvements over state-of-the-art graph-based RAG methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的图检索增强生成（RAG）框架QAFD-RAG，通过查询感知的动态边加权遍历，在知识图上实现语义驱动的子图检索，并首次为查询感知图检索提供了统计保证。
AI.motivation: 现有图RAG方法存在启发式设计缺乏理论保障、静态探索策略忽略查询整体语义等问题。
AI.method: 提出Query-Aware Flow Diffusion RAG（QAFD-RAG），核心是查询感知遍历：在图探索中根据端点与查询嵌入的对齐程度动态加权边，引导信息流沿语义相关路径传播；提供统计保证与指数收敛性分析。
AI.result: 在问答和文本到SQL任务上显著优于当前图RAG最先进方法；算法复杂度仅随检索子图大小增长，而非全图规模。
AI.conclusion: QAFD-RAG实现了高效、可解释、有理论保障的查询驱动图检索，推动了RAG从扁平检索向语义化多跳推理演进。

title: Lost in Interpretation: The Plausibility-Faithfulness Trade-off in Cross-Lingual Explanations
summary: LLMs deployed multilingually are often audited via English explanations for non-English inputs. We evaluate extractive explanations ''where the model identifies input token spans as evidence alongside a generated rationale'' and uncover a systematic trade-off: English-pivot explanations can achieve higher span agreement with human rationales while their evidence becomes less causally grounded in the model's prediction, as measured by both comprehensiveness and sufficiency. Across 3 tasks, 5~languages, and 2~multilingual LLM families, we find that English explanations frequently produce fluent but loosely anchored rationales, with comprehensiveness degrading by up to 5.7x relative to native-language conditions - even as task accuracy remains stable across settings. For socially nuanced classification, English pivots also fail to preserve pragmatic cues, reducing both faithfulness and span agreement. We recommend auditing explanations in the input language, reporting multi-faceted faithfulness metrics beyond lexical overlap, and treating English rationales as communication summaries rather than faithful decision traces.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多语言大模型在使用英语解释非英语输入时的解释质量，发现英语解释虽然在词元重叠上表现更好，但在因果基础、全面性和充分性方面表现较差，建议在输入语言中进行解释审计，并采用多维度的忠实度指标。
AI.motivation: 多语言部署的大型语言模型（LLMs）常通过英语解释来审计非英语输入，但这种做法可能影响解释的因果基础和忠实度，因此需要系统评估其影响。
AI.method: 作者评估了抽取式解释（模型识别输入词元片段作为证据并生成理由），在3个任务、5种语言和2个多元语言LLM家族上进行实验，测量了与人类理由的词元一致性、全面性、充分性及任务准确性。
AI.result: 英语解释在词元一致性上更高，但其证据在因果基础上更弱，全面性下降高达5.7倍；任务准确率保持稳定；在社会语义分类任务中，英语解释未能保留语用线索，降低了忠实度和词元一致性。
AI.conclusion: 应使用输入语言进行解释审计，报告多维度忠实度指标，并将英语理由视为沟通摘要而非忠实决策轨迹。

title: Efficient coding along the visual hierarchy
summary: Biological visual systems learn from limited experience, unlike deep learning models that rely on millions of training images. What learning principles make this possible? We tested whether efficient coding, the idea that neural representations capture the statistical structure of natural inputs, can build a hierarchy of human-aligned visual features from limited data. We developed an unsupervised learning procedure in which each layer of a deep network compresses its inputs onto the dominant modes of variation in natural images, using only local statistics and no labels, tasks, or backpropagation. This unsupervised procedure yields features that progress from edges and colors to textures and shapes. The features of this deep efficient coding model are readily recognized by human observers and are predictive of image-evoked fMRI responses in human visual cortex. Furthermore, a hybrid learning procedure that combines efficient coding with supervised fine-tuning yields better brain alignment in low-data settings and more rapid category learning. These findings suggest that efficient coding may shape representations across the entire visual hierarchy and help explain the data efficiency of biological vision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标签、任务或反向传播的无监督高效编码学习方法，通过逐层压缩自然图像的主导变化模式，从少量数据中构建出与人类视觉特征对齐的层次化表征，并在fMRI响应预测和小样本分类上表现出色。
AI.motivation: 探究生物视觉系统为何能从有限经验中高效学习，而深度学习模型却需海量标注数据；检验高效编码理论是否能在少量数据下生成与人类视觉对齐的层次化特征。
AI.method: 设计一种无监督深度网络学习流程：每层仅利用局部统计信息压缩输入，捕捉自然图像中的主导变化模式，不使用标签、任务或反向传播。
AI.result: 所学特征从边缘/颜色逐步过渡到纹理/形状，可被人眼识别，且能预测人脑fMRI视觉皮层响应；结合高效编码与监督微调的混合方法，在低数据场景下提升脑响应对齐度与类别学习速度。
AI.conclusion: 高效编码可能是塑造全层级视觉表征的关键原理，有助于解释生物视觉的数据高效性。

title: Mask-to-Correct$^+$: Leveraging Retriever Diversity for Masking-guided Faithful Fact Correction
summary: The rapid spread of misinformation on social media highlights the need for robust, automated fact correction frameworks. However, existing works rely on supervised learning from manually annotated claim-evidence pairs, which are scarce and prone to biases, limiting their generalization across domains. Moreover, these methods overlook semantic faithfulness in their correction process. To address these challenges, we propose Mask-to-Correct (M$_2$C), a training-free, inference-only Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) based framework that leverages diversity-aware masking to identify erroneous spans of claims and evaluate the faithfulness of corrections using retrieved evidence. However, the effectiveness of RAG heavily depends on the choice of retriever, which may vary across queries. To mitigate this, we further introduce M$_2$C$^+$, an ensemble-based framework that combines corrections across multiple rankers to reduce retrieval bias and improve robustness. Extensive experiments on the benchmark datasets demonstrate that our proposed frameworks consistently outperform all baselines, achieving up to 14% improvement in SARI scores, without using gold evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练、基于检索增强生成（RAG）的自动事实纠正框架Mask-to-Correct（M₂C），通过多样性感知掩码识别错误语句片段，并利用多检索器集成方法M₂C⁺提升鲁棒性，在不依赖人工标注证据的情况下显著提升修正质量。
AI.motivation: 现有事实纠正方法依赖稀缺且有偏的人工标注数据，泛化能力差，且忽视修正结果的语义忠实性。
AI.method: 提出无训练的RAG框架M₂C，结合多样性感知掩码定位错误片段并用检索证据评估修正忠实性；进一步设计M₂C⁺，通过多检索器集成缓解单检索器偏差。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上显著优于所有基线方法，SARI指标最高提升14%，且无需使用真实证据（gold evidence）。
AI.conclusion: M₂C及其扩展M₂C⁺为低资源、高鲁棒的事实纠正提供了有效新范式，凸显了检索多样性与忠实性评估在无监督事实修正中的关键作用。

title: OpenCompass: A Universal Evaluation Platform for Large Language Models
summary: In recent years, the field of artificial intelligence has undergone a paradigm shift from task-specific small-scale models to general-purpose large language models (LLMs). With the rapid iteration of LLMs, objective, quantitative, and comprehensive evaluation of their capabilities has become a critical link in advancing technological development. Currently, the mainstream static benchmark dataset-based evaluation methods face challenges such as the diversity of task types, inconsistent evaluation criteria, and fragmentation of data and processing workflows, making it difficult to efficiently conduct cross-domain and large-scale model evaluation. To address the aforementioned issues, this paper proposes and open-sources OpenCompass, a one-stop, scalable, and high-concurrency-supported general-purpose LLM evaluation platform. Adhering to the design philosophy of modularization and component decoupling, the platform boasts three core advantages: high compatibility, flexibility, and high concurrency. The core architecture of OpenCompass comprises five key components: the Configuration System, Task Partitioning Module, Execution and Scheduling Module, Task Execution Unit, and Result Visualization Module. Its workflow provides rule-based, LLM-as-a-Judge, and cascaded evaluators to adapt to the requirements of different task scenarios. Supporting mainstream benchmark datasets across multiple domains, including knowledge, reasoning, computation, science, language, code, etc., the platform offers a unified and efficient LLM evaluation tool for both academia and industry, facilitating the accurate identification of strengths and weaknesses of LLMs as well as their subsequent optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并开源了OpenCompass，一个一站式、可扩展、高并发的通用大语言模型（LLM）评测平台，旨在解决当前静态基准数据集评测方法在任务多样性、评价标准不一致和流程碎片化等方面的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有静态基准数据集评测方法面临任务类型多样、评价标准不统一、数据与处理流程碎片化等问题，难以高效开展跨领域、大规模模型评测。
AI.method: 提出模块化、组件解耦设计的OpenCompass评测平台，包含配置系统、任务划分模块、执行调度模块、任务执行单元和结果可视化模块；支持规则驱动、LLM-as-a-Judge及级联评测器等多种评测方式。
AI.result: OpenCompass支持多领域主流基准数据集（知识、推理、计算、科学、语言、代码等），具备高兼容性、灵活性和高并发能力，为学术界与工业界提供统一高效的LLM评测工具。
AI.conclusion: OpenCompass有效提升了LLM评测的客观性、定量性与全面性，有助于精准识别模型优劣并推动其后续优化。

title: Bilateral Teleoperation with Compliant 6-DOF Pose-and-Force Sensing
summary: Existing bilateral teleoperation platforms still rely on costly rigid six-axis force/torque sensors, tightly coupled leader-follower hardware, and kilohertz control loops. We present a Cartesian bilateral framework built on the hardware-agnostic WinGs Operating Studio (WOS) middleware, in which a low-cost compliant 6-DOF pose-and-force sensing end-effector, Delta6, is mounted on both sides so that each manipulator behaves as an end-effector 6-DOF series elastic actuator (SEA). The leader runs a damping-only admittance loop with a 6-D biquad notch filter; the follower realizes a stiffness-damping impedance through a position-based outer loop with a PID wrench-to-pose mapping. Three time scales (hardware I/O, mid-rate impedance/admittance, low-rate teleoperation messages) are explicitly decoupled, enabling the same application to drive heterogeneous arms. On a Lite6/FR3 testbed at 150 Hz, the system tracks stably under delays up to $120\pm40$ ms and 1% packet loss, matches the prescribed virtual stiffness in contact, and shows a favorable cumulative energy signature in passivity-style tests.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于低成本Delta6力/位姿传感器和WinGs操作系统（WOS）的硬件无关笛卡尔双边遥操作框架，通过解耦多时间尺度控制，实现了异构机械臂间的稳定、被动兼容遥操作。
AI.motivation: 现有双边遥操作平台依赖昂贵的刚性六轴力/力矩传感器、紧耦合的主从硬件架构及千赫兹控制环，限制了灵活性与成本效益。
AI.method: 构建基于WOS中间件的笛卡尔双边框架；采用低成本Delta6 6-DOF柔顺传感末端执行器作为主/从端；主端采用仅阻尼的导纳控制加6-D双二阶陷波滤波器；从端采用基于位置的外环实现刚度-阻尼阻抗，通过PID将力矩映射为位姿；显式解耦硬件I/O、中速率阻抗/导纳、低速率遥操作消息三个时间尺度。
AI.result: 在Lite6/FR3测试平台上以150 Hz运行，系统在120±40 ms时延与1%丢包率下稳定跟踪；接触时准确复现设定虚拟刚度；被动性类测试中呈现良好累积能量特性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提升了遥操作系统的硬件兼容性、鲁棒性与经济性，为异构机器人协同遥操作提供了可扩展、被动保障的新范式。

title: Quantized Machine Learning Models for Medical Imaging in Low-Resource Healthcare Settings
summary:
Deep learning models have shown strong performance in medical image analysis, but deploying them in low-resource clinical environments remains difficult due to computational, memory, and power constraints. This paper presents a multi-strategy compression framework for brain tumor classification from MRI, encompassing quantization-aware training, knowledge distillation from a DenseNet-101 teacher to a compact DenseNet-32 student with low-bit post-training quantization, and Float16 post-training quantization on a lightweight MobileNetV2 backbone.
  Using a multi-class brain tumor MRI dataset containing glioma, meningioma, pituitary tumors, and healthy controls, we provide full experimental validation of the MobileNetV2-based pipeline, training the classifier through a three-stage transfer learning process and applying Float16 quantization via TensorFlow Lite. The DenseNet-based distillation and quantization-aware training strategies are described as complementary compression approaches within the framework, with their complete empirical evaluation reserved for future work.
  Experimental results on the MobileNetV2 pipeline show that the quantized model achieves 82.37 percent validation accuracy compared to the 82.20 percent full-precision baseline, reducing model size from 35.34 MB to 5.76 MB, a 6.14x compression ratio with no meaningful accuracy loss. Per-class evaluation confirms that quantization preserves diagnostic performance uniformly across all four tumor categories. These findings demonstrate that lightweight quantized models can deliver clinically viable brain tumor screening in resource-constrained healthcare settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多策略压缩框架，用于在资源受限的临床环境中实现基于MRI的脑肿瘤分类，结合量化感知训练、知识蒸馏与低比特后训练量化，在MobileNetV2上实现Float16量化，模型大小压缩6.14倍且精度无损。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医学图像分析中表现优异，但在计算、内存和功耗受限的基层临床环境中部署困难。
AI.method: 提出多策略压缩框架：包括量化感知训练、DenseNet-101→DenseNet-32的知识蒸馏、MobileNetV2上的Float16后训练量化；使用三阶段迁移学习训练，并通过TensorFlow Lite实现量化。
AI.result: MobileNetV2量化模型验证准确率达82.37%（基线82.20%），模型体积从35.34 MB降至5.76 MB（压缩比6.14×），各类别诊断性能保持均匀稳定。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级量化模型可在资源受限医疗场景中提供临床可行的脑肿瘤筛查能力。

title: Discoverable Agent Knowledge -- A Formal Framework for Agentic KG Affordances (Extended Version)
summary: Two decades ago, the Semantic Web Services community was asked how agents with different ontological commitments could discover, compose, and invoke web services coherently. The response was OWL-S and WSMO: formally grounded capability descriptions specifying what a service could do, what the agent must already know for invocation to be epistemically sound, and how ontological mismatches could be formally bridged. Current Knowledge Graph (KG) metadata standards such as VoID and DCAT describe what a KG contains yet say nothing about what a specific agent can prove from it, what closure assumptions govern empty results, or whether the agent's task vocabulary is grounded in the schema. Furthermore, in deployed KGs the governing schema DL and the operative entailment regime can diverge: an epistemic failure mode invisible to current metadata. We revisit and extend these insights for the KG setting with a four-dimensional formal framework from which we derive the Agentic Affordance Profile (AAP): a semantic layer above VoID and DCAT enabling principled KG selection, composition, and failure diagnosis at agent planning time. A five-point research agenda identifies the formal, computational, and engineering work needed to realise AAP-based affordance matching at scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic Affordance Profile（AAP）框架，扩展语义网服务思想以解决知识图谱（KG）中智能体对KG语义能力的可证明性、闭包假设及词汇对齐等问题，支持KG的选择、组合与故障诊断。
AI.motivation: 当前KG元数据标准（如VoID、DCAT）无法刻画智能体能从KG中证明什么、空结果的闭包假设、任务词汇是否在模式中被锚定；且实际部署中模式描述逻辑（DL）与实际推理机制常不一致，导致隐性认知失效。
AI.method: 借鉴OWL-S和WSMO的思想，构建一个四维形式化框架，并从中导出Agentic Affordance Profile（AAP），作为VoID/DCAT之上的语义增强层；同时提出五点研究议程。
AI.result: 提出了AAP这一新型KG元数据语义层，支持智能体在规划阶段进行KG选择、组合与失效诊断；明确了实现大规模AAP驱动的适配所需的形式化、计算与工程路径。
AI.conclusion: 将语义网服务中的认知建模思想成功迁移并拓展至KG场景，AAP为KG赋予了面向智能体的可证明能力描述，是迈向真正可互操作、可推理KG生态的关键一步。

title: A Reproducibility Analysis of PO4ISR: Diagnosing and Mitigating Semantic Drift in LLM-Based Session Recommendation
summary: Reasoning-based Large Language Models (LLMs) like PO4ISR have set new benchmarks in session-based recommendation. However, the reproducibility of their reasoning capabilities across diverse semantic domains remains unexplored. In this work, we conduct a rigorous reproducibility study of PO4ISR to assess its generalization limits. Our analysis reveals a critical failure mode: standard reasoning prompts suffer from severe contextual drift in long sessions, leading to performance degradation on semantically complex datasets like Games and Bundle. To quantify and resolve this stability gap, we introduce PO4ISR++, a robustness-enhanced implementation that integrates reflexive prompting and consistent rank detection. Unlike the original static prompting strategy, our approach dynamically adapts to cross-domain cues. We benchmark both the original implementation and our robust variant on ML-1M, Games, and Bundle. Our results confirm that while the original model struggles in new domains, our reproducible extension restores performance, yielding a stabilized gain of up to 54% on Games and 96% on Bundle. We release open-source artifacts, including the reproduced baseline and our enhanced framework, to facilitate reliable future research in LLM-based recommendation.

AI.tldr: 本文对PO4ISR模型在会话推荐中的可复现性进行了系统研究，发现其在长会话和语义复杂数据集（如Games、Bundle）上存在上下文漂移问题；为此提出PO4ISR++，通过反射式提示和一致排序检测提升跨域鲁棒性，并在多个数据集上验证了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: PO4ISR等基于推理的LLM在会话推荐中表现优异，但其推理能力在不同语义域间的可复现性尚未被探索，尤其在长会话和复杂语义场景下稳定性存疑。
AI.method: 开展PO4ISR的可复现性研究，识别其上下文漂移问题；提出PO4ISR++，融合反射式提示（reflexive prompting）与一致排序检测（consistent rank detection），实现对跨域线索的动态适应。
AI.result: 在Games和Bundle数据集上，PO4ISR++相较原模型分别提升54%和96%；在ML-1M上也验证了稳定性增强效果；开源全部代码与基准实现。
AI.conclusion: PO4ISR的原始推理策略缺乏跨域鲁棒性，而PO4ISR++通过动态提示机制有效缓解上下文漂移，显著提升模型在语义复杂长会话场景下的泛化与可复现性，为LLM推荐研究提供可靠新范式。

title: Language models struggle with compartmentalization
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, plus 9 pages of appendices. Submitted to NeurIPS 2026. Code: https://github.com/vinhowe/compartmentalization. Eval data: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20171021
summary: In the training data used by large language models (LLMs), the same latent concept is often presented in multiple distinct ways: the same facts appear in English and Swahili; many functions can be expressed in both Python and Haskell; we can express propositions in both formal and natural language. We show that LLMs can exhibit compartmentalization, where they fail to identify and share statistical strength between distinct presentations of unified concepts. In the worst case, LLMs simply learn parallel internal representations of each presentation of the concept, saturating model capacity with redundancies and decreasing sample efficiency with the number of such presentations. We also demonstrate that synthetic parallel data can fail to improve this despite being easily learned itself. Under this framework, we find that, for small models, early multilingual learning is nearly entirely compartmentalized. Finally, all interventions that we study exhibit a phase transition in which their effectiveness depends on the number of distinct presentations, suggesting that the language modeling objective may only inconsistently unify representations.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了大语言模型（LLMs）在处理同一潜在概念的多种不同表达形式（如多语种、多编程语言、形式/自然语言）时存在“隔离化”（compartmentalization）现象，即模型无法有效共享不同表达间的统计强度，导致冗余表征、容量浪费和样本效率下降；合成平行数据未必缓解该问题；小模型早期多语学习几乎完全隔离；多种干预措施均表现出依赖呈现方式数量的相变效应，表明语言建模目标本身难以稳定统一表征。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型训练数据中同一概念常以多种方式（如不同语言、编程语言、形式/自然语言）反复出现，但模型是否能自动识别并统一这些不同表达背后的共同概念尚不明确。本文旨在探究这种‘概念统一性’是否自然涌现，以及其失败带来的建模后果。
AI.method: 通过设计可控实验（如多语种、多语言编程任务）分析模型内部表征，量化不同表达形式间的信息共享程度；引入合成平行数据作为干预；系统评估不同规模模型及多种训练策略下‘隔离化’的程度与变化规律（如相变行为）。
AI.result: 发现LLMs普遍存在概念隔离现象，尤其在小模型早期多语学习中几乎完全隔离；模型易为同一概念建立多个冗余内部表征，降低样本效率；合成平行数据虽易学，却未必促进跨表达泛化；所有干预均呈现临界点式的相变：仅当呈现方式数量低于阈值时才有效。
AI.conclusion: 语言建模目标本身不足以稳健地统一同一概念的不同表达；隔离化是模型表征学习中的根本性挑战，影响模型容量利用与泛化能力；未来需设计能显式鼓励跨模态/跨语言概念对齐的建模范式或目标函数。

title: PRISM-SLAM: Probabilistic Ray-Grounded Inference for Scale-aware Metric SLAM
summary: Monocular SLAM historically suffers from scale ambiguity and tracking failure in dynamic environments. While recent vision foundation models (VFMs) provide remarkable zero-shot depth priors, naively integrating these deterministic predictions ignores predictive uncertainty and frame-to-frame scale inconsistencies. We propose PRISM-SLAM, a real-time framework that rigorously integrates VFM priors into a structured Bayesian factor graph to achieve scale-aware, metric-consistent localization and mapping. Specifically, we introduce a Plücker Ray-Distance Factor to anchor monocular observations in absolute space within a globally consistent metric coordinate system, mathematically resolving scale drift by making the metric scale Fisher-identifiable. To handle environmental dynamics, we derive an epistemic uncertainty proxy from temporal depth consistency and formulate a Dynamic Scene Uncertainty Gating (DSUG) mechanism. This soft-gating approach probabilistically down-weights dynamic distractors without incurring the heavy computational overhead associated with traditional semantic segmentation masks. By employing a multi-process architecture that asynchronously processes VFM inference and geometric tracking, PRISM-SLAM provides verified metric output at 30 FPS using solely RGB input, bridging the gap between foundation models and real-world robotic applications. Evaluated on the TUM RGB-D and 7-Scenes benchmarks, PRISM-SLAM achieves a metric $SE(3)$ Absolute Trajectory Error (ATE) nearly identical to its oracle-aligned $Sim(3)$ error. This demonstrates that our system can produce deployment-ready metric trajectories by delivering robust metric SLAM solutions without any post-hoc scale correction. Project page: https://prismslam-cmd.github.io/prismslam_pr/

AI.tldr: PRISM-SLAM 是一种实时单目SLAM框架，通过将视觉基础模型（VFM）的深度先验以贝叶斯因子图方式结构化融合，解决了尺度模糊与动态场景下的跟踪失败问题；引入Plücker射线-距离因子实现尺度可识别性，并设计动态场景不确定性门控（DSUG）机制软抑制动态干扰，在仅用RGB输入下达到30 FPS且输出真实度量轨迹。
AI.motivation: 单目SLAM长期存在尺度不确定性及在动态环境中的跟踪失败问题；现有VFM虽提供零样本深度先验，但其确定性预测忽略不确定性估计和帧间尺度不一致。
AI.method: 提出PRISM-SLAM框架：1）构建基于贝叶斯因子图的结构化融合框架；2）引入Plücker Ray-Distance Factor，使尺度在统计上Fisher可识别，消除尺度漂移；3）基于时间深度一致性推导认知不确定性代理，设计Dynamic Scene Uncertainty Gating（DSUG）机制软抑制动态区域；4）采用多进程异步架构分离VFM推理与几何跟踪。
AI.result: 在TUM RGB-D和7-Scenes基准上，PRISM-SLAM的度量SE(3)绝对轨迹误差（ATE）几乎与其oracle对齐的Sim(3)误差一致，表明无需后处理尺度校正即可输出部署级度量轨迹；系统仅用RGB输入，实现实时30 FPS运行。
AI.conclusion: PRISM-SLAM成功桥接了视觉基础模型与真实机器人应用之间的鸿沟，首次实现了在动态环境中鲁棒、实时、端到端的度量单目SLAM，无需任何后处理或额外传感器。

title: D-Convexity: A Unified Differentiable Convex Shape Prior via Quasi-Concavity for Data-driven Image Segmentation
summary: Convexity is a fundamental geometric prior that underlies many natural and man-made structures, yet remains challenging to impose effectively in end-to-end trainable segmentation networks. We revisit convexity from a functional perspective and propose a unified, threshold-free convexity prior based on the quasi-concavity of the network's output mask function u. Instead of constraining a single binary segmentation, we require all super-level sets of u to be convex, transforming global shape constraints into local, differentiable inequalities on u and its derivatives. From this principle, we derive zero, first, and second-order characterizations, yielding respectively a local midpoint convexification algorithm, a gradient-based condition linked to supporting hyperplanes, and a sufficient second-order inequality expressed as a quadratic form on the tangent plane. The first and second-order formulations produce a compact convolutional loss that can be densely applied across the image without thresholding. Our quasi-concavity losses integrate seamlessly with modern segmentation networks via the proposed convex gradient projection module (CGPM). They consistently enforce convexity and improve shape regularity across multiple datasets, outperforming networks tailored for retinal segmentation and surpassing previous shape-aware methods. Remarkably, our analysis unifies a wide spectrum of previous convex shape models, from discrete 1-0-1 line constraints and graph-cuts convexity formulations to curvature or signed distance Laplacian based level-set priors, within a single continuous and differentiable framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拟凹性（quasi-concavity）的、无需阈值的统一凸性先验，将全局形状约束转化为关于分割输出函数u及其导数的局部可微不等式，并推导出零阶、一阶和二阶凸性表征；所提出的可微损失与现代分割网络无缝集成，显著提升形状正则性，在多个数据集上优于专用视网膜分割网络及以往形状感知方法。
AI.motivation: 凸性是自然与人工结构中重要的几何先验，但在端到端可训练的分割网络中难以有效施加。
AI.method: 从函数角度重新审视凸性，提出基于输出掩码函数u拟凹性的统一、无阈值凸性先验；要求u的所有超水平集为凸集，由此导出零阶（中点凸化）、一阶（梯度与支撑超平面关联）和二阶（切平面上的二次型不等式）表征；构建可微卷积损失，并设计凸梯度投影模块（CGPM）实现集成。
AI.result: 所提拟凹性损失在多个数据集上一致增强分割结果的凸性与形状正则性，性能超越专用视网膜分割网络及以往形状感知方法；并首次在统一连续可微框架下涵盖离散1-0-1约束、图割凸性、曲率/符号距离拉普拉斯等既有模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于拟凹性的凸性先验提供了一种通用、可微、无需阈值的形状正则化方案，能自然嵌入现代分割网络，显著提升几何一致性，并统一了多种经典凸形建模范式。

title: Hallucination as Exploit: Evidence-Carrying Multimodal Agents
summary: Multimodal agents use screenshots, documents, and webpages to choose tool calls. When a false visual claim triggers a click, email, extraction, or transfer, hallucination becomes an authorization failure rather than an answer-quality error. We formalize this failure mode as hallucination-to-action conversion: an unsupported perceptual claim supplies the precondition that makes a privileged action appear permitted. We propose evidence-carrying multimodal agents (ECA), which treat free-form model text as inadmissible evidence. ECA decomposes each tool call into action-critical predicates, obtains typed certificates from constrained DOM/OCR/AX verifiers, and lets a deterministic gate grant only the privileges those certificates support. The architecture does not hide perception error; it converts opaque model belief into named verifier, schema, and implementation residuals. Verifier red-teaming over 1,900 attacks exposes this residual directly: four targeted hardening steps reduce gate bypass from 15% to 1.3%. With content-derived certificates, ECA obtains 0% unsafe-action rate on a 200-task end-to-end pipeline (Wilson 95% upper bound 2.67%) and a 120-task browser proof-of-concept (upper bound 4.3%). A direct HACR audit on 500 stratified task keys shows that unsupported action-critical claims reach unsafe execution for naive agents (100.0%) and prompt-only defense (49.6%), but not for ECA. Oracle-certificate replay on 7,488 GPT-5.4 benchmark traces serves as a gate-correctness sanity check, and neural judge baselines remain bypassable under the same threat model. The resulting principle is simple: model language may propose actions, but external evidence must authorize them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出证据携带多模态代理（ECA），通过将模型自由文本视为不可采信证据，利用受约束的DOM/OCR/AX验证器生成类型化证书，并由确定性门控机制仅授权证书所支持的特权操作，从而防止幻觉引发的动作授权失败。
AI.motivation: 多模态代理在基于视觉信息执行点击、邮件发送等特权动作时，若依赖错误的视觉主张（幻觉），会导致授权失败而非单纯答案错误；需形式化并解决‘幻觉转动作’这一新型安全风险。
AI.method: ECA架构将每个工具调用分解为动作关键谓词，由受限验证器（DOM/OCR/AX）生成结构化证书，再经确定性门控机制判断是否授权；所有感知误差显式映射为验证器、模式与实现残差，并通过红队攻击评估与硬化。
AI.result: 在1900+次红队攻击中，门控绕过率从15%降至1.3%；端到端200任务管道与120任务浏览器POC中实现0%不安全动作率；HACR审计显示ECA杜绝了不支持动作关键主张导致的不安全执行，而基线方法分别达100.0%和49.6%。
AI.conclusion: 模型语言可提议动作，但外部可验证证据必须授权动作；ECA将隐式信念转化为显式、可审计、可硬化的证据链，确立了多模态代理安全动作的新原则。

title: Trust or Abstain? A Self-Aware RAG Approach
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves large language models (LLMs) by incorporating external evidence, but it also introduces knowledge conflicts when retrieved contextual knowledge (CK) and parametric knowledge (PK) disagree or are both unreliable. Existing approaches mainly coordinate which source to use, without explicitly asking whether each answer path is correct. We argue that faithful RAG requires LLM self-awareness, namely the ability to recognize the limits of its own knowledge and reasoning. To ground this problem, we construct a model-specific, ground-truth-aligned knowledge-conflict benchmark by evaluating LLM backbones on PK-only and CK-conditioned answer paths over approximately 69K query-context instances per backbone, drawn from five conflict-QA datasets. We then introduce SABER, a Self-Aware Belief Estimator for RAG that requires no LLM fine-tuning. SABER combines a self-prior with PK-side and CK-side conditional reasoning representations from multi-trace inference, then estimates reliability beliefs with two lightweight predictors to drive a 4-cell decision over trust PK, trust CK, trust either, or abstain. Across four LLM backbones, SABER improves end-to-end accuracy and conflict-specific faithfulness over ten inference-time and fine-tuning baselines, with the largest gains on conflict-heavy datasets. Under abstention, SABER's risk-coverage curve Pareto-dominates every prompt-based abstainer, providing a tunable balance between coverage and answer risk. Our code is available at https://github.com/xizhu1022/SABER.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SABER方法，通过增强大语言模型在检索增强生成（RAG）中的自我意识，以解决外部检索知识与模型参数化知识之间的冲突问题，无需微调即可提升答案准确性和可信度。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法主要协调使用哪种知识源，却未显式判断各答案路径是否正确；作者认为忠实的RAG需模型具备自我意识——即识别自身知识与推理边界的能力。
AI.method: 构建了面向模型、对齐真实标签的知识冲突基准，并提出无需微调的SABER框架：结合自先验与多轨迹推理得到的PK/CK条件表征，利用两个轻量预测器估计可靠性信念，驱动四类决策（信任PK、信任CK、信任任一、拒绝回答）。
AI.result: SABER在四个LLM主干模型上显著优于十种推理时和微调基线，尤其在高冲突数据集上提升最大；其风险-覆盖曲线Pareto优于所有基于提示的拒绝机制。
AI.conclusion: SABER验证了LLM自我意识对提升RAG忠实性的重要性，为知识冲突下的可靠推理提供了可扩展、免微调的新范式。

title: Are Rationales Necessary and Sufficient? Tuning LLMs for Explainable Misinformation Detection
comment: Accepted by KDD 2026. 12 pages, 8 figures. Code: https://github.com/wangbing1416/LONSREX
summary: The rapid spread of misinformation on social media platforms has become a formidable challenge. To mitigate its proliferation, Misinformation Detection (MD) has emerged as a critical research topic. Traditional MD approaches based on small models typically perform binary classification through a black-box process. Recently, the rise of Large Language Models (LLMs) has enabled explainable MD, where models generate rationales that explain their decisions, thereby enhancing transparency. Existing explainable MD methods primarily focus on crafting sophisticated prompts to elicit rationales from off-the-shelf LLMs. In this work, we propose a pipeline to fine-tune a dedicated LLM specifically for explainable MD. Our pipeline begins by collecting large-scale fact-checked articles, and then uses multiple strong LLMs to produce veracity predictions and rationales. To ensure high-quality training data, we leverage a filtering strategy that selects only the correct instances for fine-tuning. While this pipeline is intuitive and prevalent, our experiments reveal that naive filtering based solely on label correctness is insufficient in practice and suffers from two critical limitations: (1) Coarse-grained labels cause insufficient rationales: Rationales filtered solely based on binary labels are insufficient to adequately support their decisions; (2) Over-verification behavior causes unnecessary rationales: Stronger LLMs tend to exhibit over-verification behavior, producing excessively verbose and unnecessary rationales. To address these issues, we introduce LONSREX, a novel data synthesis pipeline to Locate Necessary and Sufficient Rationales for Explainable MD. Specifically, we propose a metric that quantifies the contribution of each verification step to the final prediction, thereby evaluating its necessity and sufficiency. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of LONSREX.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LONSREX，一种用于可解释性虚假信息检测（MD）的数据合成管道，通过量化验证步骤对最终预测的贡献，定位必要且充分的理由，以解决现有方法中理由不足和过度验证的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型（LLM）的可解释虚假信息检测方法依赖提示工程，缺乏专门微调；且简单按标签正确性过滤训练数据会导致理由不足和过度验证问题。
AI.method: 提出LONSREX数据合成管道：首先收集大规模事实核查文章，用多个强LLM生成真实性预测与理由；设计新指标量化各验证步骤对预测的贡献，筛选必要且充分的理由；并采用针对性过滤策略构建高质量微调数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明LONSREX显著提升可解释MD性能，在理由质量与预测准确性上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 单纯依据标签正确性过滤理由不可靠；引入必要性与充分性评估机制是构建高质量可解释MD训练数据的关键，LONSREX为此提供了有效解决方案。

title: DEFLECT: Delay-Robust Execution via Flow-matching Likelihood-Estimated Counterfactual Tuning for VLA Policies
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies are typically deployed with asynchronous inference: the robot executes a previously predicted action chunk while the model computes the next one. This creates a prediction-execution misalignment: the chunk is conditioned on the observation taken before inference began, but executes in a physical state that has already drifted forward by several control steps; naive asynchronous rollover collapses from 89% to under 1% on Kinetix as the inference cycle covers up to seven control steps. We introduce DEFLECT, a fully offline post-training refinement that applies as a near drop-in upgrade to existing async-VLA stacks by converting latency itself into a label-free preference signal: counterfactual fresh/stale action pairs are constructed from a frozen reference policy and scored under the deployment-time conditioning via an implicit flow-matching likelihood-ratio surrogate, with no human labels, reward models, or online rollouts. DEFLECT substantially extends the usable delay envelope of async VLA control, with +6.4 success-rate gain in the high-latency regime (5-7 control steps), +4.6 when transferred to a real-scale VLA at the longest delay, and consistent improvements on two real-robot tasks (a bimanual conveyor pick-and-place and a reactive whack-a-mole).

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEFLECT方法，通过将推理延迟本身转化为无标签偏好信号，在离线阶段对异步视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略进行后训练优化，显著提升高延迟场景下的任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 异步VLA策略中预测与执行存在状态漂移导致性能急剧下降，亟需无需在线交互或人工标注的延迟鲁棒性改进方法。
AI.method: DEFLECT是一种完全离线的后训练精调方法：利用冻结参考策略生成反事实的新/旧动作对，通过隐式流匹配似然比代理模型在部署时条件下降序评分，无需人类标签、奖励模型或在线rollout。
AI.result: 在Kinetix基准上，高延迟区间（5–7控制步）成功率提升+6.4%；迁移到真实尺度VLA时最长延迟下提升+4.6%；并在双臂传送带抓放与反应式打地鼠两个真实机器人任务中保持一致增益。
AI.conclusion: DEFLECT为异步VLA系统提供了一种即插即用、标签无关、纯离线的延迟鲁棒性增强方案，有效缓解预测-执行错位问题。

title: Smartphone-based Circular Plot Sampling for Forest Inventory
summary:
Circular sample plots are a cornerstone of forest inventory, yet accurate measurement of tree diameter at breast height (DBH) and spatial location within such plots remains challenging. Conventional approaches rely either on costly terrestrial LiDAR systems or labor-intensive manual methods involving calipers and compass bearings, limiting their scalability and accessibility in large scale environments. We present a lightweight, smartphone-based pipeline that enables complete plot sampling based tree measurement from a single walkthrough video, requiring no specialized hardware beyond a consumer smartphone mounted on a portable stand. The proposed method integrates pretrained monocular depth estimation and tree instance segmentation with a simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) framework to jointly refine camera trajectories and depth across the video sequence. Tree positions and DBH estimates are recovered by fusing SLAM-derived camera poses with segmented depth maps, with absolute real-world scale anchored via a calibrated reference length.
  The system was evaluated in both managed forest plots and natural forest plot, achieving a mean absolute error of 1.51 cm (MARE 3.98%) and 2.30 cm (MARE 5.69%) respectively, with consistent performance across varying starting directions and positions. Cross-video consistency analysis further demonstrated stable and reproducible tree localization across measurements initiated from different starting positions. The proposed approach achieves accuracy comparable to established field methods while substantially reducing equipment cost and operational complexity, making it accessible to both professional researchers and non-expert forest managers in diverse operational settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于智能手机视频的轻量级森林样地测量方法，通过融合单目深度估计、树实例分割与SLAM技术，实现无需专业设备的DBH和树位高精度估计。
AI.motivation: 传统林分样地测量依赖昂贵激光雷达或耗时的手动方式，难以在大范围场景中推广，亟需低成本、易操作且高精度的替代方案。
AI.method: 构建基于智能手机单次步行视频的处理流程，融合预训练单目深度估计、树实例分割与SLAM框架，联合优化相机轨迹与深度图；利用SLAM位姿与分割深度图融合估算树位置与DBH，并通过标定参考长度统一真实尺度。
AI.result: 在人工林和天然林样地中DBH估计平均绝对误差分别为1.51 cm（MARE 3.98%）和2.30 cm（MARE 5.69%），起始方向/位置变化下表现稳定，跨视频定位一致性好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法精度媲美传统实地测量，同时大幅降低设备成本与操作复杂度，适用于专业研究者与非专家林管人员的多样化应用场景。

title: Not all uncertainty is alike: volatility, stochasticity, and exploration
summary: Adaptive decision-making in biological and artificial intelligence requires balancing the exploitation of known outcomes with the exploration of uncertain alternatives. Although prior work suggests that uncertainty generally promotes exploration, it has typically treated distinct sources of environmental uncertainty as equivalent. We consider environments with latent reward states that drift over time (volatility) and are observed through noisy outcomes (stochasticity). Both increase posterior uncertainty, yet we show they drive optimal exploration in opposite directions: volatility enhances it, stochasticity suppresses it. We establish this asymmetry formally by extending the Gittins index framework to Gaussian state-space bandits with latent dynamics. We further derive Cause-Aware Uncertainty-Sensitive Exploration (CAUSE), a closed-form exploration bonus obtained via control-as-inference that inherits the same monotonicities. CAUSE outperforms standard exploration strategies in environments with heterogeneous noise structure, and also improves on a Gittins-per-arm policy whose rested-bandit optimality does not transfer to restless settings. Learning and exploration are governed by the same noise-inference asymmetry, and the framework predicts that pathological noise inference produces \emph{reversed} rather than merely impaired exploration, with implications for computational accounts of psychiatric conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在具有不同不确定性来源（波动性和随机性）的环境中，智能体如何进行自适应决策。作者发现，尽管两者都增加了后验不确定性，但它们对最优探索行为的影响方向相反：波动性增强探索，而随机性抑制探索。为此，作者扩展了Gittins指数框架，并提出了CAUSE探索策略，在理论和实验上均优于传统方法，并对精神疾病计算模型具有启示意义。
AI.motivation: 以往研究常将环境中的不同不确定性来源（如波动性和随机性）等同对待，但现实中它们对探索行为的影响可能截然不同；本文旨在揭示并形式化这种差异及其对自适应决策的影响。
AI.method: 扩展Gittins指数框架至具有潜在动态的高斯状态空间多臂老虎机；基于控制即推理（control-as-inference）推导出闭式探索奖励CAUSE；通过理论分析与数值实验验证其性质与性能。
AI.result: 证明波动性增强探索、随机性抑制探索这一不对称性；CAUSE策略在异质噪声环境中优于标准探索策略及逐臂Gittins策略；该不对称性也适用于学习过程，并可解释某些精神病理状态下的反常探索行为。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性并非单一概念，其结构（如波动性vs.随机性）决定探索方向；CAUSE提供了一种噪声感知且因果敏感的探索机制，为理解生物与人工智能中的学习与决策提供了新框架，并具临床计算建模价值。

title: RecoAtlas: From Semantic Plausibility to Set-Level Utility in LLM Recommendation Agents
summary: LLM recommendation agents increasingly produce structured recommendation reports: sets of items accompanied by natural-language justifications. Yet existing evaluations often reduce this setting to reranking small shortlisted candidate sets or judge reports mainly by semantic plausibility. We introduce Recommendation Atlas (Agentic Tool-Level Assessment for Shopping), or RecoAtlas, a benchmark and toolkit for evaluating shopping agents with behavior-grounded metrics. RecoAtlas complements held-out interaction metrics with learned utility proxies for relevance, complementarity, and diversity derived from interaction data, while separately measuring semantic coherence and explanation quality. Its controlled tool environment exposes agents to either semantic, behavior-aligned, or faulty tools, enabling diagnosis of whether performance gains arise from stronger reasoning, better signals, or more effective tool-use policies. Across controlled experiments, we show that RecoAtlas exhibits key properties of a meaningful benchmark for agentic systems: performance scales with model capacity and test-time compute, improves with stronger and better-aligned tools, degrades under noisy or misaligned signals, and reveals that semantic plausibility does not necessarily capture behavior-grounded utility. RecoAtlas provides a foundation for developing and evaluating shopping assistants that optimize not only for plausible recommendations, but also for coherent, behaviorally grounded recommendation sets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RecoAtlas，一个用于评估购物推荐代理的基准和工具包，强调行为基础的评估指标，而非仅依赖语义合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法多局限于小候选集重排序或仅关注推荐报告的语义合理性，缺乏对真实用户行为反馈的建模。
AI.method: 构建RecoAtlas基准，融合基于交互数据学习的效用代理（相关性、互补性、多样性）与语义连贯性、解释质量的独立评估，并设计可控工具环境以诊断代理性能提升的根源。
AI.result: 实验证明RecoAtlas具备有意义基准的关键特性：性能随模型能力与推理计算量提升而提升，受工具质量与对齐度影响显著，且在信号噪声下性能下降；同时揭示语义合理性不等价于行为效用。
AI.conclusion: RecoAtlas为开发兼顾语义合理性与行为基础效用的购物助手提供了可信赖的评估基础。

title: How Do Document Parsers Break? Auditing Structural Vulnerability in Document Intelligence
summary: Document Layout Analysis (DLA) pipelines provide structured page representations for retrieval-augmented generation, long-document question answering, and other document intelligence systems, yet their robustness evaluation remains largely area-centric. We identify this Footprint Bias and propose a lightweight output-level auditing framework that decouples probe construction, policy-driven targeting, and structure-aware diagnosis. The framework combines Block-level Structural Loss Rate (B-SLR), granularity-aware exposure descriptors, and pathway attribution to analyze where perturbations interact with layout structure and how failures propagate. Across MinerU and PP-StructureV3 on 1,000 pages, affected area weakly tracks perturbation-induced OCR instability (R^2=0.384/0.110), whereas B-SLR aligns much more closely with it (R^2=0.727/0.916). Exposure descriptors further separate occlusion- and topology-dominant pathways, and small structurally targeted probes cause downstream QA/retrieval degradation comparable to larger-footprint perturbations. These results shift DLA robustness evaluation from footprint-based stress testing toward structure-aware vulnerability auditing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向结构的文档布局分析（DLA）鲁棒性评估框架，以解决现有方法中过度依赖扰动覆盖面积（Footprint Bias）的问题；该框架通过块级结构损失率（B-SLR）、粒度感知暴露描述符和路径归因，实现对扰动与布局结构交互及故障传播的精细诊断，并在多个模型和数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有文档布局分析（DLA）鲁棒性评估方法存在‘足迹偏差’（Footprint Bias），即仅关注扰动覆盖面积而忽略其与文档结构的交互机制，导致评估结果不能真实反映系统脆弱性。
AI.method: 提出一种轻量级输出级审计框架，包含三部分：（1）基于块的结构损失率（B-SLR）量化结构破坏程度；（2）粒度感知的暴露描述符区分遮挡主导与拓扑主导的失效路径；（3）路径归因分析扰动如何沿结构路径传播并引发下游任务退化。
AI.result: 在MinerU和PP-StructureV3上对1000页文档测试表明：B-SLR与OCR不稳定性高度相关（R²=0.727/0.916），显著优于传统面积指标（R²=0.384/0.110）；暴露描述符可有效分离不同失效机制；小规模结构靶向扰动即可造成与大面积扰动相当的问答/检索性能下降。
AI.conclusion: DLA鲁棒性评估应从基于扰动面积的压力测试，转向基于文档结构的细粒度脆弱性审计；所提框架为结构感知的文档智能系统可靠性评估提供了新范式。

title: ContextFlow: Hierarchical Task-State Alignment for Long-Horizon Embodied Agents
summary: Long-horizon embodied agents increasingly delegate navigation, search, approach, and manipulation to specialist executors. As these executors become stronger, the main bottleneck shifts from local skill execution to maintaining a coherent task frontier across planning, monitoring, memory, and execution. We study task-state misalignment, a task-level consistency failure in which the planner's active stage, runtime evidence, remembered context, and delegated executor no longer justify the same next-step decision. This failure can lead to unsupported handoffs, stage lock, executor-context mismatch, and unnecessary replanning. We propose ContextFlow, an inspectable alignment framework that represents stages as explicit contracts, converts runtime observations into evidence packets, and applies scoped updates including continue, refine, transfer, promote, and repair. ContextFlow keeps specialist executors responsible for local closed-loop control while making task-frontier alignment explicit and auditable. Experiments and demonstration traces on long-horizon embodied tasks illustrate how evidence-grounded scoped updates diagnose and mitigate recurring task-state failures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ContextFlow框架，通过显式阶段契约、证据包和范围化更新机制，解决长时程具身智能体中任务状态错位问题，提升任务前沿对齐的可解释性与可审计性。
AI.motivation: 随着专用执行器能力增强，长时程具身智能体的主要瓶颈从局部技能执行转向跨规划、监控、记忆与执行的任务前沿一致性维护；任务状态错位（task-state misalignment）导致不支持的交接、阶段锁定、执行器-上下文不匹配及冗余重规划。
AI.method: 提出ContextFlow框架：将任务阶段建模为显式契约；将运行时观测转化为证据包；引入五种范围化更新操作（continue, refine, transfer, promote, repair）实现上下文驱动的对齐调控。
AI.result: 实验与演示轨迹表明，ContextFlow能基于证据进行范围化更新，有效诊断并缓解长时程具身任务中反复出现的任务状态失败。
AI.conclusion: ContextFlow使任务前沿对齐显式化、可检验，既保留执行器的局部闭环控制责任，又提升了系统级任务一致性的可控性与透明度。

title: Rotation-Aligned Key Channel Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Model Inference
summary: Vision-Language Models suffer severe KV cache pressure at inference, as a single image often encodes into thousands of tokens. Most existing methods exploit token sparsity through token pruning, but permanently discarding visual content causes substantial degradation on fine-grained perception tasks. This motivates a complementary axis, feature sparsity: under a fixed KV cache budget, compressing the channel dimension preserves more visual tokens at the same memory cost. Prior Key channel pruning methods, however, face a structural trade-off: token-wise channel pruning is expressive but unstructured and slow, while head-wise approach is hardware-friendly but less robust. We resolve this with RotateK, a rotation-based structured Key channel pruning framework. RotateK applies an online PCA-based rotation that aligns token-dependent channel importance into a shared low-dimensional subspace, enabling accurate pruning under lightweight head-wise masks; a fused Triton attention kernel operates directly on sparse-channel Keys for efficient decoding. Experiments on two representative VLM backbones show that RotateK consistently outperforms prior Key channel pruning in both accuracy and decoding latency, while joint token-channel pruning improves over token-only baselines at matched KV cache budgets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RotateK，一种基于旋转的结构化Key通道剪枝框架，通过在线PCA旋转对齐通道重要性，实现轻量级头级掩码剪枝，并结合Triton内核加速稀疏解码，在保持视觉token数量的同时压缩通道维度，显著提升视觉语言模型推理效率与精度。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在推理时面临严重的KV缓存压力，现有基于token稀疏性的剪枝方法会损害细粒度感知任务性能，因此需要探索特征稀疏性（即通道压缩）这一互补方向。
AI.method: 提出RotateK框架：1）采用在线PCA旋转将token依赖的通道重要性对齐到共享低维子空间；2）在此基础上使用轻量级头级掩码进行结构化Key通道剪枝；3）设计融合Triton注意力核直接处理稀疏通道Keys以加速解码。
AI.result: 在两个主流VLM骨干网络上的实验表明，RotateK在准确率和解码延迟上均优于以往Key通道剪枝方法；联合token-通道剪枝在相同KV缓存预算下也优于仅token剪枝基线。
AI.conclusion: 通道维度的结构化剪枝是缓解VLM KV缓存压力的有效新路径，RotateK通过旋转对齐与硬件友好的稀疏计算，在不牺牲视觉token数量的前提下实现了精度与效率的协同提升。

title: SimGym: A Framework for A/B Test Simulation in E-Commerce with Traffic-Grounded VLM Agents
summary: A/B testing remains the gold standard for evaluating modifications to e-commerce storefronts, yet it diverts traffic, requires weeks to reach statistical significance, and risks degrading user experience. We present SimGym, a framework for simulating A/B tests on e-commerce storefronts using vision-language model (VLM) agents operating in a live browser. The framework comprises three key components: (a) a traffic-grounded persona generation pipeline that derives per-shop buyer archetypes and intents from production clickstream data; (b) a live-browser agent architecture that combines multimodal perception over visual and browser-structured observations with episodic memory and guardrails to conduct coherent shopping sessions across control and treatment storefronts; and (c) an evaluation protocol that compares simulated outcome shifts with observed shifts in real buyer behavior. We validate SimGym on A/B tests of visually driven UI theme changes from a major e-commerce platform across diverse storefronts and product categories. Empirical results show that SimGym agents achieve strong agreement with observed outcome shifts, attaining 77% directional alignment with add-to-cart shifts observed across interface variants in real-buyer traffic. It reduces experimental cycles from weeks to under an hour, enabling rapid experimentation without exposing real buyers to candidate variants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimGym框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）代理在真实浏览器中模拟电商首页的A/B测试，通过生成流量驱动的用户画像、构建具备多模态感知与记忆的浏览器代理、以及对比模拟与真实行为结果的评估协议，显著提升实验效率与安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统A/B测试耗时长、分流用户、影响用户体验，亟需一种高效、低风险的替代评估方法。
AI.method: 提出SimGym框架，包含三部分：(a) 基于生产点击流数据生成店铺特定买家人设与意图；(b) 构建运行于真实浏览器中的多模态VLM代理，融合视觉/结构化观测、情景记忆与安全约束；(c) 设计评估协议，将模拟结果与真实用户行为变化进行比对。
AI.result: 在大型电商平台UI主题变更的A/B测试中验证，SimGym对加购行为变化的方向预测准确率达77%，实验周期从数周缩短至一小时以内。
AI.conclusion: SimGym为电商界面优化提供了高保真、快速、无需真实用户参与的模拟评估新范式。

title: Towards FairRAG: Preventing Representational Harm in Retrieval-Augmented Generation by Enforcing Fair Exposure at Retrieval Time
summary: As Large Language Model (LLM) integration has accelerated in high-stakes domains, model hallucination is a critical issue. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a technique for addressing hallucination; however, RAG's multi-component pipeline introduces vulnerabilities where biases can be introduced. This study considers two previously developed utility-focused ranking strategies (Standard and Stochastic) alongside two proposed exposure-aware approaches (Forced-Exposure and Representative Stochastic). Using the TREC 2022 Fair Ranking Dataset, which contains Wikipedia articles annotated as protected or non-protected, the LLM was asked to identify relevant articles with citations for four scenario-based Q&A prompts. The retrieval rankings and the generated outputs were evaluated for exposure bias and utility across all ranking methods. Overall, the Representative Stochastic ranker resulted in a statistically significant near-parity average exposure, acknowledging that relevance scores initially produced during retrieval are already shaped by representational bias, whereas the other rankers assume those scores are unbiased. Across all the methods of document ranking, generation demographic parity closely mirrored the exposure parity, reinforcing that representational bias in RAG systems is driven by retrieval and propagates to generation. These findings highlight that retrieval ranking is a critical point for mitigating downstream bias and propose a Representative Stochastic ranker that reintroduces fairness in RAG systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了检索增强生成（RAG）系统中因检索排序引入的暴露偏差问题，提出并评估了两种曝光感知排序策略（Forced-Exposure 和 Representative Stochastic），发现 Representative Stochastic 能显著提升曝光公平性，并缓解下游生成中的代表性偏差。
AI.motivation: LLM在高风险领域应用日益广泛，但幻觉问题严重；RAG虽可缓解幻觉，其多组件流程却易引入偏差，尤其检索排序环节可能嵌入并传播代表性偏差。
AI.method: 在TREC 2022 Fair Ranking数据集上，对比Standard、Stochastic、Forced-Exposure和Representative Stochastic四种排序策略；通过四个场景式问答提示驱动LLM检索与生成，并联合评估检索排序的曝光偏差与生成结果的效用及人口统计公平性。
AI.result: Representative Stochastic排序器实现了统计显著的近似曝光公平性；所有方法中生成阶段的人口统计公平性均紧密跟随检索曝光公平性，表明偏差主要源于检索且会传播至生成。
AI.conclusion: 检索排序是缓解RAG下游偏差的关键干预点；Representative Stochastic是一种有效重置公平性的新排序策略。

title: A Multi-Agent Framework for Feature-Constrained Difficulty Control in Reading Comprehension Item Generation
summary: Recent studies in difficulty-controlled reading comprehension item generation have leveraged large language models (LLMs) to produce items by adjusting difficulty-related features. However, existing methods typically rely on a single-agent prompting approach, which often fails to consistently satisfy specified feature constraints, resulting in items that deviate from the target difficulty level. To address this limitation, we introduce MAFIG, a Multi-agent Framework for Feature-constrained Item Generation, where multiple LLM agents and feature-specific evaluators collaborate to generate and iteratively revise items based on intended constraints. Furthermore, to verify the efficacy of MAFIG in difficulty control, we propose a method for constructing a sequence of feature constraint sets that yield items with monotonically increasing difficulty. Experimental results demonstrate that MAFIG generates items that adhere to target constraints at a significantly higher rate than baselines, achieving robust difficulty control through the difficulty-calibrated constraint sequence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAFIG，一种多智能体框架，用于特征约束的阅读理解题目生成，通过多个LLM代理与特征专用评估器协作迭代生成和修订题目，显著提升难度控制精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于单智能体提示的方法难以稳定满足指定的难度相关特征约束，导致生成题目偏离目标难度。
AI.method: 提出多智能体框架MAFIG，结合多个LLM代理与特征专用评估器进行协同生成与迭代修订；并设计难度校准的特征约束序列以实现单调递增难度。
AI.result: 实验表明，MAFIG在满足目标约束方面的成功率显著高于基线方法，实现了鲁棒的难度控制。
AI.conclusion: MAFIG通过多智能体协作与难度校准约束序列，有效提升了难度可控的阅读理解题目生成质量与一致性。

title: Beyond Waypoints: Dual-Heatmap Grounding for Cross-Embodiment Semantic Navigation
summary: Grounding open-ended semantic instructions into physically executable local goals is a fundamental challenge in human-robot interaction. While existing navigation frameworks often regress deterministic waypoints, this rigid formulation collapses spatial uncertainty and frequently targets non-traversable object centers, leading to severe execution failures. In this work, we focus on the practical setting of in-FOV semantic navigation, where a robot receives concise, interleaved multimodal (text and image) prompts. To bridge the gap between abstract semantic intent and physical reachability, we propose a unified Vision-Language framework that abandons single-point regression in favor of a Dual-Heatmap representation. Our framework predicts a navigation affordance heatmap that captures continuous reachable regions, coupled with a facing heatmap for orientation constraints. These dense outputs inherently function as a differentiable semantic potential field, integrating seamlessly with downstream local planners. To support this paradigm, we build a fully automated, foundation-model-assisted synthetic data pipeline and establish a comprehensive simulation benchmark. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance among comparable 8B baselines. Crucially, a feature-fusion study and simulation studies across diverse robot embodiments (Jetbot, H1, Aliengo) reveal that explicit heatmap prediction drastically improves the Affordance Rate (AR). By placing targets reliably in executable free space, our framework effectively mitigates the brittleness of point regression, offering a transferable path toward safe cross-embodiment semantic navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双热图（导航可执行区域热图+朝向热图）的视觉-语言框架，用于解决开放语义指令到物理可执行局部目标的映射问题，显著提升机器人在多形态平台上的语义导航鲁棒性与可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有导航方法依赖确定性路点回归，忽略空间不确定性且常指向不可通行的目标中心，导致执行失败；尤其在视野内多模态（文本+图像）语义导航场景下，亟需兼顾语义理解与物理可达性。
AI.method: 提出统一的Vision-Language框架，摒弃单点回归，采用Dual-Heatmap表示：1）导航可执行性热图（连续可达区域），2）面向热图（朝向约束）；二者构成可微语义势场，兼容下游局部规划器；并构建基于大模型的全自动合成数据流水线及仿真基准。
AI.result: 在8B参数量级基线上达到SOTA性能；跨平台（Jetbot/H1/Aliengo）实验表明Affordance Rate（AR）显著提升；消融与仿真验证了热图预测对缓解点回归脆弱性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双热图表征能更鲁棒、可迁移地将开放语义指令落地为物理可执行目标，为跨形态机器人安全语义导航提供了新范式。

title: HAVEN: Hierarchically Aligned Multimodal Benchmark for Unified Video Understanding
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) exhibit strong performance on standard video tasks, their ability to faithfully summarize and reason over complex narratives remains poorly evaluated. Existing summarization benchmarks fragment supervision across isolated granularities, such as keyframes, key shots, or disjointed text summaries, failing to capture the inherently hierarchical structure of cross-modal alignment. To address this critical gap, we introduce HAVEN, a hierarchically aligned multimodal benchmark for unified video understanding. HAVEN pioneers a fully granular (frame, shot, and video levels) and fully multimodal (video and text) dataset architecture, complete with explicit, continuous alignment between modalities. Built upon this unified annotation paradigm, we propose a comprehensive evaluation suite spanning summarization, temporal reasoning, multimodal grounding, and saliency ranking. Extensive benchmarking of state-of-the-art MLLMs exposes a persistent gap between surface-level textual fluency and grounded multimodal understanding. Ultimately, HAVEN advances the evaluation of multimodal systems beyond traditional QA formats, offering a rigorous, standardized testbed to drive future research in interpretable, hierarchical video understanding. We publicly release the dataset, benchmark suite, and evaluation protocols.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HAVEN基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在分层视频理解任务中的能力，涵盖帧、镜头和视频三级粒度，并支持视频与文本的连续对齐；通过全面评测发现当前MLLMs在表层文本流畅性与深层多模态理解之间存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有视频摘要基准将监督信号分散在孤立的细粒度单元（如关键帧、关键镜头或离散文本摘要），无法反映跨模态对齐的内在层次结构，导致对MLLMs复杂叙事理解和忠实总结能力的评估不足。
AI.method: 构建了HAVEN——一个具有完全粒度（帧/镜头/视频级）和完全多模态（视频+文本）特性的分层对齐基准，包含显式、连续的跨模态对齐标注；并基于该范式设计涵盖摘要生成、时序推理、多模态定位和显著性排序的综合评测套件。
AI.result: 对前沿MLLMs的大规模评测揭示其在表面文本生成流畅性与真实多模态语义理解之间存在持续鸿沟；HAVEN推动评估范式从传统问答转向更严谨、可解释、分层的视频理解。
AI.conclusion: HAVEN填补了多模态视频理解评估中层次化、对齐化基准的空白，为未来可解释、分层视频理解研究提供了标准化测试平台，并已开源数据集、评测套件及协议。

title: Can Large Language Models Revolutionize Survey Research? Experiments with Disaster Preparedness Responses
summary: Survey research faces mounting structural challenges: declining response rates, sample bias, block-wise missingness among at-risk respondents, and AI-assisted fraudulent completions in online panels. Large language models (LLMs) have been proposed as a remedy, yet rigorous evaluations across the full survey workflow remain scarce, particularly in disaster contexts where data quality matters most. We present and evaluate a five-stage framework for LLM integration covering questionnaire design, sample selection, pilot testing, missing-data imputation, and post-collection analysis, using the 2024 Hurricane Milton preparedness survey of Florida residents (n=946) as a shared empirical testbed. We introduce a Protection Motivation Theory (PMT)-constrained co-occurrence knowledge graph and develop seven LLM configurations spanning zero-shot inference, retrieval-augmented baselines, and novel theory-informed variants. Our proposed Anchored Marginal Theory-Informed LLM (A-TLM) outperforms all three classical imputation baselines (IPW/MI, MICE+PMM, missForest) on RMSE under disaster-relevant block-wise MNAR conditions (S4 RMSE 1.439 vs. 1.496 for the next-best), while achieving near-zero signed bias (-0.121) where the random-forest imputer produces the largest absolute bias (-0.631). Organizing retrieval around PMT causal structure and integrating all evidence in a single model call outperforms unstructured retrieval and staged sequential inference (MAE 0.993 vs. 1.097 for standard RAG). We document that near-zero aggregate bias can mask opposing subgroup errors and propose subgroup-stratified bias auditing as a reporting standard. A retrieval-constrained knowledge-graph chatbot demonstrates that hallucination is architecturally manageable through grounded refusal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了一个五阶段的大型语言模型（LLM）集成框架，用于提升灾害情境下调查研究的数据质量，尤其在应对响应率下降、样本偏差、块状缺失和AI欺诈等问题上；基于飓风Milton准备情况调查数据，作者构建了受保护动机理论（PMT）约束的知识图谱，并设计多种LLM配置，其中提出的A-TLM模型在块状MNAR缺失下的插补效果最优，同时提出子群分层偏差审计作为报告新标准。
AI.motivation: 调查研究面临响应率下降、样本偏差、块状缺失及AI欺诈等结构性挑战，尤其在灾害背景下数据质量至关重要，而现有LLM应用缺乏对全工作流的严谨评估。
AI.method: 提出覆盖问卷设计、抽样、预测试、缺失值插补与事后分析的五阶段LLM集成框架；构建PMT约束的共现知识图谱；设计七种LLM配置（含零样本推理、RAG基线及理论引导变体）；以2024年佛罗里达飓风Milton准备调查（n=946）为实证基础；采用RMSE、偏差、MAE等指标对比评估。
AI.result: A-TLM模型在块状MNAR缺失下RMSE为1.439，优于所有经典插补方法（如IPW/MI、MICE+PMM、missForest）；其符号偏差接近零（-0.121），显著优于随机森林插补（-0.631）；结构化检索+单次调用优于非结构化RAG（MAE 0.993 vs. 1.097）；知识图谱驱动的聊天机器人可有效抑制幻觉；发现总体偏差掩盖子群对立误差，提出子群分层偏差审计。
AI.conclusion: LLM可通过理论引导、结构化知识整合与架构约束，在关键调查环节（尤其是缺失插补）中显著提升数据质量与可信度；需将子群公平性审计纳入标准报告流程，幻觉问题可通过 grounded refusal 等机制可控管理。

title: Code-Guided Reasoning for Small Language Models: Evaluating Executable MCQA Scaffolds
summary: Multiple-choice QA benchmarks usually evaluate small language models (SLMs) as direct answerers, but deployed language-model systems increasingly rely on external scaffolds such as tools, code, and repeated model calls. We introduce Code-Guided Reasoning (CGR), an evaluation protocol and generated-program resource for measuring when executable reasoning scaffolds improve SLM performance on MCQA tasks. CGR standardizes six components: a normalized item interface, a direct solver prompt, a generator prompt, a Python scaffold, solver-call and extraction helpers, and a three-channel result record. On 20,498 retained result rows from a locally prepared MCQA bundle and six metadata-registered solver models, the observed non-zero-baseline partition shows 66.21% macro assisted accuracy versus 38.11% direct accuracy, a +28.10 percentage-point difference with a pair-bootstrap interval of [20.32, 36.43]. Under a stricter Ab > 30% direct-signal gate, the macro difference is +14.11 points. These estimates are descriptive. Assisted inference uses a larger solver-call budget, answer extraction is brittle, Time-MQA contains the observed regressions, and some generated programs violate the no-hard-coding instruction. CGR provides the trace package needed to interpret these results, including direct, assisted, and generator-side answers, partition definitions, generated programs, response metadata, and audits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Code-Guided Reasoning（CGR）评估协议，用于衡量可执行推理脚手架（如代码、工具调用）对小型语言模型（SLM）在多选题问答（MCQA）任务中性能的提升效果；实验表明，在多种模型和数据集上，辅助推理显著优于直接回答，但存在预算开销、提取脆弱性及程序违规等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MCQA基准多将SLM作为直接回答者评估，而实际部署系统常依赖外部脚手架（如工具、代码、多次调用），亟需一种标准化方法来评估此类辅助推理的有效性与可靠性。
AI.method: 提出CGR评估协议，包含六个标准化组件：统一题目接口、直接求解提示、生成器提示、Python脚手架、求解器调用与答案提取辅助函数、三通道结果记录；基于本地构建的MCQA数据集（20,498条样本）和6个求解器模型进行实证评估，并提供完整追踪包（含直接/辅助/生成端答案、程序代码、元数据与审计日志）。
AI.result: 在非零基线划分下，辅助推理宏观准确率达66.21%，显著高于直接推理的38.11%（+28.10个百分点，置信区间[20.32, 36.43]）；在更严格阈值（Ab > 30%）下，增益为+14.11个百分点；但也观察到时序类MCQA中的性能下降、答案提取脆弱、程序硬编码违规等问题。
AI.conclusion: CGR为评估SLM在脚手架辅助下的推理能力提供了可复现、可解释的标准化框架，揭示了辅助推理的潜力与现实局限，强调需兼顾性能增益与系统鲁棒性、可维护性。

title: HalluWorld: A Controlled Benchmark for Hallucination via Reference World Models
comment: HalluWorld benchmark (code and data) at github.com/DegenAI-Labs/HalluWorld
summary: Hallucination remains a central failure mode of large language models, but existing benchmarks operationalize it inconsistently across summarization, question answering, retrieval-augmented generation, and agentic interaction. This fragmentation makes it unclear whether a mitigation that works in one setting reduces hallucinations across contexts. Current benchmarks either require human annotation and fixed references that may be memorized, or rely on observations in settings that are difficult to reproduce. To study root causes, we introduce HalluWorld, an extensible benchmark grounded in an explicit reference-world formulation: a model hallucinates when it produces an observable claim that is false with respect to this world. Building on this view, we construct synthetic and semi-synthetic environments in which the reference world is fully specified, the model's view is controlled, and hallucination labels are generated automatically. HalluWorld spans gridworlds, chess, and realistic terminal tasks, enabling controlled variation of world complexity, observability, temporal change, and source-conflict policy, and disentangling hallucinations into fine-grained error categories. We evaluate frontier and open-weight language models across these settings and find consistent patterns: perceptual hallucination on directly observed information is near-solved for frontier models, while multi-step state tracking and causal forward simulation remain difficult and are not generally solved by extended thinking. In the terminal setting, models also struggle with when to abstain. The uneven profile of failures across probe types and domains suggests that hallucinations arise from distinct failure modes rather than a single capability. Our results suggest that controlled reference worlds offer a scalable and reproducible path toward measuring and reducing hallucinations in modern language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HalluWorld基准，通过显式定义参考世界来统一衡量大语言模型的幻觉现象，支持自动标注与多维度可控实验，发现幻觉源于多种不同失败模式而非单一能力缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉评测基准在任务类型、标注方式和可复现性上不一致，难以判断某缓解方法是否具有跨场景泛化能力；缺乏统一、可控、可扩展的幻觉定义与评测框架。
AI.method: 提出基于显式参考世界的幻觉定义（即模型输出与参考世界不符即为幻觉），构建包含gridworld、国际象棋和终端任务的合成/半合成HalluWorld基准，实现世界完全可指定、模型视角可控、标签自动生成，并支持复杂度、可观测性、时序变化与源冲突策略等维度调控。
