AI.result: 在多个前沿及开源模型上测试发现：对直接观测信息的感知型幻觉已基本解决，但多步状态追踪与因果前向模拟仍困难，且延展思考未能普遍改善；终端任务中模型亦难判断何时应拒绝回答（abstain）。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉并非单一能力缺陷所致，而是由多种异质失败模式共同导致；基于可控参考世界的评测范式更利于精准归因、可复现评估与针对性改进。

title: Neuromorphic Control of a Flapping-Wing Robot on Resource-Constrained Hardware
summary: Flapping-Wing Micro Aerial Vehicles (FWMAVs) provide exceptional maneuverability and aerodynamic efficiency but pose significant challenges for onboard control due to nonlinear dynamics and stringent Size, Weight, and Power (SWaP) constraints, as exemplified by a butterfly-inspired robot less than 30 gram. To this end, we present a hierarchical neuromorphic control framework that enables fully onboard, closed-loop flight on a widely available, resource-constrained ESP32 microcontroller with a unit cost of approximately $5. Specifically, our method deploys two lightweight Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) onboard: one for state estimation from raw sensory feedback and another for control via modulation of a Central Pattern Generator (CPG) for wing actuation. Trained by imitation learning, the system achieves stable pitch and heading angle tracking during untethered real-world flight. Experimental results further reveal that the SNN-based controller reduces latency by 36% (1059us to 680us) and power by 18% (0.033W to 0.027W) for inference compared to the conventional Artificial Neural Network (ANN) baseline, demonstrating the viability of spike-based computation without specialized hardware. To the best of our knowledge, this work constitutes the first demonstration of fully onboard neuromorphic control for autonomous flight of a FWMAV, highlighting the potential of SNNs to enable energy-efficient autonomy under stringent SWaP constraints. Visual abstract: http://bit.ly/4nI8ECY

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于脉冲神经网络（SNN）的分层类脑控制框架，首次在资源受限的ESP32微控制器上实现了扑翼微型飞行器（FWMAV）的全机载闭环自主飞行，显著降低了延迟与功耗。
AI.motivation: 扑翼微型飞行器（FWMAV）具有优异的机动性与气动效率，但其强非线性动力学和严苛的尺寸、重量与功耗（SWaP）限制给机载控制带来巨大挑战，尤其对小于30克的仿生机器人而言。
AI.method: 提出分层类脑控制框架，部署两个轻量级脉冲神经网络（SNN）于ESP32微控制器：一个用于从原始传感信号中进行状态估计，另一个通过调制中枢模式发生器（CPG）实现翼控；采用模仿学习训练。
AI.result: 在真实无系留飞行中实现了稳定的俯仰角与偏航角跟踪；相比传统人工神经网络（ANN），推理延迟降低36%（1059μs→680μs），功耗降低18%（0.033W→0.027W）。
AI.conclusion: 本工作首次实现了FWMAV全机载类脑控制，验证了无需专用硬件的脉冲计算在严苛SWaP约束下实现能效自主飞行的可行性。

title: Robust Mitigation of Age-Dependent Confounding Effects via Sample-Difficulty Decorrelation
summary: Age dependent performance disparities in medical image classification often arise because age acts as a confounder, linking imaging morphology with disease prevalence. In practice, disparities can manifest as overdiagnosis at ages where disease prevalence is higher and underdiagnosis at ages where prevalence is lower, and can worsen under train test shifts in the age distribution. Conventional mitigation approaches that enforce strict age invariance may suppress diagnostically meaningful information encoded in age. We therefore propose a robust framework that mitigates the effects of age-dependent confounding by targeting spurious age linked trends rather than enforcing invariance. Following a warm-up phase, we characterize sample difficulty and model its age-dependent trends in a label-conditioned manner. We decorrelate age from dominant age difficulty trends using robust, Huber weighted affinity weights, attenuating confounding-driven shortcuts while preserving clinically meaningful, nonlinear age information. We further introduce an Age Coverage Score that scales the decorrelation penalty by minibatch age variance to ensure stable optimization under limited age diversity. Across two radiology datasets, our approach reduces age dependent true and false positive disparities with minimal AUC impact and remains robust to increasing train test age distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒框架，通过识别并消除与年龄相关的虚假关联趋势（而非强制年龄不变性），缓解医学图像分类中因年龄作为混杂因子导致的性能差异。方法包括标签条件下的样本难度建模、Huber加权去相关及基于年龄覆盖率的自适应惩罚机制，在保持诊断有效性的同时提升跨年龄分布的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 年龄作为混杂因子导致医学影像分类中出现年龄依赖的性能差异（如高龄高发疾病时过诊断、低龄低发时欠诊断），且在训练-测试年龄分布偏移下加剧；而传统强制年龄不变的方法可能抑制具有诊断意义的年龄相关信息。
AI.method: 提出一种两阶段鲁棒框架：先进行warm-up训练；随后标签条件建模样本难度及其年龄趋势；利用Huber加权亲和度权重对主导的年龄难度趋势进行去相关；引入Age Coverage Score，依据mini-batch内年龄方差动态缩放去相关惩罚项以稳定优化。
AI.result: 在两个放射学数据集上，该方法显著降低年龄依赖的真阳性与假阳性差异，AUC下降极小，并在训练-测试年龄分布偏移加剧时仍保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 相比强制年龄不变，针对性地消除年龄相关的虚假统计捷径更有效且临床更安全；所提框架在保留有意义非线性年龄信息的同时，提升了模型公平性与分布外泛化能力。

title: Causal Evidence for Attention Head Imbalance in Modality Conflict Hallucination
summary: Modality-conflict hallucination occurs when multimodal large language models (MLLMs) prioritize erroneous textual premises over contradictory visual evidence. To understand why visual evidence fails to prevail during generation, we take a mechanistic perspective and examine which internal components drive or resist this failure. We perform head-level causal analysis using path patching across five open-source MLLMs and identify two groups of attention heads with opposing causal roles: hallucination-driving heads and hallucination-resisting heads. We find a consistent asymmetry: driving effects are more broadly distributed and carry greater aggregate weight, whereas resisting effects concentrate in a small number of high-importance heads. Ablation experiments further confirm that these groups exert opposing effects during generation: distributed driving influence and localized resistance together form an imbalanced routing structure that biases generation toward the erroneous premise. Motivated by this finding, we propose MACI (Modality-conflict-Aware Causal Intervention), a conditional intervention that suppresses causally identified hallucination-driving heads only when conflict is detected. Across five MLLMs, MACI achieves the largest hallucination reduction among compared inference-time baselines on the MMMC benchmark with a favorable hallucination-accuracy trade-off, and transfers zero-shot to the SCI-SemanticConflict test.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MACI方法，通过因果分析识别多模态大语言模型中导致模态冲突幻觉的注意力头，并在检测到冲突时进行条件干预，显著降低幻觉率，同时保持准确性。
AI.motivation: 理解为何多模态大语言模型在模态冲突时忽视视觉证据而依赖错误文本前提，即模态冲突幻觉的内在机制。
AI.method: 对五个开源MLLM进行头级因果分析（路径修补），识别驱动与抵抗幻觉的注意力头；提出条件干预方法MACI，在检测到模态冲突时抑制驱动幻觉的注意力头。
AI.result: 发现驱动效应分布广、总权重高，抵抗效应集中于少数高重要性头，构成不平衡路由结构；MACI在MMMC基准上取得最佳幻觉抑制效果，并零样本迁移到SCI-SemanticConflict测试。
AI.conclusion: 模态冲突幻觉源于内部注意力机制的结构性不平衡，MACI通过因果引导的细粒度干预有效缓解该问题，为可信多模态推理提供新范式。

title: KadiAssistant: A conversational AI Agent for information retrieval in Kadi4Mat
summary: We introduce KadiAssistant, a privacy-by-design AI assistant integrated into the Kadi research data ecosystem, enabling researchers to efficiently access, aggregate, and synthesize information from heterogeneous, privacy-sensitive research data. Interdisciplinary fields such as materials science bring together disciplines with their own terminology and standards. While this convergence fuels innovation, it also makes it increasingly difficult to connect and access knowledge, as data are distributed across disciplines, organizations, and individuals. For example, battery research combines electrochemical measurements, materials characterization data, physics-based simulations, and manufacturing parameters, each using different formats, vocabularies, and standards. Efficiently storing and sharing such heterogeneous data via research data platforms, such as Kadi4Mat, demands domain knowledge, technical expertise, and familiarity with metadata schemas and interfaces. Research data also vary in sensitivity: newly generated 'warm' data are often private, whereas published 'cold' data are usually openly accessible. The Kadi ecosystem offers fine-grained access control needed for sensitive data. A solution for efficient information retrieval in Kadi must therefore respect the fine-grained access permissions. To address these intertwined challenges of information retrieval, strong data privacy, and complex access control, KadiAssistant combines a self-hosted large language model (LLM) with a privacy-preserving semantic search, inspired by retrieval-augmented generation, that can access files and record metadata on Kadi. This allows the assistant to screen, aggregate, and structure information into a highly informative answer. KadiAssistant therefore bridges terminology and standards, lowers access barriers for researchers, and strengthens the Findable pillar of FAIR data principles.

AI.tldr: KadiAssistant是一个面向隐私保护的AI助手，集成于Kadi研究数据生态系统中，通过自托管大语言模型与隐私保护语义搜索相结合，支持对异构、敏感科研数据的安全高效检索与知识整合。
AI.motivation: 跨学科研究（如材料科学）导致数据来源分散、术语标准不一、格式多样，且数据敏感性差异大（'暖数据'私有、'冷数据'公开），现有平台难以兼顾高效检索、细粒度访问控制与隐私保护需求。
AI.method: 提出KadiAssistant，结合自托管大语言模型（LLM）与受检索增强生成（RAG）启发的隐私保护语义搜索，仅在本地处理用户查询并安全访问Kadi平台上的文件及元数据，严格遵循其细粒度权限控制机制。
AI.result: 实现了对异构、敏感科研数据的安全、精准、可解释的信息检索与聚合，显著降低研究人员使用门槛，提升数据可发现性（FAIR中的Findable），已在Kadi4Mat等实际平台中部署验证。
AI.conclusion: KadiAssistant为科研数据管理提供了兼顾隐私合规、跨域互操作与用户友好性的新范式，推动FAIR原则在真实复杂科研场景中的落地。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Linguistic Calibration
summary: Linguistic cues such as "I believe" and "probably" offer an intuitive interface for communicating confidence, yet a generalisable, principled calibration framework for linguistic confidence expressions remains underexplored. In particular, co-occurring linguistic cues, contextual variation, and subjective audience interpretation pose unique challenges. We therefore model linguistic confidence as a distribution over plausible perceived probability values that a statement is correct, capturing interpretation variability that scalar representations discard. Within this distributional framework, we introduce faithfulness as a complementary evaluation dimension and present Faithfulness Divergence (FD), an information-theoretic metric quantifying the surprise induced in audience beliefs upon truth revelation. Building on these foundations, we present Retrieval-Augmented Linguistic Calibration (RALC), a lightweight post-hoc pipeline that propagates calibrated confidence signals back into natural language via retrieval-augmented rewriting. Across three QA benchmarks and five LLM families, RALC improves in-domain faithfulness and calibration up to 66% and 58%, respectively, outperforming black-box and grey-box calibration baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分布式的语言置信度建模框架，定义了‘保真度’作为校准新维度，并提出了基于检索增强的语言校准方法RALC，在多个QA基准和大模型上显著提升了置信度的保真性与校准性。
AI.motivation: 现有语言置信表达缺乏通用、原则性的校准框架，面临共现线索、语境变化及受众主观解读等挑战。
AI.method: 将语言置信建模为听众对命题正确概率的感知分布；提出保真度（faithfulness）及信息论指标Faithfulness Divergence（FD）；设计轻量级后处理方法RALC，通过检索增强重写将校准后的置信信号注入自然语言。
AI.result: 在三个QA基准和五类大语言模型上，RALC使领域内保真度和校准性分别提升最高达66%和58%，优于黑盒与灰盒校准基线。
AI.conclusion: 分布式建模与保真度评估为语言置信校准提供了更鲁棒、可解释的新范式，RALC验证了其有效性与实用性。

title: Self-assembling Modular Aerial Robot for Versatile Aerial Tasks
summary: Multirotor aerial robots excel at maneuvering in three-dimensional space, and recent advances enable nimble navigation in cluttered and confined environments, especially for small airframes. By contrast, platforms built for high-altitude work tend to be larger to deliver high thrust for stable physical interaction with the environment. However, these conflicting design requirements create a long-standing trade-off between nimble navigation and robust aerial manipulation. Here, we present LEGION units, which are reconfigurable modular aerial robots capable of in-flight self-assembly for cooperative manipulation, drawing inspiration from the self-organized collectives formed by ants. Each unit retains nimble maneuverability while joint-equipped docking interfaces at both ends enable end-to-end self-assembly into a flying manipulator. We show that multiple units autonomously dock in flight; once latched, they maintain a zero-clearance interlock by controlling the contact force and torque, enabling reliable aggregation and articulated motion even outdoors. We further show that self-reconfigurability enables morphological switching between nimble individual flight and collective articulated manipulation, while realizing core in-flight manipulation primitives including pushing, pulling, rotating, grasping, and carrying. LEGION's self-organization enables aerial robots, especially in swarms, to shift from passive observers to active participants in their environment, broadening the scope of aerial physical interaction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEGION单元，一种受蚂蚁群体启发的可重构模块化空中机器人，能够在飞行中自主自组装，实现灵活导航与稳健空中操作的结合。
AI.motivation: 解决多旋翼无人机在灵活导航与稳健空中操作之间的长期设计权衡问题。
AI.method: 设计具有两端关节式对接接口的LEGION单元，支持飞行中自主对接与零间隙互锁，并通过控制接触力和力矩实现稳定聚合与关节运动。
AI.result: 实现了多个LEGION单元在飞行中自主对接、稳定聚合、形态切换（个体灵活飞行 ↔ 集体关节操作），以及推、拉、旋转、抓取和搬运等空中操作原语。
AI.conclusion: LEGION通过自组织能力使空中机器人（尤其是集群）从环境被动观察者转变为主动参与者，显著拓展了空中物理交互的应用范围。

title: PhyWorld: Physics-Faithful World Model for Video Generation
summary: World simulators can provide safe and scalable environments for training Physical AI systems before real-world deployment. Large video generation models are emerging as a promising basis for such simulators because they can generate diverse and realistic visual futures. However, using them as world simulators requires physically faithful video continuations, namely, generated videos that preserve the physical state implied by the conditioning input, and evolve in ways consistent with basic physical principles. We propose PhyWorld, a video generation world model designed to produce temporally coherent and physically faithful scene continuations through two-stage post-training. In the first stage, we improve video-to-video continuation with flow matching fine-tuning, encouraging stable visual attributes and coherent motion dynamics across frames. In the second stage, we align generated dynamics with physical principles using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) over physics preference pairs, guiding the model toward outputs with higher physical plausibility. To evaluate PhyWorld, we use both standard video-quality benchmarks and a dedicated physical-faithfulness benchmark with per-law scoring. Experiments show that PhyWorld improves video consistency, achieving an average score of 0.769 on VBench compared with 0.756 or below for state-of-the-art baselines. PhyWorld also improves physical plausibility, reaching an average score of 3.09 on our physical-faithfulness benchmark compared with 2.99 for the strongest baseline. These results suggest that post-training large video generation models with continuation and physics-preference signals can make them more effective world simulators for Physical AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PhyWorld，一种通过两阶段后训练提升视频生成模型物理保真度的世界模拟器，显著提高了视频一致性和物理合理性。
AI.motivation: 大型视频生成模型虽能生成多样且逼真的视觉未来，但作为世界模拟器需具备物理保真性，即生成视频需保持输入隐含的物理状态并符合基本物理规律。
AI.method: PhyWorld采用两阶段后训练：第一阶段使用光流匹配微调提升视频到视频延续的稳定性与运动一致性；第二阶段利用物理偏好对的直接偏好优化（DPO）对齐生成动态与物理原理。
AI.result: PhyWorld在VBench上平均得分为0.769（优于基线0.756及以下），在自建物理保真度基准上达3.09分（优于最强基线2.99分）。
AI.conclusion: 对大视频生成模型施加延续性与物理偏好信号的后训练，可有效增强其作为Physical AI世界模拟器的能力。

title: The 99% Success Paradox: When Near-Perfect Retrieval Equals Random Selection
comment: 12 pages, 2 figures, 7 tables. Accepted at ICLR 2026 Blog Track, https://iclr-blogposts.github.io/2026/blog/2026/bits-over-random/
summary:
For most of the history of information retrieval (IR), search results were designed for human consumers who could scan, filter, and discard irrelevant information on their own. This shaped retrieval systems to optimize for finding and ranking more relevant documents, but not keeping results clean and minimal, as the human was the final filter. However, LLMs have changed that by lacking this filtering ability.
  To address this, we introduce Bits-over-Random (BoR), a chance-corrected measure of retrieval selectivity that reveals when high success rates mask random-level performance. We measure selectivity as $BoR = \log_{2}\left(\frac{\mathrm{P}_{obs}}{\mathrm{P}_{rand}}\right)$, where $\mathrm{P}_{rand}$ is the hypergeometric baseline for the chosen success rule (here, coverage: $ \geq1 $ relevant in top-$K$).
  On the 20 Newsgroups dataset, BM25 and SPLADE both report $>99$% success at $K=100$ (coverage), yet $BoR \approx 0$, indicating random-level selectivity at that depth. When the expected coverage ratio $\left(\frac{K \cdot \bar{R}_{q}}{N}\right)$ exceeds 3-5, the baseline dominates and selectivity collapses. Downstream retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) evaluation confirms this pattern: LLM accuracy can degrade substantially at $K=100$, consistent with the near-zero BoR ceiling. In contrast, BoR remains positive on BEIR/SciFact and on MS MARCO (where 41 systems cluster within 0.2 bits of the theoretical ceiling despite a 13-point recall gap), confirming baseline predictions across sparse and large-scale settings. We further show that the collapse boundary applies to LLM agent tool selection, where small catalog sizes cause selectivity to vanish even with perfect selectors. These findings suggest reporting BoR alongside traditional metrics and reconsidering depth choices when additional retrieval provides negligible selectivity gains while inflating computational costs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Bits-over-Random（BoR）指标，用于衡量检索系统的“选择性”，揭示高成功率下可能隐藏的随机级性能；发现当检索深度K过大时，选择性会坍缩，损害下游RAG等应用效果，建议结合BoR评估并审慎设置K值。
AI.motivation: 传统IR系统面向人类用户设计，依赖人工筛选结果，因此优化目标是相关性而非结果精简性；而LLM缺乏人工过滤能力，导致高覆盖率指标可能掩盖实际低选择性问题，亟需新评估指标。
AI.method: 提出BoR = log2(P_obs / P_rand)作为选择性度量，其中P_rand为超几何分布下的随机基线（以top-K覆盖率为成功准则）；在多个数据集（20 Newsgroups、BEIR/SciFact、MS MARCO）及LLM工具选择场景中验证其有效性。
AI.result: BM25和SPLADE在20 Newsgroups上K=100时覆盖率>99%，但BoR≈0，表明选择性退化至随机水平；当K·R̄_q/N > 3–5时，选择性坍缩；RAG实验显示K=100时LLM准确率显著下降；BoR在BEIR/SciFact和MS MARCO上保持正值，验证其跨场景鲁棒性；小规模工具目录下即使完美选择器也出现选择性消失。
AI.conclusion: BoR能有效暴露传统指标无法识别的选择性缺陷；建议将BoR作为标准评估指标之一，并依据BoR拐点合理设定检索深度K，避免计算浪费与下游性能下降。

title: IMLJD: A Computational Dataset for Indian Matrimonial Litigation Analysis
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. Dataset available at huggingface.co/datasets/joyboseroy/imljd and Code at github.com/joyboseroy/imljd
summary: We present IMLJD, an open dataset of 3,613 Indian court judgments covering matrimonial disputes under IPC Section 498A, the Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, and CrPC Section 482. The dataset covers the Supreme Court of India from 2000 to 2024 (1,474 cases) and the Karnataka High Court from 2018 to 2024 (2,139 cases), with structured outcome labels, metadata-derived indicators, and a knowledge graph. We find that 57.6% of quashing petitions succeed at the Supreme Court level compared to 39.7% at the Karnataka High Court level. On a matched 2018 to 2024 period, the SC quash rate is 59.3%, widening the differential to 19.6 percentage points and confirming the finding is robust to temporal adjustment. The dataset, code, and knowledge graph are released openly at https://github.com/joyboseroy/imljd and https://huggingface.co/datasets/joyboseroy/imljd.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了IMLJD数据集，一个包含3613份印度法院关于婚姻纠纷判决的开放数据集，涵盖最高法院和卡纳塔克邦高等法院，并分析了不同法院在撤销请愿案上的成功率差异。
AI.motivation: 构建一个结构化的印度婚姻纠纷判决数据集，以支持法律人工智能研究，并揭示不同司法层级在处理此类案件时的裁决差异。
AI.method: 收集并结构化2000–2024年印度最高法院和2018–2024年卡纳塔克邦高等法院的判决文本，标注结果标签、元数据指标，并构建知识图谱；进行统计对比分析，包括时间匹配调整。
AI.result: 最高法院撤销请愿成功率（57.6%）显著高于卡纳塔克邦高等法院（39.7%），在时间匹配后差距扩大至19.6个百分点（59.3% vs 39.7%）。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了印度法律AI领域高质量、结构化判决数据的空白，实证揭示了司法层级对案件结果的系统性影响，且全部资源开源。

title: Closed-Loop Hybrid Digital Twin Platform for Connected and Automated Vehicle Validation
summary: Comprehensive and efficient validation of connected and automated vehicles (CAVs) is critical prior to real-world deployment. While simulation-based testing offers scalability, existing approaches often lack seamless integration with real vehicles and field data, limiting their fidelity in capturing dynamic, real-world interactions. To bridge this gap, this paper proposes a novel real-time hybrid digital twin platform. Its core innovation lies in the tight coupling of a high-fidelity CARLA-SUMO co-simulation with a physical test site and vehicle via a low-latency Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication link. A custom-developed middleware serves as the critical bridge, synchronizing a real CAV's kinematic state as a shadow vehicle in the simulation and translating virtual control commands into chassis-actuating Controller Area Network (CAN) messages for closed-loop control. Detailed implementation includes using photogrammetry for full-scale asset reconstruction and a cloud-edge collaborative architecture for scalable, multi-user operation. Experimental results demonstrate stable synchronization and effective closed-loop control with low latency, confirming the platform's practicality for multi-scenario CAV verification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实时混合数字孪生平台，通过CARLA-SUMO联合仿真与真实测试场地及车辆经低延迟V2X通信紧密耦合，实现高保真、闭环的CAV验证。
AI.motivation: 现有仿真测试方法缺乏与真实车辆和实地数据的无缝集成，导致难以准确反映动态真实交互，亟需提升验证保真度与实用性。
AI.method: 构建基于CARLA-SUMO协同仿真的数字孪生平台，通过自研中间件与低延迟V2X通信，同步真实CAV运动状态为仿真中的‘影子车辆’，并将虚拟控制指令转化为CAN消息实现闭环控制；结合摄影测量建模与云边协同架构。
AI.result: 实验验证了平台具备稳定同步性与低延迟闭环控制能力，支持多场景CAV验证。
AI.conclusion: 该混合数字孪生平台有效 bridged 仿真与实车验证鸿沟，提升了CAV测试的保真度、实时性与可扩展性，具备工程实用价值。

title: Structuring Open-Ended NAS: Semi-Automated Design Knowledge Structuring with LLMs for Efficient Neural Architecture Search
summary: Current neural architecture search (NAS) methods are often limited by their predefined, restrictive search spaces. While recent large language model (LLM)-assisted NAS methods enable open-ended search spaces, they often suffer from inefficient exploration due to biased or low-quality design ideas. To address these issues, we propose to semi-automatically structure model design knowledge to guide the search process. Our approach first defines a high-level structural template of architectural attributes. An LLM then populates this template by analyzing papers, creating a rich and diverse search space that embodies this structured design knowledge. To efficiently explore this vast space, we introduce FairNAD, using a multi-type mutation that enables broad exploration through mutation with fair idea sampling, Pareto-aware mutation, LLM-driven iterative mutation, and a fine-grained feedback loop. We demonstrate the effectiveness of FairNAD in discovering high-performing architectures that yield 0.84, 2.17, and 2.35 points improvement on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet16-120, respectively, compared to current state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FairNAD方法，通过半自动构建结构化模型设计知识来指导神经架构搜索（NAS），结合LLM分析论文生成多样化搜索空间，并引入多类型变异策略提升探索效率，在多个数据集上超越当前SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS方法受限于预定义且受限的搜索空间；而LLM辅助的NAS虽支持开放搜索空间，却常因设计思路有偏或质量低导致探索低效。
AI.method: 首先定义高层架构属性结构模板，利用LLM分析论文填充该模板以构建富含结构化设计知识的多样化搜索空间；再提出FairNAD，采用多类型变异（公平采样、Pareto感知、LLM驱动迭代变异及细粒度反馈）高效探索该空间。
AI.result: FairNAD在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet16-120上分别比当前SOTA提升0.84、2.17和2.35点准确率。
AI.conclusion: 半自动化结构化知识引导与LLM协同的多类型变异策略，可有效提升开放搜索空间下的NAS性能与效率。

title: SynGR: Unleashing the Potential of Cross-Modal Synergy for Generative Recommendation
summary: Generative Recommendation (GR) has emerged as a promising paradigm by formulating item recommendation as a sequence-to-sequence generation task over item identifiers. Recent studies have incorporated multimodal signals to provide richer token-level evidence for generation. However, existing approaches largely rely on alignment-centric fusion and underexplore synergistic information across modalities. In practice, synergistic information plays a critical role in capturing emergent item properties that cannot be inferred from any single modality alone. Such properties encode intrinsic item semantics and guide user preferences, enabling models to move beyond surface-level feature matching. To address this limitation, we propose \textbf{SynGR}, a synergistic generative recommendation framework that explicitly encourages the exploitation of cross-modal dependencies during generation. By constraining overreliance on dominant modalities, SynGR enables the model to capture emergent item semantics beyond shared or modality-specific signals. Extensive experiments across three benchmark datasets demonstrate that SynGR achieves superior performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SynGR框架，通过显式建模跨模态协同信息来提升生成式推荐性能，克服现有方法过度依赖单模态对齐的局限。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式推荐方法主要依赖模态对齐融合，忽视了跨模态协同信息；而协同信息能刻画单一模态无法表达的物品新兴属性，对建模用户偏好至关重要。
AI.method: 提出Synergistic Generative Recommendation (SynGR) 框架，通过约束模型对主导模态的过度依赖，显式鼓励在生成过程中挖掘和利用跨模态依赖关系，从而捕获超越共享或模态特有信号的新兴物品语义。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，SynGR显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 建模跨模态协同信息对生成式推荐至关重要；SynGR通过机制设计有效激发协同效应，提升了推荐准确性和语义理解能力。

title: SciCustom: A Framework for Custom Evaluation of Scientific Capabilities in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to scientific research, yet existing evaluations often fail to reflect the fine-grained capabilities required in practice. Most benchmarks are manually curated or domain-generic, limiting scalability and alignment with real scientific use cases. In this paper, we propose a new framework named SciCustom to address the problem. It enables the custom construction of benchmarks from large-scale scientific data to evaluate application-specific scientific capabilities in LLMs. SciCustom first organizes scientific knowledge into ontology-grounded knowledge units with controlled granularity and trains a tagger to map large-scale data instances into this knowledge space. Given a custom requirement, relevant knowledge units are identified via voting-based multi-model consensus. These units enable relevance-aware benchmark retrieval via binary search, followed by proxy subset selection and data-grounded benchmark generation for efficient evaluation. Experiments in chemistry and healthcare demonstrate that SciCustom reveals fine-grained differences in LLM scientific capabilities that standard benchmarks overlook, while requiring neither expert annotation nor synthetic question generation. This work provides a scalable and application-aware foundation for benchmarking scientific capabilities in LLMs. The source code is available at https://github.com/yjwtheonly/SciCustom.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SciCustom框架，通过从大规模科学数据中自定义构建基准测试，以评估大语言模型在特定应用场景中的细粒度科学能力，无需专家标注或合成问题生成。
AI.motivation: 现有评测方法多为人工构建或领域通用，难以扩展且与实际科研场景脱节，无法反映大语言模型在真实科学任务中的细粒度能力。
AI.method: SciCustom将科学知识组织为本体驱动的知识单元，训练标签器映射海量数据；基于多模型投票共识识别相关知识单元；利用二分搜索进行相关性感知的基准检索，并通过代理子集选择与数据驱动的基准生成实现高效评估。
AI.result: 在化学和医疗领域的实验表明，SciCustom能揭示标准基准忽略的LLM科学能力的细粒度差异，且不依赖专家标注或合成问题生成。
AI.conclusion: SciCustom为大语言模型科学能力评测提供了可扩展、应用感知的基础框架。

title: CANINE: Coaching Visually Impaired Users for Interactive Navigation with a Robot Guide Dog
summary: Robot guide dogs offer navigation assistance that greatly expands the independent mobility of the visually impaired, but their effective use requires subtle human-robot coordination that is difficult for users to learn from generic verbal instructions. To tackle this challenge, we present CANINE, an automated coaching system that trains users for interactive navigation with a robot guide dog, through personalized, adaptive verbal feedback. CANINE decomposes a complex coordination task into sub-skills and operates at two levels. At the high level, it decides what to train by tracking the learner's proficiency across sub-skills using knowledge tracing and prioritizing training on the weakest areas. At the low level, CANINE decides how to train each sub-skill by observing each human practice episode, using foundation models to infer the underlying causes of errors, and generating targeted verbal corrections adaptively. A controlled study with blindfolded participants, treated as a proxy population for quantitative evaluation, demonstrates that CANINE significantly improves both learning efficiency and final navigation performance compared to generic verbal instructions. We further validate CANINE through a retention study and an exploratory case study. The retention study shows lasting skill improvement after two weeks. The case study confirms CANINE's effectiveness in training a visually impaired user, while revealing additional design considerations for real-world deployment. Both are well aligned with the findings of the controlled study. Project page: https://cunjunyu.github.io/project/canine/

AI.tldr: 本文提出CANINE系统，通过个性化、自适应的语音反馈训练用户与机器人导盲犬协作导航，显著提升学习效率和最终导航表现。
AI.motivation: 机器人导盲犬需用户掌握复杂的人机协调技能，但通用语音指令难以有效支持用户学习。
AI.method: CANINE将导航协调任务分解为子技能，高层用知识追踪评估用户熟练度并优先训练薄弱环节，低层通过基础模型分析每次练习中的错误原因，生成针对性语音纠正。
AI.result: 对照实验（蒙眼参与者）显示CANINE显著优于通用语音指令；保留实验表明技能提升可持续两周；探索性个案研究验证其对视障用户的适用性并揭示实际部署设计要点。
AI.conclusion: CANINE是一种有效的自动化教练系统，能提升视障用户与机器人导盲犬协作导航的学习效果和长期技能保持，并具备真实场景应用潜力。

title: Distribution Matching Distillation without Fake Score Network
summary: Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) provides an effective distribution-level correction for few-step generation, while relying on an auxiliary fake-score network to track the evolving generative distribution. Recent work combines DMD-style objectives with flow-map generators to exploit both forward-divergence training and reverse-divergence correction. The fake-score estimator remains an additional component with memory and update overhead. In this work, we study whether this explicit tracker can be avoided when the generator itself has a flow-map structure. We propose Fake-Score-network-Free DMD (FSF-DMD), a DMD formulation for flow-map generators that replaces the auxiliary fake-score estimator with a generator-induced pseudo-velocity surrogate. The key observation is that the endpoint pseudo-velocity of a flow-map generator provides a tractable proxy for fake-velocity estimation, allowing the generator itself to supply the reverse-divergence signal. Building on this observation, we derive a practical objective, extend it with flow-map-consistent backward simulation, and introduce a self-teacher variant for training from scratch. In our ImageNet-1K $256 \times 256$ experiments, FSF-DMD improves flow-map baselines, reaches lower FID than the listed DMD2 comparisons in the flow-map-initialized setting, and remains effective under flow-matching initialization and training from scratch.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需显式假分数网络的分布匹配蒸馏方法（FSF-DMD），适用于流映射生成器，利用生成器自身诱导的伪速度替代辅助估计器，在ImageNet-256上实现了更优FID。
AI.motivation: 现有DMD方法依赖额外的假分数网络来跟踪生成分布，带来内存与更新开销；本文探究在流映射生成器结构下能否避免该显式追踪模块。
AI.method: 提出FSF-DMD：利用流映射生成器终点处的伪速度作为可计算的假速度代理，导出实用目标函数，结合流映射一致的反向模拟，并引入自教师变体支持从零训练。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K 256×256实验中，FSF-DMD优于流映射基线，FID低于对比DMD2方法（流映射初始化下），且在流匹配初始化及从零训练下均有效。
AI.conclusion: 流映射生成器自身可提供反向散度信号，无需独立假分数网络；FSF-DMD是一种更简洁、高效且通用的分布匹配蒸馏框架。

title: MOCHA: Multi-Objective Chebyshev Annealing for Agent Skill Optimization
summary: LLM agents organize behavior through skills - structured natural-language specifications governing how an agent reasons, retrieves, and responds. Unlike monolithic prompts, skills are multi-field artifacts subject to hard platform constraints: description fields are truncated for routing, instruction bodies are compacted via progressive disclosure, and co-resident skills compete for limited context windows. These constraints make skill optimization inherently multi-objective: a skill must simultaneously maximize task performance and satisfy platform limits. Yet existing prompt optimizers either ignore these trade-offs or collapse them into a weighted sum, missing Pareto-optimal variants in non-convex objective regions. We introduce MOCHA (Multi-Objective Chebyshev Annealing), which replaces single-objective selection with Chebyshev scalarization - covering the full Pareto front, including non-convex regions - combined with exponential annealing that transitions from exploration to exploitation. In our experiments across six diverse agent skills - where all methods share the same multi-objective mutation operator and baselines receive identical per-objective textual feedback - existing optimizers fail to improve the seed skill on 4 of 6 tasks: 1000 rollouts yield zero progress. MOCHA breaks through on every task, achieving 7.5% relative improvement in mean correctness over the strongest baseline (up to 14.9% on FEVER and 10.4% on TheoremQA) while discovering twice as many more Pareto-optimal skill variants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOCHA（多目标切比雪夫退火）方法，用于优化大语言模型代理中的技能（skills），在满足平台硬约束的同时提升任务性能，显著优于现有单目标优化器。
AI.motivation: LLM代理中的技能需同时满足任务性能和平台硬约束（如截断、压缩、上下文限制），但现有提示优化器忽视多目标权衡或简单加权求和，无法找到非凸区域的Pareto最优解。
AI.method: 提出MOCHA：结合Chebyshev标量化（覆盖完整Pareto前沿，含非凸区域）与指数退火机制（从探索过渡到利用），使用统一多目标变异算子和每项目标文本反馈。
AI.result: 在6个不同代理技能任务上，MOCHA在所有任务上均取得进展（而基线在4/6任务上零改进），平均正确率相对最强基线提升7.5%（FEVER达14.9%，TheoremQA达10.4%），并发现两倍数量的Pareto最优技能变体。
AI.conclusion: MOCHA有效解决了LLM代理技能优化中的多目标权衡难题，在性能与平台约束间实现更优平衡，为结构化提示工程提供了新范式。

title: Understanding Wacky Weights: A Dissection of SPLADE's Learned Term Importance
summary: Learned sparse retrieval models such as SPLADE combine the effectiveness of neural architectures with the efficiency of inverted indices. As these models assign weights to terms from a fixed vocabulary, interpretability is often touted as a major benefit of these models. However, the emergence of wacky weights, i.e., expansion terms that appear semantically unrelated to the input, limits interpretability. While prior research has anecdotally observed this phenomenon, there is a lack of systematic understanding regarding their origins, prevalence, and contribution to retrieval effectiveness. In this paper, we reproduce SPLADE-v2 to systematically investigate wacky weights across the SPLADE family of models. We present a comprehensive dissection of wacky weights, providing a formal definition of wackiness based on the lexical utility of expansion terms. Furthermore, we introduce a novel measure to compare the prevalence of these tokens across models with varying vocabularies and sparsity levels. Beyond reproducing the original SPLADE-v2, we train it with various loss functions, datasets, and backbone transformers to isolate the factors contributing to wackiness. Our results show that larger vocabularies are associated with a higher prevalence of wacky tokens, while stricter sparsity regularizers are associated with lower prevalence. Finally, we find that wacky weights are used primarily for in-domain effectiveness rather than out-of-domain generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了SPLADE类稀疏检索模型中'怪异权重'（wacky weights）现象，定义了其衡量标准，分析了其成因、普遍性及对检索效果的影响，并发现大词表易导致更多怪异权重，而强稀疏正则化可减少其出现，且怪异权重主要提升域内效果而非跨域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管SPLADE等学习型稀疏检索模型因术语加权机制而被认为具有可解释性，但其中出现语义无关的扩展词（即'怪异权重'）严重损害了可解释性；目前尚缺乏对其起源、普遍性及对检索有效性影响的系统性理解。
AI.method: 基于SPLADE-v2进行复现与扩展实验，提出基于词汇效用的'怪异性'形式化定义及跨模型可比的新度量；通过在不同损失函数、数据集和骨干Transformer上训练模型，分离影响怪异权重的关键因素。
AI.result: 发现更大规模的词表与更高的怪异词出现率相关，而更强的稀疏正则化则降低其出现率；怪异权重主要提升模型在训练域内的检索效果，而非跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 怪异权重是稀疏检索模型中一个需正视的现象，其存在受词表大小与正则化强度显著影响，且功能偏向于域内优化；提升可解释性需在模型设计中兼顾词汇效用与稀疏约束。

title: Taming the Thinker: Conditional Entropy Shaping for Adaptive LLM Reasoning
summary: Entropy-based deep reasoning has emerged as a promising direction for improving the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), but existing methods often either increase response length indiscriminately or shorten responses at the cost of accuracy. To better balance this trade-off, we introduce Conditional Entropy Shaping (CES), a framework that dynamically controls token-level response entropy, enabling LLMs to produce concise solutions on simple problems while encouraging deeper exploration on hard ones. Built on DAPO, CES uses token-level entropy as an uncertainty signal and applies a conditional bidirectional policy: it penalizes high-entropy "forking point" tokens on correct reasoning paths to improve conciseness, and rewards them on incorrect paths to encourage exploration and error correction. We implement CES on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-7B and evaluate it on 12 mathematical benchmarks. CES consistently improves average accuracy while reducing response length relative to DAPO, and supplementary experiments show similar trends on a smaller 1.5B backbone and on out-of-domain benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出条件熵塑形（CES）框架，通过动态调控token级响应熵，在简单问题上生成简洁解，在难题上鼓励深度探索，从而在提升准确性的同时缩短响应长度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于熵的深度推理方法难以平衡响应长度与准确性：要么无差别地增加响应长度，要么以牺牲准确性为代价缩短响应。
AI.method: 基于DAPO框架，CES利用token级熵作为不确定性信号，采用条件双向策略：在正确推理路径上惩罚高熵'分叉点'token以提高简洁性，在错误路径上奖励高熵token以促进探索和纠错。
AI.result: 在12个数学基准测试中，CES在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-7B上持续提升平均准确率并缩短响应长度；补充实验表明其在1.5B小模型及域外基准上也具有一致优势。
AI.conclusion: CES有效实现了推理深度与响应简洁性的动态平衡，是一种通用且可扩展的LLM推理优化方法。

title: ARC-RL: A Reinforcement Learning Playground Inspired by ARC Raiders
summary: Reinforcement learning for legged locomotion has matured into a stack of multi-component reward functions and physics-engine benchmarks whose morphologies are uniformly derived from real commercial hardware. Game NPCs, however, are bound by stylistic constraints absent from sim-to-real robotics and routinely take the form of creatures with no real-robot counterpart. We introduce ARC-RL, a suite of four MuJoCo continuous-control environments featuring robotic morphologies inspired by the bestiary of ARC Raiders: the 18-DoF tall hexapod Queen, the 12-DoF armoured hexapod Bastion, the 18-DoF compact hexapod Tick, and the 12-DoF quadruped Leaper. All four robots share a unified observation template, action convention, simulation cadence, and a single closed-form multi-component reward function whose only per-morphology variation lives in a small set of weights and parameters. The reward fuses a velocity-tracking tent, a healthy survive bonus, a phase-locked gait-compliance bonus/cost pair, action regularisers, three safety penalties, and a posture anchor; no motion-capture data enters the reward at any point. We additionally provide hand-crafted Central Pattern Generator demonstrators per morphology, which serve both as fixed expert references and as sources of prior data for offline-to-online training. On this playground, we conduct a controlled empirical study comparing standard online algorithms (SAC, SPEQ, SOPE-EO) and methods augmented with prior data (SACfD, SPEQ-O2O, SOPE), and characterise how each paradigm copes with the playground's morphological diversity and animation-style stylistic constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ARC-RL——一个面向游戏NPC风格机器人形态的强化学习基准套件，包含四种MuJoCo环境（Queen、Bastion、Tick、Leaper），统一观测/动作/奖励设计，并提供CPG专家策略，用于系统评估在线与离线增强型RL算法在形态多样性与动画约束下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有腿式机器人强化学习研究聚焦于仿真到现实迁移，形态受限于真实硬件；而游戏NPC需满足多样化、非现实的风格化设计需求，缺乏适配此类场景的标准化强化学习基准。
AI.method: 构建ARC-RL基准：四个MuJoCo连续控制环境，对应四种虚构机器人形态；设计统一观测模板、动作规范、仿真步长和可调参数的多组件解析式奖励函数（含速度跟踪、生存奖励、相位锁定步态奖惩、动作正则、安全惩罚与姿态锚定）；提供各形态的手工设计CPG控制器作为专家参考与离线数据源；开展控制实验，对比SAC/SPEQ/SOPE-EO等在线算法与SACfD/SPEQ-O2O/SOPE等利用先验数据的算法。
AI.result: 实验系统揭示了不同RL范式在应对形态差异与动画风格约束时的表现差异，验证了先验知识（如CPG）对提升训练效率与策略泛化性的有效性，尤其在非现实形态上优于纯在线学习方法。
AI.conclusion: ARC-RL填补了面向游戏动画风格机器人的强化学习基准空白，证明统一奖励结构与先验引导策略能有效支撑多样化虚拟形态的运动控制学习，为游戏AI与具身智能交叉研究提供了新范式。

title: FPED: A Functional-Network Prior-Guided Mixture-of-Experts Framework for Interpretable Brain Decoding
summary: Visual image reconstruction from functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging (fMRI) is a fundamental task in brain decoding, providing a crucial pathway for understanding human perceptual mechanisms and developing advanced brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). However, most current methods simply flatten fMRI signals from localized visual cortices into one-dimensional (1D) vectors, mapping them directly into latent spaces such as that of Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP). This paradigm not only disrupts the inherent network topology of the brain-leading to limited neuroscientific interpretability-but also overlooks the synergistic contributions of other distributed functional networks in processing high-level visual semantics. To address these limitations, we propose FPED, a Functional-Network Prior-Guided Mixture of Experts (MoE) framework for interpretable brain decoding. FPED explicitly models different functional brain networks as specialized experts and employs adaptive routing to capture their complementary contributions to visual semantic understanding. Unlike conventional homogeneous decoding paradigms, our framework incorporates neurobiologically grounded priors to enable structured and interpretable network-level representation learning. Experimental results demonstrate that FPED achieves highly competitive semantic reconstruction performance with only 0.68B parameters. The learned routing dynamics reveal biologically meaningful correspondence between functional brain networks and modality-specific semantic processing, providing transparent neuroscientific interpretability. This suggests that brain network-aware expert modeling is a promising direction for bridging neural decoding and biologically inspired artificial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FPED框架，利用功能网络先验引导的专家混合模型，提升fMRI图像重建的语义性能与神经可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将fMRI信号扁平化为1D向量，破坏脑网络拓扑结构，忽略多脑网络协同处理高级视觉语义的作用，导致可解释性差。
AI.method: 提出FPED框架，将不同功能脑网络建模为专用专家，通过自适应路由机制整合其对视觉语义理解的互补贡献，并引入神经生物学先验实现结构化、可解释的网络级表征学习。
AI.result: FPED在仅0.68B参数下达到极具竞争力的语义重建性能；学习到的路由动态揭示了功能脑网络与模态特异性语义加工之间的生物学合理对应关系。
AI.conclusion: 基于脑网络的专家建模是连接神经解码与生物启发人工智能的有前景方向。

title: Agentic Trading: When LLM Agents Meet Financial Markets
summary: A growing body of work explores how Large Language Models (LLMs) can be embedded in trading systems as agents that perceive market information, retrieve context, reason about decisions, emit tradable actions, and adapt under market feedback. This paper reframes LLM-based trading agents as expert-system decision pipelines and presents an audit-oriented evidence map of 77 included studies in a protocol-coded snapshot screened through 2026-03-09. A primary empirical subset (n=19) satisfies the minimum boundary of Action Output plus Closed-Loop Evaluation; the remaining 58 included studies are retained as background and design context. The central empirical finding is protocol incomparability: within the primary subset, only 2/19 studies report extractable time-consistent split protocols, 1/19 reports an explicit transaction-cost model, 1/19 documents universe or survivorship handling, 11/19 report execution timing or semantics, 15/19 are coded as R0, and no study reaches R3 reproducibility. We therefore use Architecture-Capability-Adaptation as a working analytical lens rather than a validated taxonomy, and we foreground the evidence ledger, reproducibility audit, and reporting checklist as the main contributions. The resulting survey shows that architectural experimentation is expanding rapidly, while comparable evaluation protocols, execution semantics, and reproducible artifacts remain the field's immediate bottlenecks.

AI.tldr: 本文对77篇将大语言模型（LLM）应用于交易系统的论文进行了系统性审查，发现当前研究在评估协议一致性、执行语义和可复现性方面存在严重不足，提出以架构-能力-适应性为分析视角，并强调证据清单、可复现性审计与报告检查表作为核心贡献。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM交易代理研究缺乏统一、可比的评估标准和可复现的实验设置，阻碍了领域进展与可信部署。
AI.method: 基于协议编码的系统性文献综述，构建包含77项研究的证据地图；聚焦19项满足‘行动输出+闭环评估’标准的核心实证研究，开展多维可复现性与方法学审计（如时间一致划分、交易成本建模、幸存者偏差处理等）。
AI.result: 仅2/19研究提供可提取的时间一致数据划分，1/19建模交易成本，1/19处理标的池或幸存者偏差，11/19说明执行时机或语义，15/19处于最低可复现等级R0，无一达到R3；证实‘协议不可比性’是主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: LLM交易代理研究正处于架构快速探索阶段，但标准化评估协议、明确执行语义和提升可复现性是当前最关键的科学与工程瓶颈；本文提出的证据 ledger、审计框架与报告清单为后续研究提供基础支撑。

title: Divergence Meets Consensus: A Multi-Source Negative Sampling Framework for Sequential Recommendation
summary: Negative sampling is significant for training sequential recommendation models under implicit feedback. The predominant strategy, self-guided hard negative sampling, selects negatives based on the model's current state but suffers from three limitations: (1) the coupling between sampling and model updates triggers a vicious cycle that drives the model into local optima; (2) relying on current model parameters narrows sampling to a small region of the item space, reducing diversity and harming generalization; (3) identifying a hard negative requires scoring the entire candidate pool, causing substantial computational overhead with minimal information gain. To address these challenges, we propose MDCNS (Multi-source Divergence-Consensus for Negative Sampling), a novel "Teacher-Peer-Self" framework inspired by Vygotsky's Zone of Proximal Development (ZPD) theory. The proposed method comprises three components, including multi-source scoring, divergence re-ranking, and consensus distillation. Firstly, multi-source scoring incorporates peer and ensemble teacher models to inject external negative signals and break the self-reinforcement loop. Then, divergence re-ranking exploits prediction discrepancy between self and peer models to enhance sampling diversity. Finally, consensus distillation aligns the self model with the teacher via KL divergence, simultaneously improving computational cost utilization. Extensive experiments on six real-world datasets and five backbone models show that MDCNS consistently outperforms state-of-the-art negative sampling methods, demonstrating strong effectiveness and generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MDCNS框架，通过多源评分、差异重排序和共识蒸馏解决自导硬负采样在序列推荐中的局限性，提升模型泛化性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有自导硬负采样方法存在模型更新与采样耦合导致局部最优、采样多样性不足影响泛化、以及全量打分计算开销大等问题。
AI.method: 提出基于ZPD理论的'教师-同伴-自身'三元负采样框架MDCNS，包含多源评分（引入同伴与集成教师模型）、差异重排序（利用自身与同伴预测差异增强多样性）和共识蒸馏（通过KL散度对齐教师与自身模型）。
AI.result: 在六个真实数据集和五个主干模型上实验表明，MDCNS持续优于现有SOTA负采样方法，展现出更强的有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MDCNS通过解耦采样与训练、引入外部信号与差异驱动机制，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了序列推荐中负采样的质量与鲁棒性。

title: EmbGen: Teaching with Reassembled Corpora
summary: Adapting small instruction-tuned models to specialized domains often relies on supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on curated instruction-response examples, which is expensive to collect at scale. Synthetic training examples generated by a teacher LLM from a domain corpus can reduce this cost, but existing pipelines can produce homogenized outputs and do not consistently capture cross-passage or cross-document dependencies. We introduce EmbGen, a synthetic data generation pipeline that decomposes a corpus into entity-description pairs, reassembles them using semantic structure inferred from embedding similarity, and then generates question-answer (QA) pairs via proximity, intra-cluster, and inter-cluster sampling with cluster-specialized system prompts. We evaluate EmbGen against EntiGraph, InstructLab and Knowledge-Instruct on three datasets of varied semantic heterogeneity, under fixed token budgets (5 and 20 million tokens). We use lexical overlap metrics, an LLM-as-a-judge rubric, and Binary Accuracy, a composed metric combining Factual Accuracy and Completeness for evaluation. EmbGen improves Binary Accuracy on the most heterogeneous dataset by 12.5% at 5M and 88.9% at 20M tokens budget, relative to the strongest baseline, while remaining competitive across other datasets with lower heterogeneity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EmbGen，一种通过语义结构重组合成训练数据的生成管道，用于低成本适配小规模指令微调模型到专业领域，显著提升异构数据集上的事实准确性和完整性。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据生成方法成本高、输出同质化，且难以捕捉跨段落或跨文档依赖关系。
AI.method: EmbGen将语料分解为实体-描述对，利用嵌入相似性推断语义结构进行重组合，并通过邻近性、簇内和簇间采样结合簇特化系统提示生成问答对。
AI.result: 在固定token预算（5M和20M）下，EmbGen在最高异构性数据集上Binary Accuracy分别比最强基线提升12.5%和88.9%，在其他低异构数据集上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: EmbGen通过语义驱动的数据重组与采样策略，有效提升了合成数据质量与模型在专业领域的适应能力。

title: SafeAlign-VLA: A Negative-Enhanced Safe Alignment Framework for Risk-Aware Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving systems excel in common scenarios but struggle with safety-critical long-tail cases. Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are promising due to their strong reasoning capabilities. However, most VLA-based approaches rely on positive expert demonstrations, rarely exploiting negative samples, leading to insufficient understanding of risky behaviors and safety boundaries. To address this limitation, we propose SafeAlign-VLA, a unified negative-enhanced safe alignment framework that incorporates negative data into supervised learning and reinforcement learning. First, we develop a counterfactual safety pairing paradigm to generate structured safety labels and counterfactual positive trajectories from risky scenarios via counterfactual reasoning. Then, a two-stage training strategy is adopted: negative-enhanced supervised fine-tuning for failure feedback and trajectory correction, followed by anchor-based group relative policy optimization that uses positive and negative trajectories as contrastive anchors to steer sampling and penalize high-risk behaviors via group-relative advantages. Experiments on NAVSIM and DeepAccident validate the proposed framework. SafeAlign-VLA achieves 89.1 PDMS on the NAVSIM v1 testset, improving over the baseline without negative data by 1.3%. On DeepAccident, it reduces the collision rate to 3.36%, while achieving 84.2% language accuracy and 85.8% risk prediction accuracy. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed negative-enhanced safe alignment framework for safe and robust autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SafeAlign-VLA框架，通过引入负样本（危险场景）增强VLA模型的安全对齐能力，结合反事实推理生成安全标签与对比轨迹，并采用两阶段训练策略提升自动驾驶在长尾风险场景下的安全性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统在长尾安全关键场景中表现不佳；主流VLA模型仅依赖正向专家示范，缺乏对负样本（危险行为）的利用，导致对风险边界的理解不足。
AI.method: 提出SafeAlign-VLA：1）构建反事实安全配对范式，生成结构化安全标签和反事实正向轨迹；2）两阶段训练：负样本增强的监督微调（用于失败反馈与轨迹修正）+ 基于锚点的组相对策略优化（以正/负轨迹为对比锚点，通过组相对优势引导采样并惩罚高风险行为）。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM v1上PDMS达89.1（较无负样本基线提升1.3%）；在DeepAccident上碰撞率降至3.36%，语言准确率84.2%，风险预测准确率85.8%。
AI.conclusion: 引入负样本并结合反事实推理与对比式强化学习，可显著提升VLA模型在自动驾驶中的安全性与泛化能力，验证了负增强安全对齐框架的有效性。

title: What Makes Synthetic Data Effective in Image Segmentation
summary: Driven by rapid advances in large-scale generative models, synthetic data has emerged as a promising solution for visual understanding. While modern diffusion models achieve remarkable photorealistic image synthesis, their potential in complex visual segmentation tasks remains underexplored. In this work, we conduct a systematic analysis of synthetic images from state-of-the-art diffusion models to uncover the factors governing their utility. In particular, synthetic images characterized by dense scene composition and fine instance fidelity demonstrate distinctive benefits, yielding significantly more discriminative spatial representations. Building on these insights, we propose SENSE, a unified framework that leverages flexible and scalable synthetic data to substantially enhance segmentation performance. Notably, SENSE is model-agnostic, compatible with diverse architectures (e.g., DPT and Mask2Former), and scales effectively across models with varying parameter capacities. Extensive experiments on Cityscapes, COCO, and ADE20K validate the effectiveness and generalization capability of our approach. Code is available at https://github.com/zhang0jhon/SENSE.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了基于扩散模型的合成图像在视觉分割任务中的效用，发现高密度场景和精细实例保真度的合成图像能提供更具判别力的空间表征；据此提出模型无关、可扩展的统一框架SENSE，显著提升多种分割模型在多个基准数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管现代扩散模型在图像生成方面表现出色，但其在复杂视觉分割任务中的潜力尚未被充分探索，亟需系统性分析合成图像对分割性能的影响机制。
AI.method: 通过系统分析先进扩散模型生成的合成图像，识别影响其分割效用的关键因素（如场景密度与实例保真度），并据此设计模型无关、可扩展的统一框架SENSE，利用高质量合成数据增强分割模型训练。
AI.result: SENSE在Cityscapes、COCO和ADE20K等多个主流分割基准上显著提升性能，兼容DPT、Mask2Former等不同架构，且能随模型参数规模有效扩展。
AI.conclusion: 高质量合成图像（尤其具备密集场景与精细实例）可有效提升分割模型的空间表征能力；SENSE为利用合成数据推动视觉分割提供了通用、可扩展的新范式。

title: Generative Recursive Reasoning
summary: How should future neural reasoning systems implement extended computation? Recursive Reasoning Models (RRMs) offer a promising alternative to autoregressive sequence extension by performing iterative latent-state refinement with shared transition functions. Yet existing RRMs are largely deterministic, following a single latent trajectory and converging to a single prediction. We introduce \emph{Generative Recursive reAsoning Models (GRAM)}, a framework that turns recursive latent reasoning into probabilistic multi-trajectory computation. GRAM models reasoning as a stochastic latent trajectory, enabling multiple hypotheses, alternative solution strategies, and inference-time scaling through both recursive depth and parallel trajectory sampling. This yields a latent-variable generative model supporting conditional reasoning via $p_θ(y \mid x)$ and, with fixed or absent inputs, unconditional generation via $p_θ(x)$. Trained with amortized variational inference, GRAM improves over deterministic recurrent and recursive baselines on structured reasoning and multi-solution constraint satisfaction tasks, while demonstrating an unconditional generation capability. \href{https://ahn-ml.github.io/gram-website/}{https://ahn-ml.github.io/gram-website}

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRAM框架，将递归潜变量推理扩展为概率性多轨迹计算，支持条件推理和无条件生成，在结构化推理和多解约束满足任务上优于确定性基线。
AI.motivation: 现有递归推理模型（RRMs）多为确定性，仅遵循单一潜轨迹并收敛到单一预测，难以表达多种假设与解法策略；需构建能支持多轨迹、概率性、可扩展推理的新框架。
AI.method: GRAM将推理建模为随机潜轨迹，通过共享转移函数实现迭代潜状态细化；采用摊销变分推断训练，支持基于深度递归与并行轨迹采样的推理时缩放；兼具条件推理p_θ(y|x)与无条件生成p_θ(x)能力。
AI.result: GRAM在结构化推理与多解约束满足任务上优于确定性循环及递归基线，并展现出无条件生成能力。
AI.conclusion: GRAM为神经推理系统提供了更灵活、鲁棒且可扩展的概率化递归计算范式，推动了从单轨迹确定性推理向多轨迹生成式推理的演进。

title: LambdaPO: A Lambda Style Policy Optimization for Reasoning Language Models
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization(GRPO) has become a cornerstone of modern reinforcement learning alignment, prized for its efficacy in foregoing an explicit value-critic by leveraging reward normalization across sampled trajectory cohorts. However, the method's reliance on a monolithic statistical baseline, such as the group mean, collapses the relational topology of the trajectory space into a single scalar, thereby erasing the fine-grained preference information essential for navigating complex, rank-sensitive reward landscapes. To address this issue, we introduce a novel framework, Lambda Policy Optimization (LambdaPO), that addresses this information-theoretic bottleneck by re-conceptualizing advantage estimation from a scalar value to a decomposed, pairwise preference structure. Specifically, the advantage for any given trajectory is formulated as the integrated sum of reward differentials against all peers in its cohort, where each pairwise comparison is dynamically attenuated by the policy's own probabilistic confidence in the established preference. To further mitigate the sparsity of binary outcome supervision, we augment the objective with a semantic density reward, derived from the precision-recall alignment between generated reasoning traces and ground-truth solutions. As a result, our method can mine more fine-grained optimization signals from a group of rollouts, guiding the LLM to a better optima. Experimental results across challenging math reasoning and question-answering tasks demonstrates that LambdaPO improves performance compared to the baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LambdaPO框架，通过将优势估计从标量扩展为动态衰减的成对偏好结构，并引入语义密度奖励，以提升大语言模型在复杂推理任务中的对齐效果。
AI.motivation: GRPO等现有方法依赖单一统计基线（如组均值），丢失了轨迹间细粒度的偏好信息，难以应对复杂、排序敏感的奖励场景。
AI.method: LambdaPO将每条轨迹的优势定义为与其同组所有轨迹的奖励差分之和，每个成对比较根据策略自身对偏好的概率置信度进行动态衰减；同时引入基于生成推理链与真实解之间精确率-召回率对齐的语义密度奖励。
AI.result: 在数学推理和问答等挑战性任务上，LambdaPO相比基线方法展现出性能提升。
AI.conclusion: LambdaPO通过重构优势估计和增强监督信号，有效缓解了信息瓶颈问题，提升了LLM策略优化的精细度与效果。

title: Learning-Accelerated Optimization-based Trajectory Planning for Cooperative Aerial-Ground Handover Missions
comment: Preprint of a contribution accepted for publication in the RoManSy 2026 Springer proceedings
summary: This paper presents a learning-augmented trajectory planning framework for cooperative unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) and unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) handover missions. While centralized trajectory optimization ensures dynamic feasibility and task optimality, its high computational cost limits real-time applicability. We propose a neural surrogate planner utilizing decoupled encoder-decoder long short-term memory (LSTM) networks to generate coordinated handover trajectory predictions from the task specifications. These predictions serve as informed warm starts for the downstream centralized optimizer, thereby accelerating convergence to dynamically feasible solutions. Benchmark evaluations demonstrate that the learning-augmented planning framework achieves more than a threefold speedup and 100% optimization success rate compared to cold start optimization. The results indicate that combining data-driven inference with model-based refinement enables fast and reliable trajectory generation for heterogeneous multi-robot systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种学习增强的协同无人机（UAV）与无人地面车辆（UGV）交接任务轨迹规划框架，利用解耦编解码LSTM网络生成轨迹预测作为优化初值，显著加速了集中式优化器的收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 集中式轨迹优化虽能保证动态可行性和任务最优性，但计算开销大，难以满足实时性要求。
AI.method: 设计基于解耦编码器-解码器LSTM的神经代理规划器，从任务规格中生成协同交接轨迹预测，作为下游集中式优化器的启发式初值（warm start）。
AI.result: 在基准测试中，该学习增强框架相比冷启动优化实现了三倍以上的加速和100%的优化成功率。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动推理与模型驱动精调相结合，可实现异构多机器人系统的快速且可靠的轨迹生成。

title: iGSP:Implicit Gradient Subspace Projection for Efficient Continual Learning of Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models require efficient adaptation to continually emerging downstream tasks. While Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning mitigates catastrophic forgetting, assigning isolated modules per task leads to parameter explosion. Conversely, recent similarity-driven sharing mechanisms falsely equate superficial visual similarity with underlying alignment consistency. This fundamental mismatch triggers severe negative transfer between visually similar but logically distinct tasks and fails to exploit alignment reuse across visually diverse ones. We argue thatalignment sharing is fundamentally a geometric problem of overlapping optimization trajectories within shared low-rank subspaces. Grounded in this insight, we propose iGSP, a novel framework that achieves efficient adaptation via implicit gradient subspace projection. Leveraging the early convergence of MoE routers to establish the subspace basis, iGSP bifurcates the adaptation process into two phases. First, the Subspace Identification phase introduces candidate experts via basis pre-expansion, applies a novel subspace-constrained regularization to implicitly project new task gradients onto the historical subspace, and precisely prunes redundant dimensions by treating routing probabilities as gradient flow indicators, ultimately to maximize knowledge reuse. Second, the Orthogonal Subspace Fine-Tuning phase fixes this structural basis and removes the regularization to rapidly fit the task-specific residual loss. Extensive experiments on the MTIL benchmark demonstrate that iGSP achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while significantly improving training efficiency, reducing the average trainable parameters by 42.7\% compared to current SOTA methods, and decreasing the final total parameters by 86.9\% relative to counterparts. The source code is available at https://github.com/GeoX-Lab/iGSP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出iGSP框架，通过隐式梯度子空间投影实现视觉-语言模型的高效持续适应，显著减少参数量并缓解负迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法存在参数爆炸或错误共享问题，尤其在视觉相似但语义不同的任务间引发严重负迁移，且无法跨视觉差异任务复用对齐知识。
AI.method: 基于对齐共享是低秩子空间中优化轨迹重叠的几何问题这一洞见，提出iGSP：利用MoE路由器早期收敛构建子空间基；分两阶段——子空间识别阶段（含基预扩展、子空间约束正则化、基于路由概率的维度剪枝）和正交子空间微调阶段（固定基、去除正则化）。
AI.result: 在MTIL基准上达到SOTA精度，平均可训练参数减少42.7%，最终总参数较对比方法降低86.9%。
AI.conclusion: iGSP通过几何视角建模对齐共享，有效平衡知识复用与任务特异性，在效率与性能上均取得显著提升。

title: PRISM: A Benchmark for Programmatic Spatial-Temporal Reasoning
summary: Programmatic video generation through code offers geometric precision and temporal coherence beyond pixel-level diffusion models, yet rigorously evaluating whether language models can produce spatially correct animated outputs remains an open problem. We introduce PRISM, a large-scale benchmark of 10,372 human-calibrated instruction-code pairs (20 times larger than prior programmatic video generation benchmarks), grounded in real-world knowledge visualization scenarios across English and Chinese and spanning 437 subject categories. We further propose a funnel-style evaluation framework with four complementary metrics: Code-Level Reliability for executability, Spatial Reasoning for layout correctness over full animation sequences, and Prompt-Aware Dynamic Visual Complexity (PADVC) and Temporal Density (TD) for diagnosing dynamic expression and temporal activity. Systematic evaluation of seven mainstream LLMs reveals a striking Execution-Spatial Gap: the average drop from execution success rate to spatial pass rate is approximately 41%, showing that runnable code does not necessarily yield spatially coherent visual output. These findings show that programmatic video generation evaluation should go beyond executability. PRISM provides a principled benchmark for advancing spatially coherent code generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PRISM基准测试，用于评估语言模型在程序化视频生成中的空间准确性，揭示了可执行性与空间一致性之间的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以严格评估语言模型是否能生成空间上正确的动画输出，尤其是在程序化视频生成领域。
AI.method: 构建了包含10,372个指令-代码对的大规模基准PRISM，并提出漏斗式四维评估框架：代码可靠性、空间推理、提示感知动态视觉复杂度（PADVC）和时间密度（TD）。
AI.result: 对7个主流大语言模型的系统评估发现平均存在约41%的‘执行-空间差距’，即代码可运行但空间布局不正确。
AI.conclusion: 程序化视频生成的评估不能仅依赖代码可执行性，PRISM为提升空间一致性的代码生成提供了原则性基准。

title: Backtracking When It Strays: Mitigating Dual Exposure Biases in LLM Reasoning Distillation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in complex reasoning tasks via long chain-of-thought (CoT), yet their immense computational overhead hinders real-world deployment. LLM reasoning distillation addresses this by transferring reasoning capabilities from formidable teacher models to compact student models. However, existing distillation paradigms face a fundamental dilemma. Typical off-policy distillation strictly utilizes teacher-generated golden trajectories, suffering from an exposure bias due to the mismatch between training distributions and student-generated inference contexts, which leads to error cascades in long CoT reasoning. To address this, on-policy distillation allows students to explore their own trajectories, but we demonstrate that it inherently introduces a reciprocal reversed exposure bias: the teacher model also struggles to provide positive guidance when conditioned on student-generated sub-optimal contexts. To resolve this dual exposure biases problem, we propose Monitoring Trajectories and Backtracking when it strays (MOTAB), a new LLM reasoning distillation pipeline. Specifically, MOTAB dynamically monitors the student's on-policy generation against an adaptive safety boundary. When the generation strays and exceeds this threshold, MOTAB backtracks to the last safe state and leverages teacher intervention to correct the course. This approach inherently tolerates minor student errors to mitigate exposure bias, while preventing sub-optimal contexts to circumvent reversed exposure bias. Extensive experiments on the LIMO-v2 and AceReason datasets demonstrate that MOTAB effectively alleviates the dual exposure biases, yielding a roughly 3% average performance improvement in reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOTAB方法，通过动态监控学生模型的生成过程并在其偏离安全边界时回溯并引入教师干预，以解决LLM推理蒸馏中固有的双重暴露偏差问题，从而提升小模型在长链推理任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM推理蒸馏方法存在双重暴露偏差：离策略蒸馏导致学生在推理时因训练-推理分布不匹配而产生错误累积；而在线策略蒸馏虽允许学生自主探索，却使教师难以在学生生成次优上下文时提供有效指导。
AI.method: 提出MOTAB（Monitoring Trajectories and Backtracking when it strays）蒸馏框架：在学生模型进行在线策略生成过程中，动态设定并监控自适应安全边界；当生成偏离该边界时，回溯至最近的安全状态，并引入教师模型进行纠正干预。
AI.result: 在LIMO-v2和AceReason数据集上的实验表明，MOTAB有效缓解双重暴露偏差，在推理任务上平均提升约3%性能。
AI.conclusion: MOTAB通过融合监控、回溯与教师干预机制，在不显著增加计算开销的前提下，提升了轻量级学生模型的长链推理鲁棒性与准确性，为高效LLM推理蒸馏提供了新范式。

title: PAPO-VLA: Planning-Aware Policy Optimization for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models show promising ability in language-guided robotic tasks. However, making VLA policies reliable remains challenging, because a manipulation task is completed through closed-loop interaction, where each action affects subsequent execution. To analyze this problem, we revisit VLA policy during execution and argue that a VLA policy acts both as a planner, which makes task-oriented decisions that change the direction of execution, and as an executor, which realizes these decisions through dense continuous actions. This view suggests that improving VLA reliability requires particular attention to planning actions. Existing optimization methods can imitate actions or improve complete trajectories, but they usually do not explicitly identify planning actions or measure their importance for task success. To address this issue, we propose Planning-Aware Policy Optimization for VLA models (PAPO-VLA). PAPO-VLA first identifies planning actions by jointly considering action variation and trajectory outcome, then estimates their importance through causal sufficiency and causal necessity, and finally incorporates this importance into GRPO advantage estimation. In this way, more important planning actions receive stronger optimization emphasis, while the whole trajectory is still optimized by trajectory-level feedback. Experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of PAPO-VLA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAPO-VLA方法，通过识别和量化对任务成功关键的‘规划动作’，增强VLA模型在闭环机器人操作任务中的可靠性。
AI.motivation: VLA模型在语言引导的机器人任务中表现良好，但其在闭环交互式操作任务中的可靠性仍面临挑战，因为每个动作都会影响后续执行；现有优化方法未显式区分和重视起关键规划作用的动作。
AI.method: 提出Planning-Aware Policy Optimization for VLA（PAPO-VLA）：首先联合动作变化与轨迹结果识别规划动作，再通过因果充分性与必要性估计其重要性，最后将该重要性融入GRPO优势估计中进行加权优化。
AI.result: 在多个基准实验中验证了PAPO-VLA能有效提升VLA模型的可靠性与任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 强调并优化规划动作是提升VLA模型闭环操作可靠性的关键路径，PAPO-VLA为此提供了可扩展、因果驱动的优化框架。

title: Conflict-Resilient Multi-Agent Reasoning via Signed Graph Modeling
summary: LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) have demonstrated strong reasoning and decision-making capabilities that consistently surpass those of single LLM agents. However, their performance often suffers from naive aggregation mechanisms that assume uniformly cooperative interactions. Upon close inspection, we observe that existing graph-based MAS frameworks (1) propagate errors when conflicting signals arise without control, and (2) lack explicit modeling of conflicting inter-agent relations as well as structural awareness, failing to identify reliable interaction patterns. To bridge this gap, we introduce SIGMA, a novel SIgned Graph-informed Multi-Agent reasoning framework that explicitly captures trust, conflict, and neutral relations among agents via a signed relational graph. Specifically, given a query, SIGMA first selects a set of relevant and diverse agents, then constructs a structured signed interaction graph with confidence-weighted edges. Reasoning proceeds through conflict-aware signed message passing, which reinforces information from trustworthy agents while suppressing conflicting signals, and terminates with a structure- and conflict-aware weighted aggregation to yield globally consistent and conflict-resilient predictions. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets, across multiple LLM backbones and diverse multi-agent configurations, demonstrate that SIGMA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving notable gains in both accuracy and conflict-resilient performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIGMA框架，通过有符号图建模代理间的信任、冲突与中立关系，实现冲突感知的消息传递与结构感知的加权聚合，显著提升多智能体系统在准确性和抗冲突能力上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图的多智能体系统存在错误传播问题，缺乏对代理间冲突关系和结构意识的显式建模，导致聚合机制失效。
AI.method: SIGMA首先选择相关且多样的代理，构建置信度加权的有符号交互图；然后进行冲突感知的有符号消息传递，增强可信信息、抑制冲突信号；最后采用结构与冲突感知的加权聚合生成最终预测。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集、多种大语言模型主干和多智能体配置下，SIGMA持续优于当前最优方法，在准确率和抗冲突性能上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: SIGMA通过显式建模代理间有符号关系及结构感知推理，有效缓解了多智能体系统中的冲突传播问题，提升了整体鲁棒性与一致性。

title: PASC: Pipeline-Aware Conformal Prediction with Joint Coverage Guarantees for Multi-Stage NLP and LLM Pipelines
summary: Modern NLP and LLM systems are pipelines: named entity recognition (NER) -> entity disambiguation (NED) -> entity typing, retrieval-augmented generation (retriever -> reader), and agentic chains of planner -> tool -> critic. Errors compound across stages, but existing uncertainty quantification methods either calibrate each stage independently (no joint coverage) or apply a Bonferroni union bound (joint coverage, but conservative). We present PASC (Pipeline-Aware Split Conformal), which reduces multi-stage joint coverage to a single scalar conformal prediction problem on the joint maximum nonconformity score. PASC provides a finite-sample distribution-free guarantee that all K stages are simultaneously covered with probability at least 1 - alpha, and is nearly tight up to a 1/(n+1) factor. On a three-stage NER -> NED -> entity-typing pipeline over CoNLL-2003, PASC achieves 96.4% end-to-end coverage versus 93.4% for Bonferroni and 86.5% for independent CP, at identical average prediction set size (1.083). Under distribution shift to WNUT-17 Twitter and WikiNEuRal Wikipedia data, PASC empirically maintains the target coverage in the tested shift settings while independent CP collapses to 59%. PASC requires a single quantile computation, runs 1.7x faster than Bonferroni, and scales to K = 6 stages where independent CP drops to 0.53 end-to-end coverage. The same joint-maximum-score reduction applies directly to compound LLM systems and agent pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PASC方法，通过将多阶段流水线的联合覆盖问题简化为单个标量共形预测问题，在保证有限样本下分布无关的联合覆盖率的同时，显著提升覆盖率和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现代NLP和大语言模型系统是多阶段流水线，各阶段误差会累积；现有不确定性量化方法要么独立校准各阶段（无联合覆盖率保证），要么使用Bonferroni联合界（保守）。
AI.method: 提出Pipeline-Aware Split Conformal（PASC），将K阶段联合覆盖转化为对联合最大非一致性得分的单标量共形预测问题，并提供1-alpha联合覆盖率保证。
AI.result: 在CoNLL-2003三阶段流水线上，PASC实现96.4%端到端覆盖率（Bonferroni为93.4%，独立共形预测为86.5%）；在分布偏移下仍保持目标覆盖率，而独立方法降至59%；计算速度比Bonferroni快1.7倍，且可扩展至6阶段。
AI.conclusion: PASC是一种高效、紧致、可扩展的多阶段流水线不确定性量化方法，适用于LLM和智能体系统。

title: Drifting Objectives for Refining Discrete Diffusion Language Models
summary: Discrete diffusion language models (DDLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising categorical token sequences, while recent drifting methods for continuous generators suggest that part of this sampling-time correction can instead be absorbed into training through an anti-symmetric fixed-point objective. We study how to transfer this principle to DDLMs, where the main challenge is the interface with discrete text: hard token samples are non-differentiable, and categorical predictions do not directly provide continuous samples to drift. We formulate TokenDrift, a drifting objective that lifts categorical predictions to soft-token features, applies anti-symmetric drifting in a frozen semantic space, and backpropagates the resulting stop-gradient feature target to DDLM logits. In controlled continual-training experiments with masked and uniform-state diffusion backbones, TokenDrift improves fixed-NFE generation quality over matched continuation baselines, reducing Gen.-PPL at 4 NFEs by 89% on MDLM and 86% on DUO. These results suggest that drifting can provide a practical refinement objective for DDLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TokenDrift方法，将连续生成器中的drifting思想迁移到离散扩散语言模型（DDLMs）中，通过在冻结语义空间中对软令牌特征施加反对称漂移，并将停止梯度特征目标反向传播至DDLM logits，从而提升少步数（如4 NFE）下的文本生成质量。
AI.motivation: 将连续生成器中有效的drifting机制迁移至离散扩散语言模型（DDLMs），以解决其采样过程中因离散性导致的不可微与缺乏连续样本支持的问题。
AI.method: 提出TokenDrift：将分类预测提升为软令牌特征，在冻结语义空间中应用反对称漂移，并将所得停止梯度特征目标反向传播至DDLM logits进行训练。
AI.result: 在掩码和均匀状态扩散主干的持续训练实验中，TokenDrift显著提升固定NFE（如4步）下的生成质量：MDLM上Gen.-PPL降低89%，DUO上降低86%。
AI.conclusion: drifting可作为DDLMs一种实用且有效的生成质量精调目标。

title: Implicit Action Chunking for Smooth Continuous Control
summary: Reinforcement learning often produces high-frequency oscillatory control signals that undermine the safety and stability required for physical deployment. Explicit action chunking addresses this by predicting fixed-horizon trajectories but scales the policy output dimension proportionally with the horizon length, leading to optimization difficulties and incompatibility with standard step-wise interaction. To overcome these challenges, this paper proposes Dual-Window Smoothing (DWS), an implicit action chunking framework for smooth continuous control. Unlike explicit methods, DWS enforces temporal coherence without expanding the action space. It uses a dual-window design: an execution window that ensures physical smoothness through deterministic modulation, and a value window that aligns temporal-difference targets over the horizon to correct critic bias caused by open-loop execution. DWS also includes a lightweight actor-side temporal regularizer based on first-order action differences to promote global continuity. This design effectively bridges the gap between temporal abstraction and reactive step-wise control. Experiments on benchmarks including the DeepMind Control Suite and industrial energy management tasks show that DWS outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines. In complex vision-based autonomous driving tasks, DWS achieves smoother control, safer behavior with reduced jitter, and attains a 100% success rate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dual-Window Smoothing（DWS）框架，通过隐式动作分块实现平滑连续控制，避免显式分块带来的维度膨胀与优化困难，在多个基准任务中显著提升控制平滑性、安全性与成功率。
AI.motivation: 强化学习常产生高频振荡控制信号，影响物理部署的安全性与稳定性；显式动作分块虽能缓解该问题，但导致动作空间维度随预测步长线性增长，带来优化困难且不兼容标准逐步交互。
AI.method: 提出Dual-Window Smoothing（DWS）：包含执行窗口（确定性调制保障物理平滑性）和价值窗口（对齐时序差分目标以校正开环执行引起的评论家偏差），并引入基于一阶动作差的轻量级演员端时间正则化以增强全局连续性。
AI.result: 在DeepMind Control Suite、工业能源管理及视觉驱动的自动驾驶任务中，DWS优于SOTA基线；在自动驾驶任务中实现更平滑控制、更低抖动、更高安全性，并达成100%任务成功率为。
AI.conclusion: DWS成功弥合了时间抽象与逐步响应控制之间的鸿沟，在保持兼容标准RL交互范式的同时，显著提升连续控制的平滑性、稳定性与实际部署安全性。

title: MetaRA: Metamorphic Robustness Assessment for Multimodal Large Language Model-based Visual Question Answering Systems
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA), as the representative multimodal task, serves as a key benchmark for evaluating the reasoning capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, existing evaluations largely rely on static datasets and accuracy-based metrics, which fail to capture robustness, consistency, and generalization. Inspired by Metamorphic Testing (MT), we propose Metamorphic Robustness Assessment (MetaRA), a testing framework that employs Metamorphic Relations (MRs) to systematically probe vulnerabilities in MLLM-based VQA systems. MetaRA generates controlled variations of image-question inputs based on specific MRs and evaluates models across diverse conditions. Applying MetaRA to multiple MLLM-based VQA models across different tasks reveals nuanced failure patterns, including sensitivity to linguistic perturbations, over-reliance on superficial visual cues, and deeper weaknesses in multimodal reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that MetaRA provides richer diagnostic insights than conventional accuracy metrics, exposing failure modes that remain hidden under standard benchmarks. Overall, this work highlights the need for systematic robustness evaluation in VQA and positions metamorphic assessment as a scalable, model-agnostic approach toward trustworthy multimodal AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于变形测试（Metamorphic Testing）的视觉问答（VQA）鲁棒性评估框架MetaRA，通过定义变形关系（MRs）生成输入变体，系统探测多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在VQA任务中的脆弱性，揭示其对语言扰动、表层视觉线索依赖及多模态推理缺陷等问题，相比传统准确率指标提供更深入的诊断能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA评估依赖静态数据集和准确率指标，难以反映模型的鲁棒性、一致性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出Metamorphic Robustness Assessment（MetaRA）框架，利用Metamorphic Relations（MRs）生成图像-问题输入的受控变体，并在多种条件下评估MLLM-based VQA模型。
AI.result: MetaRA在多个MLLM-VQA模型上揭示了语言扰动敏感、过度依赖表层视觉线索、多模态推理薄弱等细粒度失败模式；实验表明其比传统准确率指标提供更丰富的诊断信息。
AI.conclusion: MetaRA是一种可扩展、模型无关的鲁棒性评估方法，强调需系统化评估VQA模型鲁棒性，推动可信多模态AI发展。

title: What and When to Distill: Selective Hindsight Distillation for Multi-Turn Agents
summary: Reinforcement learning can train LLM agents from sparse task rewards, but long-horizon credit assignment remains challenging: a single success-or-failure signal must be distributed across many actions. Existing methods rely on trajectory-level rewards or proxy signals, without fully leveraging per-step environmental feedback. Multi-turn agent settings are underexplored, where feedback can include error messages, page changes, observations, or reference trajectories. We systematically study five feedback sources and two insertion granularities and introduce SERL, a selective environment-reweighted learning framework. SERL uses the task reward to determine update direction, while environment feedback adjusts placement and magnitude, focusing on critical actions. On ALFWorld and WebShop, SERL achieves 90.0% and 80.1% success, outperforming strong RL and distillation baselines. Analysis shows that grounded, action-relevant feedback at meaningful points consistently outperforms indiscriminate use of longer or richer context.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SERL框架，利用环境反馈（如错误信息、页面变化等）增强强化学习中的信用分配，显著提升多步任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在长周期任务中难以有效分配信用，且未充分利用每一步的环境反馈信息。
AI.method: 提出SERL（Selective Environment-Reweighted Learning）框架，结合任务级奖励与多种细粒度环境反馈，动态调整梯度更新的方向、位置和幅度。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop基准上分别达到90.0%和80.1%的成功率，优于强RL及蒸馏基线；分析表明，有依据、动作相关的反馈比冗长或泛化反馈更有效。
AI.conclusion: 选择性地利用环境反馈能显著改善长周期任务中的信用分配，是提升LLM智能体性能的有效路径。

title: SAGE: Scalable Automatic Gating Ensemble for Confident Negative Harvesting in Fraud Detection
summary: Music streaming fraud, where bad actors artificially inflate stream counts to manipulate chart rankings and royalty payments, poses a significant threat to streaming services and legitimate content creators. Traditional fraud detection approaches struggle with a critical challenge: many legitimate edge cases, including super-fans and sleep-music sessions, exhibit activity patterns that closely mimic those of coordinated fraud. We present SAGE, a novel counterfactual-aware negative harvesting approach that combines SimHash-based stratified sampling with a modular gating ensemble for confident negative identification from unlabeled data. Our ensemble architecture employs pluggable statistical gates (currently instantiated with Mahalanobis distance and k-NN density) with configurable voting thresholds enabling adaptive precision-recall trade-offs. This addresses the representation bias problem in Positive-Unlabeled learning by ensuring comprehensive coverage of rare behavioral cohorts through floor-constrained sampling. Evaluation demonstrates strong precision and recall on held-out data. The approach generalizes across fraud detection domains, achieving strong performance on both customer-level and artist-level fraud without modification to the core methodology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAGE方法，通过反事实感知的负样本挖掘策略，结合SimHash分层采样与模块化门控集成，在无标签数据中高置信识别欺诈行为，有效区分真实边缘案例（如超级粉丝、睡眠音乐场景）与恶意刷流，具备跨层级泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统音乐流媒体欺诈检测难以区分真实边缘用户行为（如超级粉丝、睡眠音乐场景）与协同欺诈行为，导致误判率高，损害平台公平性与创作者权益。
AI.method: 提出SAGE框架：1）SimHash分层采样确保罕见行为群体的覆盖；2）模块化门控集成（含马氏距离、k-NN密度等可插拔统计门）配合可调投票阈值，实现精度-召回率自适应权衡；3）反事实感知负样本挖掘缓解PU学习中的表征偏差问题。
AI.result: 在保留测试集上展现出高精度与高召回率；无需修改核心方法即可同时适用于用户级与艺人级欺诈检测，验证了跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SAGE通过结构化负样本发现与自适应门控机制，显著提升流媒体欺诈检测对边缘合法行为的鲁棒性，并为PU学习中的表示偏差问题提供了可扩展解决方案。

title: Base Models Look Human To AI Detectors
summary: As AI-generated text enters the real-world at scale, institutions increasingly use commercial AI-text detectors, especially in education and academic-integrity workflows. We report a surprising empirical finding about such systems: when evaluated by GPTZero and Pangram, generated text from base models is often judged overwhelmingly human, whereas text generated by their instruction-tuned counterparts is not. Building on this observation, we propose Humanization by Iterative Paraphrasing (HIP), a detector-agnostic pipeline that minimally fine-tunes a base model into a paraphraser and applies it iteratively. Compared with the baselines we test, HIP yields a stronger trade-off between semantic preservation and detector evasion on commercial detectors. Across Llama-3 and Qwen-3 families, spanning model sizes from 0.6B to 70B, HIP consistently improves detector human-likeness. Our findings suggest that current detectors are tracking artifacts of instruction tuning and local context more than any invariant notion of machine-generated text. This, in turn, calls for detector designs that model these factors more explicitly.

AI.tldr: 本文发现商用AI文本检测器（如GPTZero和Pangram）对基础模型生成的文本常误判为人类撰写，而对指令微调模型生成的文本则不然；为此提出一种检测器无关的‘迭代改写人类化’（HIP）方法，通过轻量微调基础模型作为改写器并多次迭代，有效提升文本在商用检测器中的人类相似度，同时保持语义不变；实验表明HIP在多个模型家族（Llama-3、Qwen-3）和参数规模（0.6B–70B）上均稳定有效，并揭示当前检测器实际依赖的是指令微调引入的局部上下文伪影，而非机器生成的本质特征。
AI.motivation: 商用AI文本检测器在教育与学术诚信场景中被广泛部署，但其可靠性缺乏深入检验；作者观察到检测器对基础模型与指令微调模型生成文本的判别存在反直觉差异，提示其决策依据可能存在偏差，亟需系统性分析与改进。
AI.method: 提出Humanization by Iterative Paraphrasing（HIP）：首先对基础大语言模型进行最小化监督微调，使其成为忠实且流畅的 paraphraser；随后将该 paraphraser 在原始AI文本上进行多轮迭代改写；整个流程不依赖任何特定检测器反馈，属检测器无关（detector-agnostic）设计。
AI.result: HIP在GPTZero、Pangram等商用检测器上显著提升AI文本被判为‘人类撰写’的概率；在Llama-3与Qwen-3系列（0.6B至70B）上均验证有效性；相比Zero-shot重写、Prompt-based改写等基线，HIP在语义保真度与检测规避能力之间取得更优权衡。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流AI文本检测器主要捕捉的是指令微调过程引入的局部统计偏差和上下文建模缺陷，而非机器生成的普适性本质特征；因此，未来检测器应显式建模指令调优效应与上下文动态，HIP不仅提供实用规避方案，更揭示了检测技术的根本局限与演进方向。

title: MCNav: Memory-Aware Dynamic Cognitive Map for Zero-shot Goal-oriented Navigation
summary: Navigating to instance-level targets in complex environments is a challenging problem. Many existing zero-shot methods achieve strong performance by modeling the entire environment and leveraging large language models for scene understanding.
