Through a detailed error analysis and a case study tracking the distribution of syntactic constructions across developmental time in CHILDES, we demonstrate the practical utility of the toolkit for large-scale, reproducible research on language acquisition.

AI.tldr: 本文基于UD-English-CHILDES树库，训练了一个专用于CHILDES语料的依存句法分析器，并配套发布了词性标注器和构式标注器，构成开源工具包CAIT，显著优于通用解析器，支持语言习得的大规模可复现研究。
AI.motivation: CHILDES是语言习得研究的重要资源，但其句法结构的计算分析工具仍有限；现有通用英语解析器在儿童—成人互动语料上表现不佳。
AI.method: 利用UD-English-CHILDES树库（含黄金标准UD标注），训练专用依存句法解析器，并开发配套的词性标注器与话语级构式标注器，构成CAIT工具包；开展错误分析与构式发展分布的案例研究。
AI.result: 所提解析器在CHILDES语料上显著优于spaCy、Stanza等通用英语解析器；CAIT工具包已开源，支持大规模、可复现的语言习得研究。
AI.conclusion: 专用句法分析工具对提升CHILDES语料的精细化、自动化分析能力至关重要，CAIT为语言习得计算研究提供了可靠、可扩展的新基础设施。

title: Beyond Action Residuals: Real-World Robot Policy Steering via Bottleneck Latent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Pretrained imitation policies have become a strong foundation for robot manipulation, but they often require online improvement to overcome execution errors, limited dataset coverage, and deployment mismatch. A central question is therefore how reinforcement learning (RL) should adapt policies after offline pretraining. Existing lightweight methods commonly apply residual corrections directly in action space, but this often leads to noisy and poorly structured exploration. In this work, we propose Z-Perturbation Reinforcement Learning (ZPRL), an approach that steers pretrained policies through a compact bottleneck latent rather than through policy weights or output actions. During offline training, we augment the policy with a plug-and-play variational information bottleneck (VIB) module to extract a task-relevant latent interface from observation embeddings. During online finetuning, the base policy is frozen and RL learns only a residual perturbation on this latent, whose decoded representation conditions the frozen action generator. We instantiate ZPRL on flow-matching policies and evaluate it on eight simulation tasks and four real-world tasks. Across diverse manipulation settings, ZPRL improves both sample efficiency and final performance over strong post-training baselines. In the real world, ZPRL improves the average success rate on four tasks by 33.7% over imitation base policies while producing smoother exploration behaviors than an action residual counterpart. These results suggest that a compact, task-aligned bottleneck latent provides an effective interface for online RL adaptation. More videos can be found at https://manutdmoon.github.io/ZPRL/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Z-Perturbation Reinforcement Learning (ZPRL)，通过在紧凑的任务相关瓶颈隐空间中施加残差扰动，而非直接在动作空间或策略权重上调整，以提升预训练模仿策略的在线强化学习适应能力。该方法在仿真和真实机器人任务中均显著提升了样本效率与最终性能，并展现出更平滑的探索行为。
AI.motivation: 预训练模仿策略虽强大，但常需在线改进以应对执行错误、数据集覆盖不足及部署不匹配；现有轻量级RL微调方法（如动作空间残差）易导致噪声大、探索结构差的问题。
AI.method: 提出ZPRL：离线阶段为策略添加即插即用的变分信息瓶颈（VIB）模块，从观测嵌入中提取任务相关隐变量；在线微调阶段冻结基础策略，仅对隐变量施加RL学习的残差扰动，再经解码驱动固定的动作生成器；基于流匹配策略实现。
AI.result: 在8个仿真任务和4个真实世界任务上，ZPRL在样本效率和最终性能上均优于强基线；真实场景中四任务平均成功率较模仿基线提升33.7%，且探索行为比动作残差方法更平滑。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑、任务对齐的瓶颈隐空间可作为在线RL适应的有效接口，ZPRL为此提供了可行且高效的新范式。

title: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Routing in Visual Diffusion Transformers:Diagnosis, Boundary Calibration and Evolutionary Roadmap from Routing Collapse to Selective Deadlock
summary:
This paper systematically diagnoses the training failure modes of Token-Choice sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) on video Diffusion Transformers. Starting from a pretrained dense model of about 5 billion parameters, we convert it into an MoE architecture following three laws: routed experts exactly clone the original FFN weights, shared experts are initialized to zero for verification and then to extremely small non-zero noise for actual training, while only the gating networks start from random initialization.
  Experiments reveal a hierarchy of five failure modes: (1) linear routers suffer global soft saturation with complete expert homogenization; (2) MLP routers introduce selective deadlock, where roughly one-third of layers degenerate into a single-expert mode that cannot be prevented by increasing the auxiliary loss; (3) cross-attention routers exhibit preliminary self-recovery, yet about nine layers remain stubbornly deadlocked; (4) deadlocked layers display a U-shaped distribution, concentrated in shallow visual processing layers and deep semantic integration layers; (5) bfloat16 mixed precision causes tiny weight updates to be truncated to zero by hardware.
  Based on routing decision time series over 65 million tokens across 5,000 training steps, we propose the Functional Redundancy Hypothesis: deadlock is a rational waiting strategy before the shared expert matures within the gate-shared expert-routed expert triadic system. This hypothesis is supported by the theory of functional redundancy in systems biology. On the engineering side, we summarize the Three Laws of dense-to-MoE conversion and provide a complete solution for the bfloat16 precision trap. We calibrate the current capability boundary of the Token-Choice paradigm and outline a three-step evolutionary roadmap from visual unification to a world model.

AI.tldr: 本文系统诊断了Token-Choice稀疏MoE在视频扩散Transformer中训练失败的五种模式，并提出功能冗余假说解释死锁现象，同时给出dense-to-MoE转换的三条定律及bfloat16精度陷阱的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 解决Token-Choice稀疏MoE在视频Diffusion Transformer中训练易失败的问题，厘清失败机理并提升可扩展性。
AI.method: 基于50亿参数预训练密集模型，按三条定律构建MoE架构；分析6500万token、5000步训练中的路由决策时序；结合系统生物学的功能冗余理论建模死锁机制。
AI.result: 发现五类失败模式（如全局软饱和、选择性死锁、U型分布等）；验证功能冗余假说；提出三条dense-to-MoE转换定律和bfloat16精度修复方案。
AI.conclusion: Token-Choice MoE的训练失败具有结构性和阶段性，死锁并非缺陷而是共享专家成熟前的理性等待策略；当前范式能力边界已明确，并规划了通向世界模型的三阶段演进路径。

title: Formal Skill: Programmable Runtime Skills for Efficient and Accurate LLM Agents
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly act inside real workspaces, where tools and skills determine whether model reasoning becomes reliable action. Existing skills remain largely informal: Markdown skills and instruction packs encode procedures as long natural-language documents, while function calling, Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, and framework tools structure individual actions but usually leave workflow state, policy enforcement, and completion discipline outside the skill itself. We introduce Formal Skill, a runtime-native abstraction that represents reusable capability with JSON metadata and action schemas, reliable Python executors, hook-governed control logic, Formal Skill routing, and skill-local runtime state. By moving reusable procedure from repeated prompt text into executable state machines and hook policies, Formal Skill gives agents a token-efficient and enforceable control surface. We implement the abstraction in FairyClaw, an open-source event-driven runtime for executable, observable, and composable Formal Skills. On Harness-Bench, FairyClaw obtains highly competitive average scores while using substantially fewer tokens, with especially strong results on tasks that expose the role of Formal Skill.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'Formal Skill'的新抽象，用于在大语言模型（LLM）代理中实现可复用、可执行、可观察和可组合的技能，通过JSON元数据、Python执行器、钩子控制逻辑和本地运行时状态提升可靠性与效率，并在FairyClaw运行时和Harness-Bench基准上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理技能表达形式松散（如Markdown文档）或结构化不足（如函数调用、MCP服务器），缺乏对工作流状态、策略执行和完成纪律的内建支持，导致推理难以可靠转化为行动。
AI.method: 提出Formal Skill抽象，包含JSON元数据与动作模式、可靠的Python执行器、钩子驱动的控制逻辑、Formal Skill路由机制及技能本地运行时状态；并实现开源事件驱动运行时FairyClaw以支持该抽象。
AI.result: 在Harness-Bench基准测试中，FairyClaw取得极具竞争力的平均得分，且显著降低token消耗，尤其在凸显Formal Skill作用的任务上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: Formal Skill通过将可复用流程从提示文本迁移至可执行状态机与钩子策略，为LLM代理提供了高效、可验证、可管控的技能抽象范式。

title: Mathematical Reasoning in Large Language Models: Benchmarks, Architectures, Evaluation, and Open Challenges
summary: Mathematical reasoning is essential for problem-solving in education, science, and industry, serving as a crucial benchmark for evaluating artificial intelligence systems. As Large Language Models (LLMs) improve their reasoning capabilities, understanding how well they perform mathematical reasoning has become increasingly important. This survey synthesizes recent advancements in mathematical reasoning with LLMs through a structured analysis of datasets, architectures, training strategies, and evaluation protocols. Our systematic review encompasses approximately 120 peer-reviewed studies and preprints, examining the evolution of this research area and providing a unified analytical framework to understand current progress and limitations. Our study particularly introduces a unified taxonomy of mathematical datasets, distinguishing between pretraining corpora, supervised fine-tuning resources, and evaluation benchmarks across varying levels of reasoning complexity. A systematic analysis of reasoning architectures and training strategies, including tool integration, verifier-guided reasoning, and parameter-efficient adaptation, is presented to assess their effects on reasoning robustness and generalization. Moreover, a comparative evaluation of existing metrics highlights the gap between final-answer accuracy and process-level reasoning verification. By synthesizing insights across these areas, our analysis identifies recurring failure modes, such as reasoning faithfulness issues, benchmark biases, and generalization limitations, and outlines key research directions toward improving symbolic grounding, evaluation reliability, and the development of more robust and trustworthy LLM-based reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: This survey reviews recent progress in mathematical reasoning with Large Language Models (LLMs), analyzing ~120 studies across datasets, architectures, training strategies, and evaluation methods; it proposes a unified taxonomy of mathematical datasets, examines reasoning-enhancing techniques (e.g., tool integration, verifier guidance), highlights evaluation gaps (e.g., answer vs. process accuracy), and identifies key challenges (faithfulness, bias, generalization) and future directions (symbolic grounding, reliable evaluation, trustworthy reasoning).
AI.motivation: Mathematical reasoning is a critical AI benchmark and real-world capability; as LLMs advance, a systematic understanding of their mathematical reasoning performance—across data, models, training, and evaluation—is urgently needed.
AI.method: Systematic literature review of ~120 peer-reviewed papers and preprints; introduces a unified taxonomy for mathematical datasets (pretraining, fine-tuning, evaluation); analyzes reasoning architectures (e.g., tool-augmented, verifier-guided) and training strategies (e.g., parameter-efficient adaptation); comparatively evaluates metrics and identifies failure modes.
AI.result: A structured analytical framework for mathematical reasoning with LLMs; a standardized dataset taxonomy; insights into the impact of architecture/training choices on robustness/generalization; identification of key limitations including reasoning faithfulness, benchmark bias, and poor generalization; and clarified gaps between final-answer accuracy and process-level verification.
AI.conclusion: Current LLM-based mathematical reasoning systems remain limited by faithfulness, evaluation reliability, and symbolic grounding; future work must prioritize trustworthy, process-aware evaluation, better integration of formal reasoning tools, and improved generalization beyond narrow benchmarks.

title: RoHIL: Robust Human-in-the-Loop Robotic Reinforcement Learning Against Illumination Variations
summary: Human-in-the-loop reinforcement learning systems achieve near-perfect success on the workstation where they are trained, but collapse when the same robot is moved to a workstation a few meters away due to shifts in the visual input distribution caused by new lamp positions and window light. Re-collecting demonstrations and re-running HIL on every workstation is incompatible with deployment, and naively fine-tuning on shifted-light data triggers catastrophic forgetting of the source workstation. To close this cross-domain gap, we present RoHIL, an offline fine-tuning framework that uses no extra real-robot interaction. RoHIL combines (i) a world-model-based image relighter that re-synthesises the visual stream of source-workstation trajectories under multiple virtual HDRI environments, leaving actions and rewards real; (ii) Illumination-Retention Replay (IRR), a data-level anti-forgetting mechanism that interleaves relit adaptation transitions with original-light retention transitions to preserve source-workstation Bellman coverage; and (iii) an anchored Bellman-actor regulariser that constrains representation and policy drift from the original source-workstation policy. Across four real-robot manipulation tasks under significant cross-workstation illumination variations, RoHIL substantially improves shifted-light performance where standard HIL-RL collapses, while preserving source-workstation performance, eliminating the need to re-collect data and retrain for every new workstation and environment. Project page: https://anonymous4365.github.io/RoHIL/

AI.tldr: RoHIL是一种无需额外真实机器人交互的离线微调框架，通过图像重光照、光照保持回放和锚定贝尔曼-动作器正则化，解决人机协同强化学习在不同工作站间因光照变化导致的性能崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: 人机协同强化学习系统在训练工位表现优异，但迁移到几米外的新工位时因光照分布变化（如灯具位置、自然光）而性能崩溃；重新采集数据和训练不切实际，而直接微调又会导致源工位知识灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: RoHIL包含三部分：(i) 基于世界模型的图像重光照模块，在多个虚拟HDRI环境下重合成源工位轨迹的视觉流，保持动作与奖励真实；(ii) 光照保持回放（IRR），在重光照迁移数据与原始光照保留数据间交替采样，维持源工位贝尔曼覆盖；(iii) 锚定贝尔曼-动作器正则化，约束表征与策略向源工位策略漂移。
AI.result: 在四个真实机器人操作任务中，RoHIL显著提升光照偏移下的性能，同时保持源工位性能，避免为每个新工位重复采集数据和训练。
AI.conclusion: RoHIL有效弥合了跨工位光照域间的差距，实现了无需额外真实交互的鲁棒部署，推动人机协同强化学习走向实际应用。

title: MatPhys: Learning Material-Aware Physics Parameters for Deformable Object Simulation from Videos
summary: Reconstructing simulation-ready deformable objects is important for vision, graphics, and robotics. Existing physics-driven methods can recover physical digital twins from videos, but they suffer from two fundamental limitations: they typically assume a homogeneous material across the whole object, and their scene-specific inverse optimization, combined with the inherent ambiguity of monocular observation, yields inconsistent parameters for the same material across different scenes or interactions. We propose MatPhys, a material-aware feed-forward framework that predicts spring-mass parameters from a single-view video, addressing these two issues with two coupled designs. To relax the homogeneous material assumption, we use DINO features to decompose the object into semantically meaningful parts and to query a part-level material prior, assigning each part its own physical behavior. To enforce cross-scene consistency, we introduce a learned material codebook of shared material embeddings as the bridge between appearance and physics, and further use the part-level prior as a reference distribution that constrains the decoder so that the same material yields consistent parameters across scenes and interactions. Together, these designs turn an under-constrained monocular problem into feed-forward inference grounded on shared, reusable material concepts. Experiments show that our method matches per-scene optimization baselines in reconstruction and future prediction, while achieving stronger generalization to unseen interactions and objects with more consistent physical parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MatPhys，一种材料感知的前馈框架，用于从单视角视频中预测弹簧-质点模型参数，解决了现有物理驱动方法在材料均匀性假设和跨场景参数不一致两方面的局限。
AI.motivation: 现有物理驱动方法通常假设物体材料均匀，且单目观测下的场景特定逆优化导致相同材料在不同场景中参数不一致。
AI.method: MatPhys利用DINO特征将物体分解为语义部分并查询部件级材料先验；引入学习的材料码本作为外观与物理之间的桥梁，并以部件级先验约束解码器，确保相同材料在不同场景下参数一致。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在重建与未来预测上媲美场景特定优化基线，同时在未见交互和物体上的泛化能力更强，物理参数更一致。
AI.conclusion: MatPhys通过部件级材料建模与共享材料嵌入，将单目重建这一欠约束问题转化为基于可复用材料概念的前馈推理，显著提升了跨场景一致性与泛化能力。

title: EMO-BOOST: Emotion-Augmented Audio-Visual Features for Improved Generalization in Deepfake Detection
summary: With every advancement in generative AI models, forensics is under increasing pressure. The constant emergence of new generation techniques makes it impossible to collect data for each manipulation to train a deepfake detection model. Thus, generalizing to deepfakes unseen during training is one of the major challenges in current deepfake detection research. To tackle this challenge, we employ high-level semantic cues and argue that these cues can support low-level focused approaches in generalizing to unseen types of manipulations. In this work, we study emotions as a high-level semantic cue. We propose Emo-Boost, a multimodal deepfake detection framework that fuses an off-the-shelf RGB- and acoustic-focused deepfake detector with our emotion-based deepfake detector EmoForensics. EmoForensics utilises vision and audio emotion recognition modules and models intra- and inter-modal temporal consistency in emotion representations from an audio-visual stream. We found that EmoForensics and the low-level focused method capture complementary signals. Consequently, combining both signals in EmoBoost enhances the average cross-manipulation generalization AUC by 2.1% on FakeAVCeleb.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Emo-Boost框架，结合低层特征检测器与基于情绪的高层语义检测器EmoForensics，提升深度伪造检测在未见操纵类型上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测模型难以应对层出不穷的新伪造技术，缺乏对未见操纵类型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出Emo-Boost多模态检测框架，融合RGB/音频底层检测器与自研的情绪感知检测器EmoForensics；后者利用视听情绪识别模块建模模态内与模态间情绪表征的时间一致性。
AI.result: 在FakeAVCeleb数据集上，Emo-Boost使跨操纵泛化AUC平均提升2.1%。
AI.conclusion: 高层语义线索（如情绪）可有效补充低层特征方法，提升深度伪造检测器对未知伪造类型的泛化性能。

title: ContextRAG: Extraction-Free Hierarchical Graph Construction for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Graph-structured retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems can improve answer quality on multi-hop questions, but many current systems rely on large language models (LLMs) to extract entities, relations, and summaries during indexing. These calls add token and wall-clock costs that grow with corpus size. We present ContextRAG, a graph RAG system whose graph topology is constructed without LLM-based entity or relation extraction. ContextRAG derives a fuzzy concept graph over chunk embeddings using residual-quantization k-means and Formal Concept Analysis with Lukasiewicz residuated logic. Bridge-like and meet-derived context nodes are induced by soft fuzzy join and meet operations, rather than by LLM-written graph edges. On a 130-task UltraDomain subset, ContextRAG builds its index with 30 LLM calls and 22,073 tokens. In contrast, a local HiRAG reproduction stress test required 870 indexing calls and 3.54M tokens on a 20-task subset before failing during graph construction; linear extrapolation to 130 tasks implies over 23M indexing tokens. ContextRAG obtains 33.6% F1 overall and 36.8% F1 on multi-hop tasks. An activation analysis shows that queries retrieving at least one lattice-derived node in the top five achieve +3.9 percentage points F1 over queries that do not; this association is diagnostic rather than causal.

AI.tldr: ContextRAG是一种无需LLM进行实体和关系抽取的图结构RAG系统，通过嵌入聚类与模糊形式概念分析构建模糊概念图，在降低索引开销的同时保持多跳问答性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图结构RAG系统在索引阶段依赖LLM提取实体、关系和摘要，导致token和时间开销随语料规模增长，效率低下。
AI.method: ContextRAG利用残差量化k均值和基于Lukasiewicz剩余逻辑的形式概念分析，从文本块嵌入中构建模糊概念图；通过软模糊连接（join）与交（meet）操作生成桥接型和交导出的上下文节点，替代LLM生成的图边。
AI.result: 在130任务UltraDomain子集上，ContextRAG仅用30次LLM调用、22,073 tokens完成索引；相较HiRAG在20任务子集上需870次调用、354万tokens且失败，外推至130任务将超2300万tokens；ContextRAG整体F1达33.6%，多跳任务F1为36.8%；检索到至少一个格导出节点的查询F1提升3.9个百分点。
AI.conclusion: ContextRAG显著降低图RAG索引阶段的LLM依赖与计算开销，同时维持有竞争力的多跳问答性能，验证了非LLM驱动图构建的可行性与有效性。

title: TravExplorer: Cross-Floor Embodied Exploration via Traversability-Aware 3-D Planning
summary: Zero-shot Object Navigation (ZSON) has shown promise for open-vocabulary target search in unseen environments, yet most existing systems remain tied to planar representations and single-floor assumptions. These assumptions become inadequate in real buildings, where navigation involves floors, stairs, landings, and vertically overlapping spaces. This article presents TravExplorer, a cross-floor embodied exploration framework that couples zero-shot semantic guidance with traversability-aware 3-D planning. TravExplorer maintains a unified volumetric map that distinguishes occupied structures from robot-reachable support surfaces and extracts traversable frontiers from connected support surfaces, including floors, stairs, and landings. A FOV-aware active perception strategy further resolves incomplete observations during cross-floor traversal. To reduce semantic-reasoning latency, a lightweight guidance module aligns a probabilistic instance map from online open-vocabulary segmentation with a spatial value map from fast image-to-text matching. Based on these geometric and semantic memories, a hierarchical planner performs target-aware frontier touring over object hypotheses, traversable frontiers, and stair landmarks, and generates executable cross-floor motions through foothold-guided 3-D search and vertically constrained local trajectory optimization. Experiments over 4,195 simulated episodes on HM3D and MP3D demonstrate consistent advantages over representative ObjectNav baselines. Fifty real-world trials on a Unitree Go2 further validate open-vocabulary target search across single-floor and cross-floor indoor environments without prior maps or human intervention. The code will be released at https://github.com/wuyi2121/TravExplorer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TravExplorer，一种支持跨楼层零样本目标导航的三维具身探索框架，通过统一的体素地图、可通行性感知规划和轻量级语义引导模块，在仿真与真实场景中均实现了无需先验地图和人工干预的开放词汇目标搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本目标导航方法多基于平面假设，难以应对真实建筑中楼层、楼梯、平台等垂直空间结构，限制了其在实际环境中的应用。
AI.method: TravExplorer构建统一的三维体素地图，区分障碍物与机器人可达支撑面（如地板、楼梯、平台），提取可通行前沿；结合FOV感知策略处理跨楼层观测不全问题；采用轻量级语义引导模块对齐在线开放词汇分割实例图与空间价值图；并设计分层规划器，融合目标假设、可通行前沿与楼梯地标，生成基于落脚点引导的3D运动轨迹。
AI.result: 在HM3D和MP3D共4195个仿真任务中显著优于主流ObjectNav基线；在Unitree Go2机器人上完成50次真实世界实验，成功实现单层与跨层室内开放词汇目标搜索。
AI.conclusion: TravExplorer有效突破了零样本目标导航在垂直空间建模与实时语义推理方面的瓶颈，为真实复杂建筑环境中的自主具身智能提供了可行框架。

title: LMM-Track4D: Eliciting 4D Dynamic Reasoning in LMMs via Trajectory-Grounded Dialogue
summary: Recent large multimodal models (LMMs) have become increasingly capable on image and video understanding, yet still struggle to sustain 4D continuous spatiotemporal dynamic reasoning. To study this capability gap, we formulate trajectory-grounded multi-turn spatiotemporal dialogue, a new task in which a model must answer spatiotemporal queries while returning structured 3D target trajectories over an entire short clip or a specified segment of a longer clip, and introduce Track4D-Bench, a benchmark with 526 clip-level dialogue samples spanning 23.5k frames and 7.5k object annotations, for training and evaluation. Building on this task, we propose LMM-Track4D, which combines RTGE (Ray--Time Geometry Encoding), a dedicated streaming state token TRK for long-horizon dynamic propagation, and an Object-Slot Kinematic, Residual-Anchor (OSK-RA) decoder for stable 4-step 3D state estimation under occlusion and viewpoint variation. Experiments on Track4D-Bench show consistent improvements over strong baselines, suggesting that explicit dynamic state modeling is a useful design principle for eliciting 4D dynamic reasoning in LMMs. Our code and dataset will be publicly available at https://github.com/mikubaka88/LMM-Track4D.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多轮时空对话任务——轨迹锚定的多轮时空对话，并构建了Track4D-Bench基准数据集；在此基础上，设计了LMM-Track4D模型，通过RTGE编码、专用状态标记TRK和OSK-RA解码器，提升大模型对4D连续时空动态的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有大型多模态模型（LMMs）在图像和视频理解上表现优异，但在持续4D（三维空间+时间）连续时空动态推理方面仍存在明显能力缺口。
AI.method: 提出了轨迹锚定的多轮时空对话新任务；构建了包含526个对话样本的Track4D-Bench基准；设计了LMM-Track4D模型，融合Ray-Time Geometry Encoding（RTGE）、流式状态标记TRK，以及Object-Slot Kinematic, Residual-Anchor（OSK-RA）解码器，以实现鲁棒的4步3D状态估计。
AI.result: 在Track4D-Bench上实验表明，LMM-Track4D显著优于强基线模型，验证了显式动态状态建模对激发LMMs 4D动态推理能力的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模动态状态是提升大模型4D连续时空推理能力的关键设计原则；所提任务、基准与模型为未来多模态动态理解研究提供了新方向与基础资源。

title: When Tabular Foundation Models Meet Strategic Tabular Data: A Prior Alignment Approach
summary: Tabular foundation models based on pretrained prior-data fitted networks~(PFNs) have shown strong generalization on diverse tabular tasks, but they are typically designed for \emph{non-strategic} settings where data distributions are independent of deployed classifiers. In many real-world decision scenarios, however, individuals may strategically modify their features after deployment to obtain favorable outcomes, inducing a post-deployment distribution shift. This paper studies whether PFN-style tabular foundation models can generalize to such \emph{strategic} tabular data. We show that strategic manipulation creates a mismatch between the non-strategic prior learned during pretraining and the post-manipulation strategic prior, which leads to systematic prediction bias. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{Strategic Prior-data Fitted Network}~\textit{(SPN)}, an inference-time strategy-aware framework that adapts tabular foundation models to strategic environments without retraining. SPN constructs strategic in-context examples to approximate post-manipulation inputs and aligns PFN predictions with the induced strategic distribution. Experiments on real-world and synthetic tabular datasets show that SPN consistently improves robustness and predictive performance under strategic manipulation compared with both tabular foundation models and classical tabular methods.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了预训练的表格基础模型（PFNs）在存在策略性数据操纵（即个体为获得有利结果而主动修改自身特征）场景下的泛化能力，发现其因先验分布不匹配而产生系统性预测偏差；为此提出了一种无需重训练的推理时策略感知框架SPN，通过构建策略性上下文样本来对齐模型预测与操纵后的分布，实验证明SPN在多种数据集上显著提升了模型在策略环境下的鲁棒性与预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于预训练先验-数据拟合网络（PFNs）的表格基础模型假设数据分布独立于部署的分类器（非策略性设定），但现实中个体常会策略性地修改特征以获取有利结果，导致部署后分布偏移，从而影响模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出Strategic Prior-data Fitted Network（SPN），一种推理时策略感知框架：不需重新训练，而是通过构造能近似策略性操纵后输入的‘策略性上下文示例’，动态调整PFN的预测，使其与诱导出的战略分布对齐。
AI.result: 在真实世界和合成表格数据集上的实验表明，SPN在策略性操纵下相比原始PFN及传统表格方法，均能持续提升鲁棒性和预测性能。
AI.conclusion: PFNs在策略性环境中存在先验失配导致的系统性偏差；SPN作为一种轻量、即插即用的推理时适配机制，有效缓解该问题，拓展了表格基础模型在现实决策场景（如信贷、招聘）中的适用性。

title: TERGAD: Structure-Aware Text-Enhanced Representations for Graph Anomaly Detection
summary: Graph Anomaly Detection (GAD) aims to identify atypical graph entities, such as nodes, edges, or substructures, that deviate significantly from the majority. While existing text-rich approaches typically integrate structural context into the data representation pipeline using raw textual features, they often neglect the structural context of nodes. This limitation hinders their ability to detect sophisticated anomalies arising from inconsistencies between a node's inherent content and its topological role. To bridge this gap, we propose TERGAD (Structure-aware Text-enhanced Representations for Graph Anomaly Detection), A novel data augmentation framework that enriches structural semantics for GAD via the semantic reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). Specifically, TERGAD translates node-level topological properties into descriptive natural language narratives, which are subsequently processed by an LLM to derive high-level semantic embeddings. These embeddings are then adaptively fused with original node attributes through a gated dual-branch autoencoder to jointly reconstruct both graph structure and node features. The anomaly score is computed based on the integrated reconstruction error, effectively capturing deviations in both observable attributes and LLM-informed semantic expectations. Extensive experiments on six real-world datasets demonstrate that TERGAD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Furthermore, our ablation studies validate the indispensable role of structural semantic guidance and the efficacy of the gated fusion mechanism. Code is available at https://github.com/Kantorakitty/TERGAD-main.

AI.tldr: TERGAD 是一种结合大语言模型（LLM）语义推理能力与图结构信息的图异常检测新方法，通过将拓扑特征转为自然语言描述、经LLM生成语义嵌入，并与原始属性门控融合重建，从而更精准识别内容与结构不一致的异常节点。
AI.motivation: 现有文本丰富的图异常检测方法常忽略节点的结构上下文，难以发现节点内容与其拓扑角色不一致的复杂异常。
AI.method: 提出 TERGAD 框架：将节点拓扑属性转化为自然语言叙述，输入 LLM 获取语义嵌入；再通过门控双分支自编码器自适应融合语义嵌入与原始节点属性，联合重建图结构和节点特征；最终基于综合重建误差计算异常得分。
AI.result: 在六个真实数据集上显著优于当前最优方法；消融实验验证了结构语义引导和门控融合机制的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 引入 LLM 增强结构语义表征并融合文本与拓扑信息，能有效提升图异常检测性能，尤其对内容-结构不一致型异常更敏感。

title: CEER: Compliant End-Effector and Root Control as a Unified Interface for Hierarchical Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
summary:
Humanoid robots have achieved impressive locomotion performance, yet contact-rich and long-horizon manipulation remains a major bottleneck. Manipulation is inherently contact-rich and demands compliant whole-body control for stable interaction, while its diversity and long-horizon nature favor modular, planner-compatible interfaces over joint-space tracking.
  We propose CEER, a compliant end-effector-root (EE-root) control abstraction for modular humanoid loco-manipulation within a hierarchical planning framework. CEER enables compliance-aware whole-body control in an interpretable task space defined by root motion commands and end-effector pose targets, and supports plug-and-play integration with heterogeneous high-level planners. A teacher-student framework is adopted to distill a general motion-tracking controller into a low-level policy that consumes only EE-root commands.
  We further construct a hierarchical system that integrates heterogeneous planners and task modules through the EE-root interface, enabling diverse manipulation tasks without retraining the underlying whole-body policy. Experiments in simulation and on hardware demonstrate 3.3 cm end-effector tracking accuracy with substantially reduced jerk compared to baselines, stable contact-rich manipulation under teleoperation, and up to 70% success in simulated single-object loco-manipulation tasks within a room-scale environment. These results indicate that compliant EE-root control provides a practical abstraction for humanoid loco-manipulation, enabling modular and scalable integration of diverse skills.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CEER（Compliant End-Effector-Root）控制抽象，用于模块化人形机器人运动-操作协同任务，通过合规感知的末端执行器与根部运动接口，在分层规划框架中实现稳定、多样、长时程的接触丰富操作，无需重训练底层全身控制器。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人在运动方面已取得显著进展，但在接触丰富、长时程的操作任务上仍存在瓶颈；操作任务需要合规的全身控制以保障交互稳定性，同时其多样性与长时序特性要求模块化、可规划的高层接口，而非低层关节空间跟踪。
AI.method: 提出CEER——一种基于末端执行器与机器人根部（root）位姿指令的合规性任务空间控制抽象；采用教师-学生框架将通用运动跟踪控制器蒸馏为仅接收EE-root命令的轻量级低层策略；构建基于EE-root接口的分层系统，集成异构高层规划器与任务模块。
AI.result: 仿真与实机实验表明：末端执行器跟踪精度达3.3 cm、抖动显著低于基线；在遥操作下实现稳定的接触丰富操作；在房间尺度仿真环境中单物体loco-manipulation任务成功率最高达70%。
AI.conclusion: CEER提供了一种实用、模块化且可扩展的人形机器人运动-操作协同控制抽象，支持多样化技能的即插即用集成，是迈向通用具身智能的重要一步。

title: Neuron Incidence Redistribution for Fairness in Medical Image Classification
summary: Deep learning models for medical image classification are susceptible to subgroup performance disparities across demographic attributes such as age, gender, and race. We identify a latent representational mechanism underlying these disparities: in transfer-learned models, the dominant penultimate-layer activation channel under positive predictions is co-activated by both disease-positive samples and privileged demographic groups (male, older patients), producing over-diagnosis; conversely, the dominant channel under negative predictions is co-activated by disadvantaged groups (female, younger patients), producing systematic under-diagnosis. To address this, we propose Neuron Incidence Redistribution (NIR), a lightweight regularization method that penalizes the variance of predicted-probability-weighted mean activations across penultimate-layer neurons, requiring no demographic labels at training time. On HAM10000, TPR disparity drops from 10.81% to 0.93% across age groups and from 12.04% to 0.74% across gender, with a marginal AUC improvement of 0.51 points. On Harvard OCT-RNFL, NIR reduces FPR disparity for race (from 15.68% to 10.66%) and age (from 12.69% to 1.80%), demonstrating that distributing latent disease evidence across the full penultimate layer is a principled and effective strategy for improving demographic fairness in medical AI.

AI.tldr: 本文发现迁移学习模型中潜在表征机制导致医疗图像分类在不同人口统计学群体间的表现差异，并提出一种无需人口统计标签的轻量级正则化方法NIR来缓解该问题，显著降低各群体间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医疗图像分类中容易在年龄、性别、种族等人口统计学属性上出现子群体性能差异，亟需理解其内在机制并提出公平性改进方法。
AI.method: 提出Neuron Incidence Redistribution (NIR) 方法，通过惩罚预测概率加权的倒数第二层神经元平均激活值的方差来进行正则化，无需训练时的人口统计标签。
AI.result: 在HAM10000数据集上，年龄组TPR差异从10.81%降至0.93%，性别组从12.04%降至0.74%，AUC提升0.51；在Harvard OCT-RNFL上，种族FPR差异从15.68%降至10.66%，年龄组从12.69%降至1.80%。
AI.conclusion: 将疾病证据分散到整个倒数第二层是提升医疗AI人口统计公平性的有效且原理清晰的策略。

title: Pseudocode-Guided Structured Reasoning for Automating Reliable Inference in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are becoming the cornerstone of high-level reasoning for robotic automation, enabling robots to parse natural language commands and perceive their environments. However, their susceptibility to hallucinations introduces critical failures in decision-making, posing significant safety and reliability risks in physical deployments. This challenge is exacerbated by the open-ended nature of real-world tasks, where questions vary vastly in difficulty and modality, demanding robust and adaptable reasoning strategies. To tackle this, we propose the Pseudocode-guided Structured Reasoning framework (PStar), which adaptively selects structured pseudocode reasoning paths to help VLMs perform flexible and step-by-step reasoning. We first design a set of abstract reasoning functions and formulate a structured pseudocode library to represent modular reasoning strategies. Crucially, we design a Difficulty Feature Vector (DFV) that allows the model to assess question complexity and adaptively choose appropriate reasoning strategies-enhancing robustness and interpretability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PStar significantly reduces hallucination rates, achieving state-of-the-art scores of 87.1% on POPE and 68.0% on MMStar, outperforming even GPT-4V. By providing a validated mechanism to reduce visual-language errors, PStar offers a critical step toward deploying more trustworthy and deterministic VLMs for real-world automated systems, where such errors can lead to catastrophic outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PStar框架，通过伪代码引导的结构化推理来减少视觉语言模型（VLM）在机器人任务中的幻觉问题，提升其鲁棒性、可解释性与实际部署可靠性。
AI.motivation: VLM在机器人自动化中易产生幻觉，导致决策失败，尤其在开放、多变的真实任务中风险突出，亟需提升其可靠性与安全性。
AI.method: 提出Pseudocode-guided Structured Reasoning（PStar）框架：构建抽象推理函数库与结构化伪代码库，并设计难度特征向量（DFV）实现对问题复杂度的感知与自适应推理路径选择。
AI.result: 在POPE和MMStar基准上分别达到87.1%和68.0%准确率，超越GPT-4V，显著降低幻觉率。
AI.conclusion: PStar为提升VLM在真实自动化系统中的可信性与确定性提供了有效且可验证的技术路径，对高安全要求场景具有重要应用价值。

title: Synthesis and Evaluation of Long-term History-aware Medical Dialogue
summary: An effective healthcare agent must be able to recall and reason over a patient's longitudinal medical history. However, the absence of datasets with realistic long-term dialogue timelines limits systematic evaluation. Real clinical text is constrained by privacy and ethics, while existing benchmarks focus on isolated interactions, failing to capture cross-session reasoning. We introduce a framework for synthesizing high-quality, long-term medical dialogues with LLMs. Our approach entails a knowledge-guided decomposition into three stages: constructing synthetic patient profiles with diverse disease and complication trajectories, generating multi-turn dialogues per encounter, and integrating them into a coherent longitudinal history dataset, MediLongChat. We establish three benchmark tasks-In-dialogue Reasoning, Cross-dialogue Reasoning, and Synthesis Reasoning-to evaluate the memory capabilities of healthcare agents. To assess data quality, we introduce a multi-dimensional evaluation framework combining vector-based metrics with LLM-as-a-judge assessments. Specifically, we define automatic measures-Faithfulness, Coherence, and Diversity-together with two LLM-based evaluations: Correctness and Realism. Benchmark experiments show that even state-of-the-art LLMs struggle with MediLongChat. These findings highlight the benchmark's applicability and underscore the need for tailored methods to advance healthcare agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用大语言模型合成高质量、长期医疗对话数据集MediLongChat的框架，并构建了三个评估医疗智能体记忆能力的新基准任务，同时设计了多维度数据质量评估方法。实验表明现有最先进大模型在此基准上表现不佳，凸显了开发专用方法的必要性。
AI.motivation: 缺乏具有真实长期对话时间线的医疗数据集，限制了对医疗智能体纵向记忆与推理能力的系统性评估；真实临床文本受隐私和伦理限制，而现有基准仅关注单次交互，无法支持跨会话推理。
AI.method: 提出知识引导的三阶段合成框架：1）构建具有多样化疾病及并发症发展轨迹的合成患者档案；2）为每次就诊生成多轮对话；3）整合为连贯的纵向医疗历史数据集MediLongChat；并设计三种推理任务与多维评估框架（含向量指标与LLM-as-a-judge）。
AI.result: 构建了MediLongChat数据集与三项新基准任务；提出Faithfulness、Coherence、Diversity等自动指标及Correctness、Realism两类LLM评估；实验证明当前SOTA LLM在该基准上表现较差。
AI.conclusion: MediLongChat填补了长期医疗对话评估的空白，其挑战性验证了现有模型在纵向医疗推理上的不足，为未来医疗智能体的记忆建模与训练提供了重要基础与方向。

title: Beyond Binary Success: A Diagnostic Meta-Evaluation Framework for Fine-Grained Manipulation
summary: Fine-grained manipulation marks a regime where global scene context no longer suffices, and success hinges on the tight coupling of local attribute grounding, high-fidelity spatial perception, and constraint-respecting motor execution. However, current embodied AI benchmarks collapse these capacities into binary success rates, systematically inflating reported capabilities by up to 70% and masking the architectural bottlenecks that impede real-world deployment. We introduce MetaFine, a diagnostic meta-evaluation framework that disentangles manipulation competency along three axes: understanding, perception, and controlled behavior. Built on a compositional task graph, MetaFine absorbs heterogeneous external benchmarks and reconstructs them into diagnostic scenarios of varying complexity under a unified protocol. Evaluating state-of-the-art vision-language-action (VLA) models through this lens exposes severe dimension-specific failures invisible to conventional metrics. Through targeted causal intervention, we identify the visual encoder's ability to preserve local spatial structure as a key bottleneck for fine-grained precision: improving it directly unlocks previously inaccessible manipulation capabilities without modifying downstream policies. MetaFine further supports hybrid real-sim validation, using limited paired real-world rollouts to calibrate scalable simulation-based estimates for more stable physical benchmarking. By shifting evaluation from ranking to diagnosis, MetaFine turns benchmarking into an actionable compass for repairing the layered capacities underlying genuine physical dexterity. The MetaFine framework, benchmarks, and supporting resources will be publicly released at our project page: https://metafine.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaFine框架，用于诊断具身AI在细粒度操作任务中的能力缺陷，通过解耦理解、感知和受控行为三个维度，揭示现有模型在局部空间结构保持上的瓶颈，并支持真实-仿真混合验证。
AI.motivation: 当前具身AI基准测试仅依赖二值成功率，严重高估模型能力（最高达70%），掩盖了阻碍实际部署的架构瓶颈，尤其在细粒度操作所需的局部属性定位、高保真空间感知与约束满足动作执行方面。
AI.method: 提出MetaFine诊断性元评估框架，基于组合式任务图统一重构异构外部基准为多复杂度诊断场景；引入三维解耦评估（理解/感知/受控行为）；开展因果干预分析定位瓶颈；支持真实-仿真混合验证以校准仿真评估。
AI.result: 发现视觉编码器对局部空间结构的保持能力是关键瓶颈；提升该能力可不改动下游策略即解锁新操作能力；MetaFine能稳定量化物理操作能力并指导模型改进。
AI.conclusion: MetaFine将评估范式从排名转向诊断，使基准测试成为修复真实物理灵巧性所需分层能力的可操作指南，并将开源框架与资源。

title: Rebalancing Reference Frame Dominance to Improve Motion in Image-to-Video Models
summary: Image-to-video models often generate videos that remain overly static, compared to text-to-video models. While prior approaches mitigate this issue by weakening or modifying the image-conditioning signal, they often require additional training or sacrifice fidelity to the reference image. In this work, we identify \emph{reference-frame dominance} as a key mechanism behind motion suppression. We observe that non-reference frames in I2V models allocate excessive self-attention to reference-frame key tokens, causing reference information to be over-propagated across time and suppressing inter-frame dynamics. Based on this finding, we propose DyMoS~(Dynamic Motion Slider), a training-free and model-agnostic method that rebalances the attention pathway from generated frames to the reference frame during initial denoising steps. DyMoS leaves both the input image and model weights unchanged and introduces a single scalar parameter for continuous control over motion strength. Experiments across multiple state-of-the-art I2V backbones demonstrate that DyMoS consistently improves motion dynamics while maintaining visual quality and fidelity to the reference image.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DyMoS方法，通过在初始去噪步骤中动态调整生成帧对参考帧的注意力路径，解决图像到视频模型中因参考帧主导导致的运动抑制问题，无需额外训练且保持图像保真度。
AI.motivation: 图像到视频模型生成的视频往往过于静态，而现有方法在减弱或修改图像条件信号时通常需要额外训练或牺牲图像保真度。
AI.method: 识别出‘参考帧主导’是运动抑制的关键机制，并提出无需训练、模型无关的DyMoS方法，在初始去噪阶段重新平衡生成帧对参考帧的注意力路径，仅引入一个标量参数控制运动强度。
AI.result: 在多个先进I2V骨干模型上验证，DyMoS能持续提升运动动态性，同时保持视觉质量和参考图像保真度。
AI.conclusion: DyMoS是一种高效、通用且无需训练的改进方案，有效缓解图像到视频生成中的运动抑制问题。

title: Transforming Constraint Programs to Input for Local Search
comment: Unpublished paper accepted and presented at the Fourteenth International Workshop on Constraint Modelling and Reformulation (ModRef) in 2015
summary: Applying local search algorithms to combinatorial optimization problems is not an easy feat. Typically, human intervention is required to compile the constraints to input data for some metaheuristic algorithm. In this paper, we establish a link between symmetry properties of constraint optimization problems and local search neighborhoods, and we use this link to automatically generate neighborhoods from a constraint specification in the context of the IDP system. We evaluate the obtained neighborhoods for six classical optimization problems. The resulting observations support the viability of this technique.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于约束优化问题对称性自动构建局部搜索邻域的方法，并在IDP系统中实现和验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 应用局部搜索算法解决组合优化问题通常需要人工干预来将约束编译为元启发式算法的输入数据，过程繁琐且易出错。
AI.method: 建立约束优化问题的对称性与局部搜索邻域之间的联系，并利用该联系，在IDP系统中从约束规格说明自动推导生成邻域结构。
AI.result: 在六个经典优化问题上评估了自动生成的邻域，实验结果表明该方法具有可行性。
AI.conclusion: 对称性可作为自动构造高质量局部搜索邻域的关键桥梁，从而减少人工设计邻域的负担，提升约束优化求解的自动化水平。

title: Towards Trust Calibration in Socially Interactive Agents: Investigating Gendered Multimodal Behaviors Generation with LLMs
summary: As Socially Interactive Agents (SIAs) become increasingly integrated into daily life, the ability to calibrate user trust to an agent's actual capabilities would help ensure appropriate usage of these agents. In this paper, we explore the capacity of Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate multimodal behaviors (verbal, vocal, gestural, and facial expression modalities) that reflect varying levels of ability and benevolence, two key dimensions of trustworthiness. We propose a novel method for automatically generating behaviors aligned with specific levels of these traits, a first step towards enabling nuanced and trust-calibrated interactions. By analyzing a large dataset of multimodal transcripts generated by LLMs, we demonstrate that GPT-5.4 is able to produce coherent behavior across different modalities (text, intonation, facial expression, and gesture). Using Random Forest feature importance analysis, we show that the generated behaviors align with theoretical expectations for ability and benevolence. However, we also find that when gender is specified in the prompt, LLMs tend to reproduce societal gender stereotypes, associating male agents' behaviors with high ability and female agents' behaviors with high benevolence. To validate our approach, we conducted a user study on Prolific using a within-subjects design. Participants perceived different levels of ability and benevolence in the generated behaviors align with the intended instructions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用大语言模型（LLM）自动生成反映能力与善意两个信任维度的多模态行为（言语、语音、手势、表情）的方法，并验证了其有效性，但也揭示了提示中指定性别时模型会复现社会性别刻板印象的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着社交互动智能体（SIAs）日益融入日常生活，需使其用户信任水平与其实际能力相匹配，以保障恰当使用；而能力与善意是信任度的两大核心维度。
AI.method: 提出一种新方法，使LLM（如GPT-5.4）自动产生符合特定能力与善意水平的多模态行为；基于大规模LLM生成的多模态转录数据集，结合随机森林特征重要性分析进行验证；并通过Prolific平台开展被试内设计的用户研究。
AI.result: GPT-5.4能跨文本、语调、面部表情和手势模态生成一致且可信的行为；生成行为符合理论预期的能力与善意表征；但当提示含性别信息时，模型显著复现性别刻板印象（男性→高能力，女性→高善意）；用户研究证实参与者能准确感知不同意图设定下的能力与善意水平。
AI.conclusion: LLM具备生成信任可校准的多模态行为的潜力，是迈向精细化人机信任调节的重要一步，但须警惕并缓解其在性别等社会维度上的偏见复现问题。

title: Minimalist Visual Inertial Odometry
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Visual-Inertial Odometry(VIO), which is critical to mobile robot navigation, uses cameras with a large number of pixels. Capturing and processing camera images requires significant resources. This work presents a minimalist approach to planar odometry, demonstrating that just four visual measurements and an IMU can provide robust motion estimation for differential-drive robots. Our key insight is that four downward-facing photodiodes that sense the world through optical Gabor masks produce signals that encode speed. Based on this, we jointly optimize the mask parameters alongside a Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN) using a physically-grounded simulator. The resulting model decodes speed from just the four measurements produced by the photodiodes. Pairing these estimates with the angular speed from an IMU yields a continuous planar trajectory. We validate our approach with a prototype sensor mounted on a differential drive robot. Across diverse indoor and outdoor terrains, our system closely tracks the reference ground truth without any real-world fine-tuning. Our work shows that minimalist sensing enables efficient and accurate planar odometry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种极简的平面里程计方法，仅用四个带Gabor光学掩模的向下光敏二极管加IMU，即可实现差速机器人鲁棒运动估计。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉惯性里程计（VIO）依赖高像素相机，计算与资源开销大；本文旨在探索更轻量、高效且鲁棒的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计四个带光学Gabor掩模的向下光敏二极管，其输出信号编码速度信息；联合优化掩模参数与时序卷积网络（TCN），在物理仿真器中训练；结合IMU角速度估计生成连续平面轨迹。
AI.result: 原型传感器在多种室内外地形上无需实机微调，即可紧密跟踪参考真值轨迹，验证了方法的有效性与泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 极简传感（4通道光信号+IMU）足以支撑高效、准确的平面里程计，为资源受限机器人提供新范式。

title: Vision Harnessing Agent for Open Ad-hoc Segmentation
summary: Segmentation has become easy when the concept is known, requiring retrieval of a learned visual grounding from text. It remains hard for open ad-hoc concepts, where the grounding may not exist as one learned mask and must often be constructed from image evidence through parts, relations, exclusions, and collections. We propose a Vision-guided Ad-hoc Segmentation Agent (VASA), the first vision harnessing agent for open ad-hoc segmentation. VASA is training-free and couples a VLM agent, a segmentation foundation model, and a visually grounded workflow. Rather than revising text prompts alone, VASA uses a persistent working mask to reason, construct, and validate a solution. It plans visual operations, invokes segmentation tools, inspects results, edits the mask, and recovers from errors. We construct PARS, a new benchmark that turns part-level labels in PartImageNet into open ad-hoc concepts through long-form definition queries. On PARS, VASA outperforms open-vocabulary, reasoning-based, and agentic baselines, surpassing SAM3 Agent by 14-25%. On RefCOCOm, a standard multi-granularity referring segmentation benchmark, VASA improves over SAM3 Agent by 5-9% and over other agentic baselines by up to 20%. These results validate agentic visual construction for open ad-hoc segmentation. Our work points to a path for AI agents beyond wrapping foundation models as tools: Programming them with task knowledge, VLM behavior, visual routines, working memory, and failure-aware workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的视觉引导型即席分割智能体VASA，通过结合视觉语言模型（VLM）代理、分割基础模型和视觉接地工作流，利用持久性工作掩码进行视觉操作规划、结果检验与错误恢复，在开放即席分割任务（如新构建的PARS基准）上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法在已知概念下表现良好，但在开放即席概念（如需从部件、关系、排除或集合中构造目标）下仍困难，因缺乏预学习的视觉接地。
AI.method: 提出VASA：一个无需训练的视觉引导即席分割智能体，采用VLM代理驱动、分割基础模型执行、视觉接地工作流协调的架构；核心是使用持久性工作掩码进行推理、构造与验证，并支持视觉操作规划、工具调用、结果检查、掩码编辑和错误恢复。
AI.result: 在新建基准PARS上，VASA比SAM3 Agent高14–25%；在RefCOCOm上，比SAM3 Agent高5–9%，比其他智能体基线高至20%。
AI.conclusion: 证明了‘智能体式视觉构造’对开放即席分割的有效性，并指出AI智能体的发展方向应超越简单封装基础模型，而需融入任务知识、VLM行为建模、视觉例程、工作记忆与容错工作流。

title: Beyond Rational Illusion: Behaviorally Realistic Strategic Classification
summary: Strategic classification(SC) studies the interaction between decision models and agents who strategically manipulate their features for favorable outcomes. Existing SC frameworks typically rely on the idealized assumption that agents are strictly rational. However, evidence from behavioral economics and psychology consistently shows that real-world decision-making is often shaped by cognitive biases, deviating from pure rationality. To formalize this limitation, we identify and define a new problem setting, termed the behaviorally realistic strategic classification problem, where agents' strategic manipulations deviate from full rationality due to psychological biases. Motivated by the identified limitation, we propose the Prospect-Guided Strategic Framework (Pro-SF) to address the problem, a principled framework grounded in prospect theory to model and learn under behaviorally realistic strategic responses. Specifically, to capture behaviorally realistic strategic manipulations, our framework reformulates the Stackelberg-style interaction between agents and the decision-maker by incorporating three key mechanisms inspired by prospect theory, including the asymmetry between benefits and costs, different subjective reference points, and non-rational probability distortion. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets establish Pro-SF as a behaviorally grounded approach to strategic classification, bridging machine learning and behavioral economics for more reliable deployment in the real world.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种行为现实的战略分类框架Pro-SF，基于前景理论建模非完全理性代理人的策略性特征操纵，克服了传统战略分类中假设代理人严格理性的局限。
AI.motivation: 现有战略分类框架假设代理人严格理性，但行为经济学与心理学研究表明真实决策常受认知偏差影响，偏离纯理性，因此需建立更符合现实的行为模型。
AI.method: 提出Prospect-Guided Strategic Framework（Pro-SF），将前景理论的三大机制——损益不对称性、主观参照点差异、非理性概率扭曲——融入Stackelberg博弈建模中，以刻画行为现实的策略响应。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上的实验表明，Pro-SF能更准确建模代理人的非理性策略行为，显著提升战略分类在现实场景中的可靠性与适用性。
AI.conclusion: Pro-SF成功融合机器学习与行为经济学，为战略分类提供了行为基础扎实的新范式，推动其向更可靠的实际部署迈进。

title: Chunking German Legal Code
summary: This paper investigates chunking strategies for retrieval-augmented generation on German statutory law, using the German Civil Code as a structured benchmark corpus. We implement and compare a range of segmentation approaches, including structural units (sections, subsections, sentences, propositions), fixed-size windows, contextual chunking, semantic clustering, Lumber-style chunking, and RAPTOR-based hierarchical retrieval. All methods are evaluated on a legal question-answering dataset with section-level gold labels, measuring recall, query latency, index build time, and storage requirements. Results show that chunking strategies aligned with the inherent legal structure - particularly section and subsection - based retrieval-achieve the highest recall, while more complex approaches that override this structure perform worse. These simpler methods also offer favorable computational efficiency compared to LLM-intensive techniques such as contextual chunking, RAPTOR, and Lumber. The findings highlight a key trade-off between semantic enrichment and operational cost, and demonstrate that preserving domain-specific structure is critical for effective legal information retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了德国民法典中检索增强生成的分块策略，发现基于法律结构（如章节、小节）的简单分块方法在召回率和计算效率上优于复杂的语义分块方法。
AI.motivation: 探索适用于德国法定法律文本的检索增强生成（RAG）分块策略，以提升法律问答系统的性能。
AI.method: 实现并比较多种分块方法，包括结构性单元（章节、小节、句子、命题）、固定窗口、上下文分块、语义聚类、Lumber风格分块及RAPTOR分层检索，并在德国民法典基准数据集上评估。
AI.result: 基于法律结构的分块（尤其是章节和小节）获得最高召回率，且计算效率更优；而复杂语义方法（如RAPTOR、Lumber、上下文分块）表现较差且开销更高。
AI.conclusion: 在法律领域，保留领域特有结构比追求语义丰富性更重要，简单结构化分块是更优选择。

title: Topology-Optimized Pneumatic Soft Actuator: Design and Experimental Validation
summary: This paper demonstrates the computational design of soft elastomeric pneumatic actuators using nonlinear topology optimization. An existing density- and porohyperelasticity-based topology optimization framework was extended from 2D to 3D and used to generate two manufacturable actuator designs, which were then studied numerically and experimentally. For both designs, the objective was to maximize the bending response for a prescribed actuation pressure under two different allowable strain limits. A key advantage of the employed topology optimization framework is that it can consistently, during the optimization, account for the very large deformations induced upon pressurization. The two optimized 3D designs were fabricated using stereolithography and experimentally tested to validate their performance.

AI.tldr: 本文通过非线性拓扑优化方法，实现了软弹性气动执行器的计算设计，并在3D中扩展了密度与多孔超弹性拓扑优化框架，生成并实验验证了两种可制造的弯曲响应优化执行器。
AI.motivation: 为提升软体气动执行器在大变形下的性能设计效率与精度，需发展能准确建模大变形行为的计算设计方法。
AI.method: 将基于密度和多孔超弹性性的拓扑优化框架从2D扩展至3D，以在优化过程中一致地处理加压引起的大变形；目标是给定驱动压力和应变限制下最大化弯曲响应；采用立体光刻（SLA）制造优化结构并进行实验验证。
AI.result: 成功生成两种可制造的3D优化执行器设计，数值模拟与实验结果表明其在指定压力和应变约束下具有优异的弯曲响应性能。
AI.conclusion: 所扩展的非线性拓扑优化框架适用于软体气动执行器的高效、高保真设计，且能兼顾大变形力学行为与可制造性。

title: KappaPlace: Learning Hyperspherical Uncertainty for Visual Place Recognition via Prototype-Anchored Supervision
summary: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) is critical for autonomous navigation, yet state-of-the-art methods lack well-calibrated uncertainty estimation. Standard pipelines cannot reliably signal when a query is ambiguous or a match is likely incorrect, posing risks in safety-critical robotics. We propose KappaPlace, a principled framework for learning uncertainty-aware VPR representations. Our core contribution is a Prototype-Anchored supervision strategy that leverages latent class representatives as targets for a probabilistic objective. By modeling image descriptors as von Mises-Fisher (vMF) variables, we learn a lightweight module to predict the concentration parameter as a direct proxy for aleatoric uncertainty. While existing VPR uncertainty methods are typically restricted to a query-centric view, we derive a novel match-level formulation to quantify the reliability of specific query-reference pairs. Across five diverse benchmarks, KappaPlace reduces Expected Calibration Error (ECE@K) by up to 50% compared to existing methods while maintaining or improving retrieval recall. We provide both a joint-training variant and a post-training extension for frozen backbones. Our results demonstrate that KappaPlace provides a robust, stable, and well-calibrated signal that enables reliable decision-making within the VPR pipeline. Our code is available at: https://github.com/mayayank95/UncertaintyAwareVPR

AI.tldr: 本文提出KappaPlace框架，通过原型锚定监督策略和vMF分布建模，实现视觉地点识别中匹配对级别的不确定性估计，显著提升校准性而不牺牲召回率。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉地点识别（VPR）方法缺乏良好校准的不确定性估计，难以在安全关键型机器人应用中可靠判断查询模糊性或匹配错误风险。
AI.method: 提出Prototype-Anchored监督策略，将图像描述符建模为von Mises-Fisher（vMF）变量，并学习轻量模块预测浓度参数作为偶然不确定性代理；创新性地构建匹配级别（而非仅查询级别）的不确定性量化。
AI.result: 在五个基准上，KappaPlace将期望校准误差（ECE@K）降低最多50%，同时保持或提升检索召回率；支持联合训练与冻结主干网络的后训练扩展。
AI.conclusion: KappaPlace提供鲁棒、稳定且良好校准的不确定性信号，可增强VPR流程中的可靠决策能力。

title: Projecting Latent RL Actions: Towards Generalizable and Scalable Graph Combinatorial Optimization
summary: Graph combinatorial optimization (GCO) has attracted growing interest, as many NP-hard problems naturally admit graph formulations, yet their combinatorial explosion renders exact methods computationally intractable. Recent advances in Reinforcement Learning (RL) combined with Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have significantly improved learning-based GCO solvers. However, existing approaches face limitations in both generalization across diverse graph instances and computational scalability as action spaces grow. To address both challenges, we introduce projection agents, a novel RL-GCO approach that operates directly in a continuous GNN-based action embedding space, predicting a desired latent action in a single forward pass and subsequently decoding it into a valid discrete action. Additionally, we enable fair comparison across RL methods through a shared embedding space for both observations and actions. Across diverse benchmarks, our approach achieves up to 16.2x faster inference and up to 40% better generalization than existing solutions using only simple nearest-neighbor decoding, while opening the door to strong RL performance in super-linear decision spaces with multiple interdependent variables. Finally, we release LaGCO-RL, a Python library that automates latent action-space construction and supports existing RL-GCO solutions, promoting reproducibility and adaptation to new GCO benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为projection agents的新型RL-GCO方法，通过在连续GNN动作嵌入空间中直接预测潜在动作并解码为有效离散动作，显著提升了泛化能力和计算可扩展性；实验表明其推理速度快达16.2倍、泛化性能提升达40%，并开源了LaGCO-RL库以促进复现与适配。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习与图神经网络的图组合优化求解器在跨图实例泛化能力与动作空间扩大时的计算可扩展性方面存在局限。
AI.method: 引入projection agents，将动作空间投影到连续的GNN嵌入空间，在单次前向传播中预测目标潜在动作，并通过简单最近邻解码映射为有效离散动作；同时统一观测与动作的嵌入空间以实现方法间公平比较。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，推理速度提升最高达16.2倍，泛化性能提升最高达40%；支持超线性决策空间与多变量强依赖场景下的高效RL求解。
AI.conclusion: projection agents为RL-GCO提供了更高效、更具泛化性的新范式，并通过开源LaGCO-RL库推动该领域可复现性与新基准适配。

title: LP-Eval: Rubric and Dataset for Measuring the Quality of Legal Proposition Generation
summary: Legal proposition generation is central to legal reasoning and doctrinal scholarship, yet remain under-examined in Legal NLP. This paper investigates the automatic generation and evaluation of legal propositions from decisions of the Court of Justice of the European Union using large language models (LLMs). We introduce LP-Eval, a three-step evaluation rubric co-designed with legal experts that decomposes legal proposition quality into formal validity and substantive dimensions. Using this rubric, we release a dataset of two experts' annotations for 100 LLM-generated legal propositions. Our results show that LLMs can generate predominantly well-formed and high-quality propositions, while expert evaluations reveal higher quality for propositions derived from well established cases than from recent ones. We further examine LLMs as evaluators and find that rubric-guided LLM judgments align more closely with expert assessments than direct overall scoring, but remain insensitive to finer-grained distinctions captured by human experts.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用大语言模型（LLM）自动生成和评估欧洲法院判决中的法律命题，提出了由法律专家共同设计的三步评估框架LP-Eval，并发布了含100条LLM生成命题及两位专家标注的数据集；结果显示LLM能生成高质量命题，但对较新判例效果较差；此外，基于该框架的LLM评估结果虽优于直接打分，但仍难以捕捉人类专家所识别的细微差异。
AI.motivation: 法律命题生成在法律推理与教义学研究中至关重要，但在法律自然语言处理（Legal NLP）中尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出LP-Eval三步评估框架（含形式有效性与实质维度），结合法律专家协同设计与标注，构建包含100条LLM生成法律命题及双专家标注的数据集，并对比分析LLM作为生成器与评估器的表现。
AI.result: LLM可生成多数形式正确、质量较高的法律命题；专家评估显示，源自经典判例的命题质量高于新近判例；LLM按LP-Eval框架评分比直接总体打分更接近专家判断，但仍无法识别专家所关注的细粒度差异。
AI.conclusion: LLM在法律命题生成方面具备实用潜力，但其生成与评估能力受限于判例的新旧程度与人类专家所把握的深层法律判断维度，需进一步结合领域知识与精细化评估机制。

title: Hamilton--Jacobi Reachability for Spacecraft Collision Avoidance
comment: Accepted to the 20th IEEE International Conference on Control & Automation (IEEE ICCA 2026). 6 pages, 4 figures
summary: This article presents a Hamilton--Jacobi (HJ) reachability framework for a two--satellite collision avoidance problem operating in the same circular orbit, where relative motion is modeled in the radial--tangential--normal (RTN) frame using planar Hill--Clohessy--Wiltshire (HCW) dynamics. We define the target state space as unsafe relative configurations in the orbit plane corresponding to minimum separation requirements consistent with Federal Communications Commission (FCC) orbital standards. The interaction between spacecraft is formulated as a zero--sum differential game, where Player 1 is the controlled satellite and Player 2 is modeled as a bounded adversarial disturbance with unknown intent. We present the HJ formulation and compute backward reachable sets that characterize relative states from which collision cannot be avoided under worst-case disturbances, while states outside this set admit provably collision-free trajectories. These reachable sets are integrated with supervisory hybrid control logic to determine when evasive maneuvers must be initiated, enabling mathematically grounded safety guarantees for scalability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Hamilton-Jacobi（HJ）可达性理论的双卫星同轨碰撞规避框架，建模为零和微分博弈，通过计算反向可达集提供数学保证的安全规避策略。
AI.motivation: 保障同轨道运行卫星间的碰撞规避安全，满足FCC轨道标准，并应对未知意图的干扰威胁。
AI.method: 采用RTN坐标系下的平面Hill-Clohessy-Wiltshire动力学建模相对运动；将卫星交互建模为零和微分博弈（受控卫星为Player 1，有界对抗扰动为Player 2）；利用HJ可达性理论计算反向可达集，并结合监督式混合控制逻辑触发规避机动。
AI.result: 生成了表征‘在最坏扰动下仍不可避免碰撞’的相对状态集合；集合外的状态存在可证明无碰撞的轨迹；实现了具备可扩展性的、具数学安全保证的规避决策机制。
AI.conclusion: 该HJ可达性框架为同轨多卫星系统提供了形式化、可验证且可扩展的碰撞规避安全保障方法。

title: Targeted Downstream-Agnostic Attack
summary: Recently, pre-trained encoders have gained widespread use due to their strong capability in representation extraction. However, they are vulnerable to downstream-agnostic attacks (DAAs). Existing DAA methods operate under a permissive threat model, where an attack is successful if the generated downstream-agnostic adversarial examples (DAEs) change the original prediction, without requiring a specific target. In this paper, we propose a Targeted DAA (TDAA) method under a stricter threat model requiring the attack to be both targeted and downstream-agnostic. Since the downstream task is unknown and encoders do not directly produce predictions, achieving a targeted attack is particularly challenging. To address this, we introduce a novel component termed the 'threat image', pre-selected by the attacker as the target. Specifically, a generator is designed to produce example-specific adversarial perturbations that compel the victim encoder to output identical features for both the DAEs and the threat image. Unlike previous DAA methods that generate a single shared perturbation for all samples, which often fails due to image diversity, our method adopts an example-specific paradigm. This generates tailored perturbations for each image to ensure a high attack success rate and invisibility. By leveraging the threat image as a feature-level anchor, our method builds a task-agnostic bridge to reveal the vulnerabilities of the victim encoder. Extensive experiments on 10 self-supervised methods across 3 benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach and reveal the pronounced vulnerability of pre-trained encoders. The code will be made publicly available after the review period.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对预训练编码器的定向下游无关攻击（TDAA）方法，通过引入‘威胁图像’作为特征级锚点，生成样本特定的对抗扰动，使编码器对对抗样本和威胁图像输出相同特征，从而在未知下游任务下实现高成功率且隐蔽的定向攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有下游无关攻击（DAA）方法仅要求改变原始预测，缺乏目标性；而预训练编码器不直接输出预测结果、下游任务未知，使得实现定向攻击极具挑战。
AI.method: 提出Targeted DAA（TDAA）方法：设计一个生成器，为每个输入图像生成样本特定的对抗扰动，迫使受害者编码器对生成的下游无关对抗样本（DAEs）和预选的‘威胁图像’输出一致的特征表示。
AI.result: 在3个基准数据集、10种自监督方法上的大量实验表明，该方法攻击成功率高、扰动不可见，并显著揭示了预训练编码器的脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 预训练编码器在下游任务未知的情况下仍存在严重定向攻击风险；引入威胁图像作为特征锚点的样本特定攻击范式，有效 bridged 任务无关性与定向性之间的鸿沟，为评估编码器鲁棒性提供了新视角。

title: CLIF: Concept-Level Influence Functions for Transparent Bottleneck Models
summary: In recent years, the black-box nature of deep learning models has limited their application in high-stakes domains such as medical diagnosis and finance, where interpretability is essential. To address this, we propose a novel approach using influence functions to enhance interpretability in NLP models at both the sample and concept levels. Experiments on CEBaB and Yelp datasets show that influence functions effectively identify the most impactful training samples, both helpful and harmful, on model predictions. By adjusting the labels and weights of these samples, we demonstrate that model performance can be restored to baseline levels without retraining, confirming the value of influence functions for efficient data debugging. Furthermore, our concept-level analysis identifies key concepts within Concept Bottleneck Models (CBM) that significantly affect predictions. Modifying these concepts alters model behavior observably, providing clear insights into the decision process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用影响函数提升NLP模型可解释性的新方法，涵盖样本级和概念级分析，在CEBaB和Yelp数据集上验证了其在数据调试和概念驱动决策理解中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型的黑箱特性限制了其在医疗诊断、金融等高风险领域的应用，亟需提升模型可解释性。
AI.method: 采用影响函数进行样本级（识别关键训练样本）和概念级（在概念瓶颈模型中识别关键概念）的可解释性分析，并通过调整样本标签/权重或概念值来验证影响。
AI.result: 影响函数能有效识别对预测有显著帮助或损害的训练样本；调整这些样本可恢复模型性能而不需重训练；在CBM中识别出的关键概念经修改后能明显改变模型行为。
AI.conclusion: 影响函数是一种高效、实用的工具，可用于NLP模型的数据调试与决策过程解释，兼顾样本级与概念级可解释性。

title: EUPHORIA: Efficient Universal Planning via Hybrid Optimization for Robust Industrial Robotic Assembly
summary: Robotic assembly in architectural construction faces a persistent bottleneck: existing planners are either highly specialized, requiring prohibitive retraining for every new geometric design, or operationally inefficient, treating structural sequencing and kinematic motion as disjoint processes. We present EUPHORIA, a unified framework that achieves universal few-shot adaptability and dynamic efficiency through a hybrid optimization strategy. To overcome the retraining bottleneck, we propose a Meta-Geometric Encoder based on Graph Hypernetworks: unlike standard contrastive learning, which performs only feature-level recognition, our hypernetwork dynamically generates policy parameters from a minimal support set, enabling parameter-level adaptation to complex topologies (e.g., domes, arches) without gradient-based retraining. For structural reasoning, we introduce a Physics-Informed Graph Transformer trained via Soft Actor-Critic (SAC), with a Physics-Bias Attention mechanism that modulates attention scores using contact forces from Discrete Element Model (DEM) simulations, guiding the planner toward structurally critical connections. We further ensure operational efficiency through Kinematics-Aware Sequencing, where the SAC objective penalizes high-energy transitions. Finally, we bridge the Sim2Real gap via Residual Stability Correction, a differentiable optimization layer that fine-tunes coarse assembly actions by minimizing a joint energy-stability cost prior to execution. Experiments show that EUPHORIA significantly reduces energy consumption over decoupled baselines and achieves state-of-the-art success rates on unseen, non-standard geometries with minimal few-shot examples, fusing meta-learning, physics-informed attention, and residual optimization into a cohesive, generalized planner.

AI.tldr: EUPHORIA是一个面向建筑机器人装配的统一规划框架，通过元几何编码器、物理感知图变换器、运动学感知序列规划和残差稳定性校正，实现少样本自适应、结构合理性和执行高效性的统一。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑机器人装配规划器要么高度专用、需为每个新几何设计重新训练，要么将结构排序与运动学规划割裂，导致操作低效。
AI.method: 提出EUPHORIA框架：1）基于图超网络的Meta-Geometric Encoder实现参数级少样本适应；2）结合离散元法（DEM）力反馈的Physics-Informed Graph Transformer进行结构推理；3）Kinematics-Aware Sequencing在SAC目标中惩罚高能耗动作；4）Residual Stability Correction层通过可微优化修正装配动作以提升稳定性。
AI.result: 在未见非标准几何体（如穹顶、拱）上达到SOTA成功率，显著降低能耗，且仅需极少几例示例即可泛化，无需梯度重训练。
AI.conclusion: EUPHORIA成功融合元学习、物理引导注意力与残差优化，构建出首个兼具通用性、结构性与实时可行性的建筑机器人装配规划器。

title: Are Tools Always Beneficial? Learning to Invoke Tools Adaptively for Dual-Mode Multimodal LLM Reasoning
summary: Tool-augmented reasoning has emerged as a promising direction for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). However, existing studies mainly focus on enabling models to perform tool invocation, while neglecting the necessity of invoking tools. We argue that tool usage is not always beneficial, as redundant or inappropriate invocations largely increase reasoning overhead and even mislead model predictions. To address this issue, we introduce AutoTool, a model that adaptively decides whether to invoke tools according to the characteristics of each query. Within a reinforcement learning framework, we design an explicit dual-mode reasoning strategy with mode-specific reward functions to guide the model toward producing accurate responses. Moreover, to prevent premature bias toward a single reasoning mode, AutoTool jointly explores and balances tool-assisted and text-centric reasoning throughout training, and promotes free exploration in later stages. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AutoTool exhibits outstanding performance and high efficiency, yielding a 21.8\% accuracy gain on V* benchmark compared to the base model, and a 44.9\% improvement in efficiency over existing tool-augmented methods on POPE benchmark. Code is available at https://github.com/MQinghe/AutoTool.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoTool，一种自适应决定是否调用工具的多模态大语言模型，通过强化学习框架中的双模式推理策略提升准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有工具增强推理方法忽视了工具调用的必要性，冗余或不当调用会增加开销甚至误导预测。
AI.method: 提出AutoTool模型，采用基于强化学习的显式双模式推理策略，配备模式特异性奖励函数，并在训练中联合探索与平衡工具辅助和纯文本推理，后期促进自由探索。
AI.result: 在V*基准上准确率提升21.8%，在POPE基准上效率提升44.9%。
AI.conclusion: AutoTool能自适应选择是否调用工具，在保证高准确率的同时显著提升推理效率。

title: Thinking in Scales: Accelerating Gigapixel Pathology Image Analysis via Adaptive Continuous Reasoning
summary: Traditional whole slide image (WSI) analysis methods typically rely on the multiple instance learning (MIL) paradigm, which extracts patch-level features at high magnification and aggregates them for slide-level prediction. However, such exhaustive patch-level processing is computationally expensive, severely limiting the efficiency and scalability of WSI analysis. To address this challenge, we propose PathCTM (a Pathology-oriented Continuous Thought Model) that enables token-efficient scale-space continuous reasoning for gigapixel WSIs. PathCTM formulates diagnostic inference as a dynamic sequential information pursuit. It progressively transitions from low-magnification global to high-magnification local inspection, and adaptively terminates inference when sufficient evidence is gathered to effectively bound decision uncertainty. Specifically, it uses conditional computation for dynamic scale switching with attention-guided region pruning, coupled with confidence-aware early stopping. Extensive experiments demonstrate that, compared with standard MIL-based methods, PathCTM reduces the number of required image patches by 95.95% and shortens inference time by approximately 95.62%, while maintaining AUC without degradation. Code is available at https://github.com/JSGe-AI/PathCTM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PathCTM模型，通过尺度空间连续推理与自适应早停机制，在保持诊断性能的同时大幅降低WSI分析的计算开销。
AI.motivation: 传统基于多实例学习（MIL）的全切片图像（WSI）分析方法需处理大量高倍率图像块，计算代价高昂，限制了效率与可扩展性。
AI.method: PathCTM将病理诊断建模为动态序列化信息搜寻过程，从低倍全局视图逐步过渡到高倍局部视图；采用注意力引导的区域剪枝与条件计算实现动态尺度切换，并结合置信度感知的早停机制。
AI.result: 相比标准MIL方法，PathCTM减少95.95%图像块数量、缩短约95.62%推理时间，且AUC无下降。
AI.conclusion: PathCTM实现了高效、可扩展且诊断性能不妥协的WSI分析新范式。

title: CogScale: Scalable Benchmark for Sequence Processing
summary: The ability to maintain and manipulate information over time is a fundamental aspect of living beings and Artificial Intelligence. While modern models have achieved remarkable success in tasks like natural language processing, evaluating the capacity of novel architectures to process sequential information remains computationally expensive and time-consuming. Testing a new architecture often requires scaling up to massive datasets and models, leading to vast computational costs and slow iteration cycles. In this paper, we propose CogScale, a benchmark of 14 scalable synthetic tasks designed to isolate and evaluate specific cognitive and memory abilities at different parametrizable scales. By providing a standardized, lightweight framework, CogScale allows researchers to rapidly validate architectural innovations before committing to large-scale training. To establish a solid baseline, we evaluate seven distinct architectures: Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU), Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), xLSTM, Echo State Network (ESN), Mamba, Transformer Decoder, and Transformer Encoder-Decoder. These evaluations are conducted under strict parameter budgets (1k, 10k, and 100k) and across different difficulty levels and scales. Our results show that while classical RNNs and Echo State Networks excel at basic retention within strict parameter budgets, only attention mechanisms and modern state-space models consistently maintain high performance as reasoning complexity and task difficulty scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CogScale基准，包含14个可扩展的合成任务，用于高效评估新型模型在认知与记忆能力方面的表现，尤其适用于参数受限下的快速架构验证。
AI.motivation: 现有评估新型序列模型架构的认知与记忆能力方法计算开销大、迭代慢，亟需轻量、标准化、可扩展的评测框架。
AI.method: 设计CogScale基准：14个可参数化调节难度与规模的合成任务，覆盖特定认知与记忆能力；在严格参数预算（1k/10k/100k）下，对7类主流架构（GRU、LSTM、xLSTM、ESN、Mamba、Transformer Decoder、Encoder-Decoder）进行系统评测。
AI.result: 经典RNN和ESN在极低参数量下保有基础记忆能力，但仅注意力机制与现代状态空间模型（如Mamba）能在任务复杂度和规模提升时持续保持高性能。
AI.conclusion: CogScale为架构创新提供了高效、低成本的前期验证工具；结果表明，结构归纳偏置（如注意力、状态空间建模）对可扩展认知能力至关重要，单纯增加参数无法替代先进机制。

title: Where Does Authorship Signal Emerge in Encoder-Based Language Models?
summary: Authorship attribution models fine-tuned with the same pretrained encoder, data, and loss can differ four-fold in performance depending only on their scoring mechanism. We use mechanistic interpretability tools to explain this gap. Stylistic features such as word length, punctuation density, and function-word frequency are equally available at every layer in every model, including in an off-the-shelf control encoder, hence the gap not coming from representation quality. Instead, causal intervention shows that the scorer determines where the encoder consolidates authorship signal. Mean pooling forces consolidation by early to mid layers, while late interaction defers it to later layers. We further derive this difference from the gradient structure of each scorer, and training dynamics reveal distinct learning trajectories that follow from that difference.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了作者归属模型中不同评分机制对性能的影响，发现即使使用相同的预训练编码器、数据和损失函数，仅改变评分机制就可能导致性能差异达四倍。通过机械可解释性工具分析，发现风格特征在各层都普遍存在，性能差异并非源于表征质量，而是由评分器决定编码器中作者归属信号的整合位置：均值池化迫使信号在早期到中期层整合，而晚期交互则将其推迟到后期层。此外，本文还从梯度结构和训练动态角度进一步解释了这一现象。
AI.motivation: 探究为何使用相同预训练编码器、数据和损失函数的作者归属模型，仅因评分机制不同就导致显著性能差异。
AI.method: 采用机械可解释性工具进行归因分析；通过因果干预定位作者归属信号在编码器中的整合位置；分析不同评分器（如均值池化与晚期交互）的梯度结构及对应训练动态。
AI.result: 发现风格特征（如词长、标点密度、功能词频率）在所有层（包括控制编码器）中均等可用，性能差异源于评分器对信号整合位置的调控：mean pooling 强制早期至中期整合，late interaction 推迟至后期；该差异可由评分器梯度结构推导，并体现在不同学习轨迹上。
AI.conclusion: 评分机制是影响作者归属模型性能的关键因素，其作用在于调控编码器中作者风格信号的整合时机与位置，而非提升表征本身的质量；该发现为设计更优评分策略和理解模型内部机制提供了新视角。

title: Sampling-Based Safe Reinforcement Learning
summary: Safe exploration remains a fundamental challenge in reinforcement learning (RL), limiting the deployment of RL agents in the real world. We propose Sampling-Based Safe Reinforcement Learning (SBSRL), a model-based RL algorithm that maintains safety throughout the learning process by enforcing constraints jointly across a finite set of dynamics samples. This formulation approximates an intractable worst-case optimization over uncertain dynamics and enables practical safety guarantees in continuous domains. We further introduce an exploration strategy based on constraining epistemic uncertainty, eliminating the need for explicit exploration bonuses. Under regularity conditions, we derive high-probability guarantees of safety throughout learning and a finite-time sample complexity bound for recovering a near-optimal policy. Empirically, SBSRL achieves safe and efficient exploration both in simulation and in real robotic hardware, and readily extends to practical deep-ensemble implementations that scale to high-dimensional continuous control problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于采样的安全强化学习（SBSRL）算法，通过在多个动力学模型样本上联合施加约束来保证学习过程中的安全性，并利用认知不确定性引导探索，无需额外的探索奖励；理论上有高概率安全保证和样本复杂度界，实验验证了其在仿真与真实机器人上的安全高效性。
AI.motivation: 安全探索是强化学习在现实世界部署中的根本挑战，现有方法难以在连续域中提供实用的安全保障。
AI.method: 提出采样型安全强化学习（SBSRL），采用模型基方法，在有限动力学样本集上联合施加安全约束以近似不确定动力学下的最坏情况优化；引入基于认知不确定性约束的探索策略，避免显式探索奖励；结合高斯过程或深度集成建模不确定性。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实机器人平台上均实现了安全且高效的探索；支持可扩展的深度集成实现，适用于高维连续控制任务。
AI.conclusion: SBSRL为模型基安全强化学习提供了兼具理论保证与实践可行性的新范式，显著提升了连续控制场景下RL的安全性与样本效率。

title: EventPrune: Cascaded Event-Assisted Token Pruning for Efficient First-Person Dynamic Spatial Reasoning
summary: First-person dynamic spatial reasoning requires models to track continuous motion and precise geometric structure, but the quadratic attention cost of Transformer-based Video-LLMs makes dense visual tokens computationally expensive. Existing token pruning paradigms predominantly rely on discrete static snapshots, failing to preserve the motion and geometric cues essential for reasoning. We propose Event Cascade Pruning (ECP), to our knowledge the first training-free framework that leverages the high-frequency motion cues from event cameras as a continuous event-guided motion prior to guide token selection. ECP combines three stages: Event-Triggered Causal Sampling to anchor motion-informative keyframes, Event-guided Motion Saliency Filtering to suppress event-inactive visual tokens, and Event-Attention Ranking Fusion to calibrate spatial attention with motion-salient dynamics. With 80% visual token reduction, ECP outperforms the full-token baseline (37.62% vs. 36.31%) while achieving 1.89x inference speedup and 52% GFLOPs reduction. We further introduce ESR-Real, the first real-world RGB-event benchmark for first-person spatial reasoning, where ECP improves accuracy by 2.68 percentage points over full-token baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Event Cascade Pruning（ECP），一种无需训练的视觉令牌剪枝框架，利用事件相机的高频运动线索指导视频大模型中的令牌选择，在大幅减少计算开销的同时提升第一人称动态空间推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer视频大模型因使用密集视觉令牌导致计算成本高；传统令牌剪枝方法依赖静态快照，无法保留运动与几何线索，难以支撑第一人称动态空间推理任务。
AI.method: 提出Event Cascade Pruning（ECP）三阶段方法：1）Event-Triggered Causal Sampling——基于事件流选取运动关键帧；2）Event-guided Motion Saliency Filtering——过滤事件不活跃的视觉令牌；3）Event-Attention Ranking Fusion——融合运动显著性校准空间注意力。
AI.result: 在80%视觉令牌削减下，ECP在基准上准确率从36.31%提升至37.62%，推理速度提升1.89倍，GFLOPs降低52%；在新构建的真实世界RGB-event数据集ESR-Real上，准确率提升2.68个百分点。
AI.conclusion: ECP首次将事件相机的连续运动先验引入视频大模型令牌剪枝，验证了运动驱动的动态稀疏化对第一人称空间推理的有效性与高效性，为轻量、实时视频理解提供了新范式。

title: What Really Improves Mathematical Reasoning: Structured Reasoning Signals Beyond Pure Code
summary: Code has become a standard component of modern foundation language model (LM) training, yet its role beyond programming remains unclear. We revisit the claim that code improves reasoning through controlled pretraining experiments on a 10T-token corpus with fine-grained domain separation. Our findings are threefold. First, when code is restricted to standalone executable programs and Code-NL data are controlled for, code substantially improves programming ability but does not act as a general reasoning enhancer; instead, it competes with knowledge-intensive tasks, especially complex mathematical reasoning. Second, the reasoning gains often attributed to code are better explained by cross-domain structured reasoning traces, such as code-text and math-text mixtures, rather than by executable code alone. Third, increasing the density of structured math-domain samples within a fixed math budget yields substantial gains on difficult mathematical reasoning while largely preserving programming performance, suggesting that cognitive scaffolds offer a targeted way to mitigate cross-domain trade-offs. Finally, routing analyses show that data-composition effects are reflected in expert-activation patterns, providing mechanism-level evidence for competitive and synergistic interactions across domains. Our results clarify which data characteristics transfer across capability dimensions and point to more precise data-centric optimization strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文通过控制预训练实验发现，代码数据虽显著提升编程能力，但并非通用推理增强器，反而会与知识密集型任务（尤其是复杂数学推理）产生竞争；真正提升推理能力的是跨领域结构化推理痕迹（如代码-文本、数学-文本混合），而非可执行代码本身；增加结构化数学样本密度可在保持编程性能的同时显著提升数学推理能力；路由分析进一步揭示了不同领域数据间的竞争与协同机制。
AI.motivation: 探究代码在现代大语言模型训练中的作用，特别是其是否真能提升通用推理能力，而不仅限于编程任务。
AI.method: 在10T-token语料库上开展细粒度领域分离的控制预训练实验，并结合路由分析考察专家激活模式。
AI.result: 1）代码显著提升编程能力，但不增强通用推理，且与数学推理等知识密集型任务存在竞争；2）推理提升主要源于代码-文本、数学-文本等跨领域结构化痕迹，而非纯可执行代码；3）在固定数学数据预算下提高结构化数学样本密度，可大幅提升数学推理能力并维持编程性能；4）路由分析证实了数据组成对专家激活模式的影响，揭示了跨领域竞争与协同机制。
AI.conclusion: 代码不是通用推理增强器，其作用高度依赖于数据结构与领域混合方式；提升特定能力应聚焦于引入对应的认知脚手架（如结构化跨域数据），而非简单增加某类数据比例；该研究为数据驱动的模型能力优化提供了更精准的策略方向。

title: What Are LLMs Doing to Scientific Communication? Measuring Changes in Writing Practices and Reading Experience
summary: Has the style of scientific communication changed due to the growing use of large language models in the writing process? We address this question in the domain of Natural Language Processing by leveraging two data resources we create: a naturalistic corpus of over 37,000 papers from the ACL Anthology (2020-2024); and a synthetic dataset of 3,000 human-written passages and their LLM-generated improvements. We first implement a series of diachronic lexical analyses, showing that both word frequency and usage contexts have changed significantly over time, indicating semantic specialization in some cases and generalization in others. Broadening our perspective, we then model a range of more complex stylistic features and find that LLM-modified texts more frequently contain certain syntactic constructions, more complex and longer words and a lower lexical diversity.
