Building on these capabilities, this paper presents VL-DPO, a vision-language-guided framework that aligns ego-vehicle motion forecasting models with human preferences. Our approach leverages a VLM as a zero-shot reasoner to automatically generate preference pairs from a pretrained model's rollouts, which are then used to finetune the model via Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). We finetune our models on the Waymo Open End-to-End Driving Dataset (WOD-E2E) and evaluate performance against held-out human preference annotations using rater feedback score (RFS) and average displacement error (ADE). Our experiments confirm that the VLM's trajectory selection is a high-quality proxy for human preference. Our final model, VL-DPO, yields an 11.94% increase in RFS and a 10.01% reduction in ADE over the pretrained model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VL-DPO框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）作为零样本推理器生成轨迹偏好对，通过直接偏好优化（DPO）微调自动驾驶运动预测模型，显著提升其与人类驾驶偏好的一致性。
AI.motivation: 标准模仿学习目标难以充分捕捉人类驾驶的复杂偏好，而视觉语言模型展现出强大的常识推理能力，可被用于建模人类偏好。
AI.method: 利用预训练VLM对同一场景下多个模型生成的轨迹进行零样本偏好打分，构建偏好数据对，再使用Direct Preference Optimization（DPO）方法微调运动预测模型。
AI.result: 在Waymo WOD-E2E数据集上，VL-DPO相比基线预训练模型，rater feedback score（RFS）提升11.94%，平均位移误差（ADE）降低10.01%。
AI.conclusion: VLM可作为高质量的人类偏好代理，VL-DPO能有效将运动预测模型对齐人类驾驶偏好，无需人工标注偏好数据。

title: Towards Family-Grouped Hierarchical Federated Learning on Sub-5KB Models: A Feasibility Study of Privacy-Preserving ECG Monitoring for Ultra-Resource-Constrained Wearables
comment: Supported by Shenzhen Coddie Technology Co., Ltd. This is a preprint and has not been peer-reviewed
summary: Cardiovascular disease remains the leading cause of death worldwide, and early detection of arrhythmias through continuous ECG monitoring on wearable devices can prevent life-threatening events. Federated Learning (FL) enables privacy-preserving collaborative training by keeping raw ECG data on device, yet standard FL incurs prohibitive communication overhead and standard deep learning models cannot fit on ultra-low-power microcontrollers. We propose Family-Grouped Hierarchical Federated Learning (Family-FL), a three-tier architecture that uses the family as a natural privacy boundary for intra-family aggregation before global synchronization. We further design a hardware-constrained Tiny CNN-LSTM architecture with only 669 parameters, INT8-quantized to occupy merely 4.65KB Flash and 2.95KB RAM, meeting the constraints of STC32G12K128-class microcontrollers. Experiments on the MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database (mean of 5 independent runs with different seeds) demonstrate that Family-FL reduces communication volume by 76.7% compared to FedAvg while maintaining comparable accuracy. Family-FL-Tiny achieves 91.9 +/- 1.2% accuracy with macro-F1 of 0.483 +/- 0.031, reducing total communication to 0.31% of FedAvg. The model achieves reliable ventricular arrhythmia detection (per-class F1 = 0.80), the most clinically critical abnormality for home-based preliminary screening. These results demonstrate the technical feasibility of privacy-preserving federated learning on ultra-resource-constrained microcontrollers through simulation-based evaluation. We honestly discuss limitations: no hardware deployment, single-dataset validation (MIT-BIH, 47 subjects), reduced rare-class sensitivity, and absence of formal differential privacy guarantees.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Family-FL，一种面向可穿戴心电监测的分层联邦学习框架，结合超轻量级Tiny CNN-LSTM模型（仅669参数），在保障隐私前提下显著降低通信开销，并在资源受限微控制器上实现可行部署。
AI.motivation: 心血管疾病是全球首要死因，需通过可穿戴设备持续ECG监测实现早筛；但传统联邦学习通信开销大，且标准深度模型无法适配超低功耗微控制器。
AI.method: 提出Family-Grouped Hierarchical FL（Family-FL）三层次架构，以家庭为自然隐私边界进行本地聚合；设计硬件约束的Tiny CNN-LSTM模型，支持INT8量化，适配STC32G12K128类MCU；在MIT-BIH数据库上开展5次独立实验评估。
AI.result: Family-FL相较FedAvg降低76.7%通信量；Family-FL-Tiny达91.9%±1.2%准确率、macro-F1 0.483±0.031，通信量仅为FedAvg的0.31%；对室性心律失常检测F1达0.80。
AI.conclusion: 验证了在超资源受限微控制器上实现隐私保护型联邦学习的技术可行性；但存在未实机部署、单数据集验证、罕见类别敏感性下降及缺乏差分隐私保证等局限。

title: Spatially Prompted Visual Trajectory Prediction for Egocentric Manipulation
summary: Robotic manipulation is often specified through language instructions or task identifiers, yet cluttered environments with similar objects are better handled by spatially indicating what to move and where to place it. Addressing the vision-centric challenge of object and goal specification, we present, to the best of our knowledge, the first formalization of Spatially Prompted Visual Trajectory Prediction (SP-VTP). This novel setting utilizes initial spatial prompts (like bounding boxes or points) to define task objectives, tasking the model with forecasting future end-effector trajectories from egocentric streams. To study this problem, we collect and annotate EgoSPT, a dataset of egocentric spatially prompted manipulation trajectories with first-frame object and target grounding annotations and recovered 3D end-effector motion. SP-VTP is challenging because the task specification is static, while the scene configuration evolves over time. To solve this problem, we propose SPOT(Spatially Prompted Object-Target Policy), which combines a task encoder for first-frame visual and coordinate spatial prompts, an observation encoder for current visual and history context, and a trajectory generator for future end-effector motion. Experiments under strict scene-level splits show that SPOT improves cross-scene trajectory prediction over non-prompted or single-source prompted baselines. Together, EgoSPT and SPOT establish a new spatial prompting problem SP-VTP, as a simple and scalable task condition for egocentric manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了空间提示视觉轨迹预测（SP-VTP）新任务，利用初始空间提示（如边界框或点）定义操作目标，并基于自我中心视觉流预测末端执行器未来轨迹；为此构建了EgoSPT数据集，并设计了SPOT模型，在跨场景轨迹预测上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 在杂乱环境中，仅靠语言指令或任务标识难以精准操作相似物体，需借助空间提示明确‘移动什么’和‘放置到哪’；现有方法缺乏对静态空间提示与动态场景演化之间关系的建模。
AI.method: 提出SP-VTP任务设定，构建含第一帧物体与目标定位标注及3D末端执行器运动恢复的EgoSPT数据集；设计SPOT模型，包含任务编码器（处理首帧视觉与空间坐标提示）、观测编码器（融合当前视觉与历史上下文）和轨迹生成器（预测未来末端执行器运动）。
AI.result: 在严格场景级划分的实验中，SPOT在跨场景轨迹预测性能上显著优于无提示或单源提示的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SP-VTP作为简单且可扩展的自我中心操作任务条件范式，结合EgoSPT数据集与SPOT模型，为机器人空间引导操作建立了新基准。

title: MetaEarth-MM: Unified Multimodal Remote Sensing Image Generation with Scene-centered Joint Modeling
summary: Multi-modal remote sensing images are vital for Earth observation, yet complete paired observations are often scarce in practice. Existing generative methods commonly address this problem through isolated pairwise modality translation, but their versatility and scalability remain limited as the number of modalities and generation tasks increases. Here, we develop a generative foundation model MetaEarth-MM for multi-modal remote sensing imagery, enabling paired joint generation and any-to-any translation across five modalities within a unified model. Recognizing the intrinsic scene consistency underlying multi-modal observations, we introduce a scene-centered joint modeling paradigm in MetaEarth-MM. Unlike previous methods that rely on direct appearance-level cross-modal mapping, our model organizes the generation around the underlying scene content. Specifically, MetaEarth-MM adopts a decoupled architecture that first infers a latent scene representation from available observations, and then generates target modalities conditioned on this intermediate state. To support training, we further construct EarthMM, a large-scale dataset comprising 2.8 million multi-resolution global images with 2.2 million aligned pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MetaEarth-MM not only exhibits strong generative capability and robust generalization across diverse generation tasks, but also supports downstream tasks at both data and representation levels, highlighting its potential as a general foundation model for cross-modal Earth observation. The code and dataset will be available at https://github.com/YZPioneer/MetaEarth-MM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MetaEarth-MM的多模态遥感影像生成基础模型，通过以场景为中心的联合建模范式，实现五种模态间的任意到任意翻译与配对联合生成，并构建了大规模数据集EarthMM支持训练。
AI.motivation: 多模态遥感图像在地球观测中至关重要，但现实中常缺乏完整的配对观测；现有生成方法仅限于孤立的两两模态转换，扩展性和通用性受限。
AI.method: 提出场景中心的联合建模范式，采用解耦架构：先从已有观测中推断潜在场景表征，再以此为条件生成目标模态；构建包含280万张图像的大规模多分辨率数据集EarthMM。
AI.result: MetaEarth-MM在多种生成任务上表现出强生成能力与泛化性，并能在数据级和表征级支持下游任务。
AI.conclusion: MetaEarth-MM是一种具备通用性与可扩展性的跨模态地球观测基础模型，为多模态遥感生成提供了新范式。

title: From Sparsity to Simplicity: Enabling Simpler Sequential Replacements via Sparse Attention Distillation
summary: Self-attention serves as the core foundation of large-scale transformer pretraining, but its quadratic token interaction cost makes inference expensive. Replacing attention with simpler sequential modules is appealing, yet naive substitution is often lossy, especially at larger scales. This paper revisits attention replacement through the lens of sparsity. Based on the observation of diverse sparsity patterns across transformer layers, we posit that pretrained transformers decompose the complex token dependency across tokens into various sequence-to-sequence mappings of diverse complexities, where some layer functionalities can be approximated and replaced with much simpler sequential modules without loss. We evaluate this premise using a plug-and-play layer-wise distillation framework to approximate and replace attention functionalities in pretrained vision transformer models. Controlled group-wise replacements under a fixed training budget reveal a clear pattern: substituting layers with sparser attention incurs substantially smaller accuracy drops than replacing denser ones. We further impose explicit attention sparsity on the pretrained ViT via AViT-style token retention and perform sparsity-guided distillation for sequential replacing models, where we see increasing teacher sparsity consistently reduces the student-teacher gap. The proposed method achieves efficient attention replacement for reduced parameter size and latency through the guidance of attention sparsity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力稀疏性的方法，用于在预训练视觉Transformer中逐层替换自注意力模块，以降低计算开销和参数量，同时保持模型精度。
AI.motivation: 自注意力机制计算成本高（二次复杂度），直接用简单序列模块替代会导致性能下降；作者观察到不同Transformer层具有多样化的稀疏模式，因此认为部分层的功能可被更简单的模块无损或近似替代。
AI.method: 提出基于注意力稀疏性的逐层蒸馏框架：首先分析预训练ViT各层注意力稀疏性，再按稀疏程度分组进行插拔式注意力替换；进一步结合AViT风格的显式token保留增强教师模型稀疏性，并开展稀疏性引导的蒸馏。
AI.result: 实验表明：替换稀疏注意力层带来的精度下降显著小于替换稠密层；教师模型稀疏性越高，学生-教师性能差距越小；最终方法在减小参数量与推理延迟的同时，保持了较高精度。
AI.conclusion: 注意力稀疏性是指导高效、低损注意力替代的关键信号，该工作为Transformer轻量化提供了新思路——不是统一替换，而是依据稀疏性进行差异化、层次化替代。

title: SetCon: Towards Open-Ended Referring Segmentation via Set-Level Concept Prediction
summary: Referring segmentation grounds natural-language queries to pixel-level masks, but extending it to complex scenarios with multiple instances, cross-category groups, or open-ended target sets remains challenging. Previous Large Vision Language Model (LVLM)-based methods represent referred targets with one or more special tokens sequentially, treating multiple targets as separate outputs rather than a coherent set and offering little incentive to capture set-level properties such as completeness and mutual exclusivity. We reformulate open-ended referring segmentation as explicit set-level concept prediction and propose Set-Concept Segmentation (SetCon), which uses LVLM-generated natural-language concepts, instead of segmentation-specific tokens, as semantic conditions for joint mask-set decoding. A hierarchical semantic decomposition first predicts a shared set-level concept defining the target scope and then refines it into fine-grained concept groups aligned with target subsets. To support this, a two-stage annotation pipeline augments existing reasoning segmentation datasets with hierarchical semantic supervision (236k samples, 784k concept phrases). SetCon achieves state-of-the-art results on image benchmarks (+3.3 gIoU on gRefCOCO, +12.1 gIoU on MUSE), with margins that grow as the number of referred targets increases. The concept interface also transfers to video under a detect-and-track setting, yielding new state-of-the-art results on seven referring video benchmarks, including +10.9 J&F on MeViS and +12.4 J&F on Ref-SeCVOS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SetCon方法，将开放式的指代表分割任务重新定义为显式的集合级概念预测，利用大视觉语言模型生成的自然语言概念作为语义条件进行联合掩码集解码，并通过分层语义分解和两阶段标注流程，在图像和视频指代表分割任务上均取得SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大视觉语言模型（LVLM）的方法将多个目标视为独立输出，缺乏对集合级属性（如完整性、互斥性）的建模能力，难以应对多实例、跨类别组或开放式目标集等复杂场景。
AI.method: 提出Set-Concept Segmentation（SetCon），用LVLM生成的自然语言概念替代分割专用token作为语义条件；采用分层语义分解：先预测共享的集合级概念定义目标范围，再细化为与子集对齐的细粒度概念组；构建含236k样本、784k概念短语的两阶段分层语义监督数据集。
AI.result: 在图像基准上达到SOTA：gRefCOCO提升+3.3 gIoU，MUSE提升+12.1 gIoU；在七个视频指代表基准上也达SOTA，如MeViS提升+10.9 J&F，Ref-SeCVOS提升+12.4 J&F；性能增益随目标数量增加而扩大。
AI.conclusion: SetCon通过引入集合级自然语言概念作为语义接口，有效建模目标间的集合关系，显著提升复杂多目标指代表分割性能，并具备良好的跨模态（图像→视频）迁移能力。

title: FLUIDSPLAT: Reconstructing Physical Fields from Sparse Sensors via Gaussian Primitives
summary: Reconstructing continuous flow fields from sparse surface-mounted sensors is central to aerodynamic design, flow control, and digital-twin instrumentation. Existing neural methods for this task typically encode sensor readings into implicit latent codes with little spatial interpretability and limited formal guidance on how representational capacity should scale with observation count. Inspired by 3D Gaussian Splatting, we introduce FLUIDSPLAT, a sensor-conditioned model that predicts K anisotropic Gaussian primitives forming a partition-of-unity scaffold, a spatially explicit and interpretable intermediate representation of the flow. For an idealized Gaussian primitive estimator, we prove an $O(K^{-s/d})$ approximation rate for fields with Sobolev smoothness $s$; incorporating $N$ noisy observations yields a squared-risk decomposition with bias $O(K^{-2s/d})$ and variance $O(σ^{2}K/N)$.Balancing the two yields $K^{*}\!\sim\!(N/σ^{2})^{d/(2s+d)}$: primitive count cannot grow freely under sparse sensing, revealing a variance bottleneck that motivates complementing the scaffold with a state-conditioned residual decoder. On a standard cylinder-flow benchmark, FLUIDSPLAT achieves the best mean error across all surface-sensor layouts; on AirfRANS with 8 surface-pressure sensors, it reduces error by 11-23% over the strongest baseline across three standard splits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FLUIDSPLAT模型，利用各向异性高斯基元构建空间显式、可解释的流场中间表示，理论分析揭示稀疏传感下的方差瓶颈，并通过残差解码器加以缓解，在多个基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络方法在从稀疏传感器重建连续流场时缺乏空间可解释性，且对表征能力随观测数如何缩放缺乏理论指导。
AI.method: 受3D高斯溅射启发，提出FLUIDSPLAT模型：以传感器读数为条件，预测K个各向异性高斯基元构成单位划分骨架；理论分析其逼近率与偏差-方差分解，并引入状态条件残差解码器应对方差瓶颈。
AI.result: 在标准圆柱绕流基准上，FLUIDSPLAT在所有表面传感器布局下均取得最低平均误差；在AirfRANS数据集仅用8个表面压力传感器时，相较最强基线在三个标准划分上误差降低11–23%。
AI.conclusion: 空间显式的高斯基元骨架能提升流场重建的可解释性与精度，理论导出的K*标度律揭示了稀疏传感下的本质限制，残差解码器是必要补充。

title: PixVerve: Advancing Native UHR Image Generation to 100MP with a Large-Scale High-Quality Dataset
summary: Text-to-Image (T2I) models have recently seen notable progress around 1K and 2K resolution. With the extreme desire for better visual experience and the rapid development of imaging technology, the demand for Ultra-High-Resolution (UHR) image generation has grown significantly. However, UHR image generation poses great challenges due to the scarcity and complexity of high-resolution content. In this paper, we first introduce PixVerve-95K, a high-quality, open-source UHR T2I dataset curated with a carefully designed data pipeline, which contains 95K images across diverse scenarios (each image has a minimum pixel-count of 100M) and seven-dimensional annotations. Based on our large-scale image-text dataset, we take a pioneering step to extend various T2I foundation models to native 100MP generation with three training schemes. Finally, leveraging both conventional metrics and multimodal large language model-based assessments, our proposed PixVerve-Bench benchmark establishes a comprehensive evaluation protocol for UHR images encompassing visual quality and semantic alignment. Extensive experimental results on our benchmark and the constructive exploration of training strategies collaboratively provide valuable insights for future breakthroughs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PixVerve-95K超高清图文数据集、原生100MP文生图模型训练方法及PixVerve-Bench评估基准，系统推进超高清图像生成研究。
AI.motivation: 随着显示技术和用户对视觉体验要求提升，超高清（UHR）图像生成需求激增，但受限于高分辨率内容稀缺与复杂性，现有T2I模型难以胜任。
AI.method: 构建包含95K张≥1亿像素图像的PixVerve-95K高质量开源数据集，并设计七维标注；提出三种训练方案，将多种T2I基础模型扩展至原生100MP生成能力；建立融合传统指标与多模态大语言模型评估的PixVerve-Bench基准。
AI.result: 成功实现原生100MP文本到图像生成，验证了所提数据集、训练策略与评估基准的有效性；实验结果为UHR生成提供了系统性技术路径与实证依据。
AI.conclusion: PixVerve系列工作（数据集、模型训练、评估基准）构成UHR文生图研究的完整闭环，为未来超高清生成技术突破奠定坚实基础。

title: EVA-0: Test-Time Model Evolution with Only Two Forward Passes per Sample
summary: Test-time model evolution offers a promising way for deployed models to improve from unlabeled test-time experience, yet most existing methods depend on backpropagation (BP), which incurs substantial memory overhead and makes them difficult to deploy on edge devices, quantized models, specialized accelerators, or black-box models. In this work, we study test-time model evolution under a strict two-forward budget, a setting that pushes adaptation toward highly efficient real-world deployment. We reveal three key obstacles in zeroth-order test-time optimization: susceptibility to shortcut solutions, uncontrolled weight drift, and ineffective update direction estimation. To overcome them, we propose EVA-0, a minimal zeroth-order adaptation framework that: 1) keeps the loss scale-invariant to prevent shortcut solutions; 2) devises an anchor-guided optimization strategy to alleviate weight drift; 3) uses sample-wise symmetric two-sided perturbation for update direction estimation and inference. EVA-0 requires no BP and performs both inference and adaptation within only two forward passes per sample. Results on ImageNet-C & ViT-Base show that EVA-0 outperforms both BP-based DeYO and BP-free FOA, while achieving a 14x speed-up over FOA. Code will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVA-0，一种无需反向传播、仅需两次前向传播的零阶测试时模型演化方法，解决了零阶优化中的捷径解、权重漂移和更新方向估计不准三大问题，在ImageNet-C等基准上显著优于现有BP-based和BP-free方法。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时模型演化方法大多依赖反向传播，导致内存开销大、难以部署于边缘设备、量化模型、专用加速器或黑盒模型。
AI.method: 提出EVA-0框架：1）保持损失尺度不变性以避免捷径解；2）采用锚点引导优化策略缓解权重漂移；3）使用样本级对称双边扰动进行更新方向估计与推理。全程无反向传播，每样本仅需两次前向传播。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-C和ViT-Base上，EVA-0性能超越BP-based的DeYO和BP-free的FOA，并比FOA快14倍。
AI.conclusion: EVA-0为资源受限场景下的高效测试时适应提供了可行且高性能的新范式，推动零阶测试时演化走向实际部署。

title: TideGS: Scalable Training of Over One Billion 3D Gaussian Splatting Primitives via Out-of-Core Optimization
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 as Spotlight. Website: https://sponge-lab.github.io/TideGS
summary: Training 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) at billion-primitive scale is fundamentally memory-bound: each Gaussian primitive carries a large attribute vector, and the aggregate parameter table quickly exceeds GPU capacity, limiting prior systems to tens of millions of Gaussians on commodity single-GPU hardware. We observe that 3DGS training is inherently sparse and trajectory-conditioned: each iteration activates only the Gaussians visible from the current camera batch, so GPU memory can serve as a working-set cache rather than a persistent parameter store. Building on this insight, we introduce TideGS, an out-of-core training framework that manages parameters across an SSD-CPU-GPU hierarchy via three synergistic techniques: block-virtualized geometry for SSD-aligned spatial locality, a hierarchical asynchronous pipeline to overlap I/O with computation, and trajectory-adaptive differential streaming that transfers only incremental working-set deltas between iterations. Experiments show that TideGS enables training with over one billion Gaussians on a single 24 GB GPU while achieving the best reconstruction quality among evaluated single-GPU baselines on large-scale scenes, scaling beyond prior out-of-core baselines (e.g., approximately 100M Gaussians) and standard in-memory training (e.g., approximately 11M Gaussians).

AI.tldr: TideGS是一种面向十亿级高斯图元的3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）训练框架，通过利用训练过程中的稀疏性和轨迹相关性，将GPU内存作为工作集缓存，并结合SSD-CPU-GPU三级存储层次实现高效外存训练。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS训练受限于GPU内存容量，难以扩展至亿级高斯图元；而实际训练中每轮仅激活部分可见图元，具备天然稀疏性和轨迹依赖性，为外存优化提供机会。
AI.method: 提出TideGS框架，包含三项核心技术：块虚拟化几何结构（保障SSD访问空间局部性）、分层异步流水线（重叠I/O与计算）、轨迹自适应差分流（仅传输迭代间工作集变化量）。
AI.result: 在单张24GB GPU上成功训练超10亿高斯图元，重建质量优于所有对比的单卡基线方法，显著超越此前外存方案（约1亿）和内存内训练（约1100万）。
AI.conclusion: TideGS验证了利用稀疏性与轨迹特性进行外存优化的有效性，为大规模3DGS训练提供了可扩展、高质量的新范式。

title: MO-CAPO: Multi-Objective Cost-Aware Prompt Optimization
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across a wide range of tasks but are highly sensitive to prompt design, motivating the need for automatic prompt optimization. Existing methods predominantly focus on performance alone, ignoring competing objectives such as inference cost or latency. At the same time, existing work on multi-objective prompt optimization relies on off-the-shelf NSGA-II, ignoring optimization efficiency. As a remedy, we introduce MO-CAPO, a novel multi-objective prompt optimization algorithm that jointly optimizes performance and inference cost while leveraging budget allocation for cost-efficient optimization. We further propose a deployment-oriented cost objective that captures the full computational profile of LLM inference. We evaluate our approach across four tasks and three LLMs and compare it to an NSGA-II-based multi-objective method and state-of-the-art single-objective prompt optimizers. Results show that MO-CAPO consistently identifies strong, robust, and diverse Pareto front approximations while maintaining cost-efficiency. It outperforms the NSGA-II baseline on 8 out of 12 cases in terms of the noisy R2 metric and achieves competitive performances often already at a considerably lower budget. The discovered solution sets span diverse performance-cost trade-offs that are omitted by single-objective optimizers, yet the top-performance candidates remain competitive with single-objective solutions. Additionally, we conduct the first evaluation of multi-objective machine learning experiments that considers generalization and robustness through noisy R2 and approximation gap, enabling a more realistic assessment of solution quality. MO-CAPO enables practitioners to select from an efficiently discovered set of multiple prompts offering different trade-offs between performance and cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MO-CAPO，一种兼顾性能与推理成本的多目标提示优化算法，相比NSGA-II等基线方法更高效、更具成本效益，并在多个任务和大模型上验证了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有提示优化方法大多只关注性能，忽视推理成本或延迟等关键实际约束；而多目标优化方法（如NSGA-II）效率低，缺乏针对提示优化场景的定制设计。
AI.method: 提出MO-CAPO算法，联合优化性能与部署导向的推理成本（涵盖完整计算开销），并引入预算分配机制提升优化效率；采用噪声鲁棒的R2指标与近似间隙评估解集质量。
AI.result: 在4个任务、3个LLM上实验表明，MO-CAPO在12组对比中8组优于NSGA-II基线，且常以更低预算达到竞争力；生成的Pareto解集覆盖多样化的性能-成本权衡，兼顾高绩效与强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MO-CAPO为实际部署提供了高效、多样、成本可控的多提示选择方案，推动提示优化从单目标向实用多目标范式演进。

title: Distributional Energy-Based Models for Uncertainty-Aware Structured LLM Reasoning
summary: When Large Language Models produce structured outputs such as travel plans, code solutions, or multi-step proofs, individual reasoning steps may appear correct while the output as a whole violates budgets, fails test cases, or contradicts earlier deductions. We propose a decomposed energy function that combines a learned quality scorer with deterministic analytical constraint penalties for verifying structured LLM outputs. The quality scorer is a heterogeneous ensemble of low-rank adapters on a single frozen encoder (3% trainable parameters); the ensemble mean ranks candidates while the standard deviation quantifies epistemic uncertainty, driving a two-pass inference loop that triggers targeted regeneration or abstention. Across five benchmarks (GSM8K, MuSR, TravelPlanner, TACO, Knights & Knaves), our 149M-parameter verifier orchestrating a pool of 7-26B open generators outperforms single-shot Qwen-72B on every benchmark, matches Claude Sonnet 4.6 on MuSR (67.7% vs. 68.0%), and reduces constraint violations by 53% relative to Opus 4.6 on TravelPlanner (oracle 0.028, random 0.231). The two routes are complementary: structural verification wins when constraints are checkable (the verifier captures signal frontier models cannot self-detect), while pretraining-scale priors win where they are not (narrative inference, code semantics). A cross-dataset confounding analysis confirms genuine quality discrimination on four reasoning tasks and identifies a model-identity shortcut on code, mitigated via last-layer retraining. Scorers trained on difficult data transfer zero-shot: a MuSR-trained scorer achieves 93.9% on GSM8K without seeing a math problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分解式能量函数，结合学习型质量评分器与确定性解析约束惩罚，用于验证大语言模型（LLM）生成的结构化输出；其Verifier仅149M参数，通过两阶段推理显著提升多任务性能并大幅降低约束违反率。
AI.motivation: LLM生成结构化输出（如旅行计划、代码、证明）时，单步看似正确，但整体可能违反预算、失败测试或逻辑矛盾，亟需可靠验证机制。
AI.method: 设计分解式能量函数，含异构低秩适配器集成的质量评分器（3%可训练参数）与解析约束惩罚；利用均值排序候选、标准差量化不确定性，驱动两阶段推理（靶向重生成或拒绝）。
AI.result: 在5个基准上，149M verifier协同7B-26B开源生成器全面超越Qwen-72B单次生成；MuSR上接近Claude Sonnet 4.6（67.7% vs. 68.0%）；TravelPlanner约束违规率相对Opus 4.6下降53%；MuSR训练的scorer零样本迁移到GSM8K达93.9%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化验证与预训练先验互补：前者在可检查约束任务中占优（捕获前沿模型无法自检的信号），后者在叙事推理、代码语义等不可检查任务中更优；跨数据集分析证实其真实质量判别能力，并通过末层重训练缓解代码任务中的模型身份捷径问题。

title: Interpretable Computer Vision for Defect Detection in X-ray Tomography of Aerospace SiC/SiC Composites
summary: Non-destructive testing of aerospace SiC/SiC composites via X-ray computed tomography (XCT) relies on expert visual assessment, with current workflows offering limited traceability for accept/reject decisions. Deep convolutional networks can automate defect detection, yet their black-box nature conflicts with the transparency that industrial inspection practice demands. To close this gap, we introduce p-ResNet-50, a convolutional framework extended with a prototype layer that couples high detection accuracy with case-based explanations. Six learned prototypes are explicitly aligned with expert-defined semantic categories-healthy matrix, matrix--air interfaces, pores, line-like defects, and mixed morphologies-so that every classification is traceable to a physically meaningful reference. Two novel regularisation terms, anchor-based and medoid-based, tether prototypes to expert-selected patches and prevent prototype collapse, addressing a known limitation of prototype networks. Latent-space analysis via UMAP delineates semantically coherent sub-domains and maps zones of uncertainty where misclassifications concentrate, giving inspectors an explicit picture of where the model is-and is not-reliable. The framework is validated on an XCT patch dataset of approximately 12,000 patches extracted from four defect-rich SiC/SiC laboratory specimens. Taking a black-box ResNet-50 as a baseline (ROC-AUC = 0.991), the prototype extension achieves comparable performance (accuracy 0.957 vs. 0.959; ROC-AUC 0.994 vs. 0.993) while trading a slight reduction in sensitivity for higher precision and specificity. Each decision is backed by representative evidence patches, and the model explicitly flags its uncertainty regions. Beyond defect mapping, the framework establishes a reusable methodology for embedding domain-expert knowledge into prototype networks, applicable to other XCT inspection scenarios requiring traceable, auditable decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出p-ResNet-50，一种结合原型学习的可解释卷积网络，用于SiC/SiC复合材料X射线CT无损检测，在保持高精度的同时提供基于语义原型的可追溯决策依据和不确定性可视化。
AI.motivation: 现有XCT检测依赖专家目视、缺乏可追溯性；深度学习方法虽可自动化缺陷检测，但黑箱特性与工业检测所需的透明性相冲突。
AI.method: 提出p-ResNet-50：在ResNet-50基础上引入原型层，定义6个与专家语义类别对齐的原型；设计anchor-based与medoid-based两种新正则化项防止原型坍缩；结合UMAP进行潜在空间分析以识别不确定性区域。
AI.result: 在约12,000个XCT图像块上验证，性能媲美黑箱ResNet-50（ROC-AUC 0.994 vs. 0.993），精度略降但特异性与精确率提升；每个分类决策均附带代表性证据块，并显式标出不确定性区域。
AI.conclusion: p-ResNet-50实现了高精度与高可解释性的统一，为XCT工业检测提供了可审计、可追溯、嵌入领域知识的新范式，方法具有跨场景迁移潜力。

title: CaMo: Camera Motion Grounded Evaluation and Training for Vision-Language Models
comment: Code and model available at https://github.com/hsiangwei0903/CaMo
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) achieve strong performance on spatial question answering benchmarks, yet it remains unclear whether such gains reflect genuine spatial intelligence. We show that existing spatial VLMs lack basic camera motion understanding, a key component of spatial cognition. We propose the Spatial Narrative Score (SNS), an evaluation framework that requires VLMs to generate explicit spatial narratives capturing both scene semantics and camera motion, followed by reasoning with a frozen proxy LLM. Under SNS, state-of-the-art spatial VLMs exhibit significant performance degradation despite high direct question answering accuracy. To address this gap, we introduce CaMo, a camera motion grounded VLM that achieves consistent performance across SNS evaluation and direct spatial question answering accuracy. Our results highlight the importance of explicit spatial narrative externalization for evaluating VLMs with transferable 3D spatial understanding. Our code, data, and model is available at https://github.com/hsiangwei0903/CaMo

AI.tldr: 本文提出Spatial Narrative Score (SNS)评估框架，揭示现有视觉语言模型（VLMs）缺乏对相机运动的基本理解；为此设计CaMo模型，实现相机运动建模，在SNS与直接问答任务中均表现稳健。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在空间问答基准上表现优异，但其是否具备真实空间智能尚不明确，尤其缺乏对相机运动这一关键空间认知能力的理解。
AI.method: 提出Spatial Narrative Score（SNS）评估框架，要求VLM生成融合场景语义与相机运动的显式空间叙事，并交由冻结的LLM进行推理；在此基础上构建相机运动感知的VLM——CaMo。
AI.result: SNS下，当前最优空间VLM性能显著下降，而CaMo在SNS和直接空间问答任务中均保持一致高性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式空间叙事的外化是评估具备可迁移3D空间理解能力VLM的关键途径。

title: Multi-axis Analysis of Image Manipulation Localization
summary: Advanced image editing software enables easy creation of highly convincing image manipulations, which has been made even more accessible in recent years due to advances in generative AI. Manipulated images, while often harmless, could spread misinformation, create false narratives, and influence people's opinions on important issues. Despite this growing threat, there is limited research on detecting advanced manipulations across different visual domains. Thus, we introduce Analysis Under Domain-shifts, qualIty, Type, and Size (AUDITS), a comprehensive benchmark designed for studying axes of analysis in image manipulation detection. AUDITS comprises over 530K images from two distinct sources (user and news photos). We curate our dataset to support analysis across multiple axes using recent diffusion-based inpaintings, spanning a diverse range of manipulation types and sizes. We conduct experiments under different types of domain shift to evaluate robustness of existing image manipulation detection methods. Our goal is to drive further research in this area by offering new insights that would help develop more reliable and generalizable image manipulation detection methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AUDITS基准，用于评估图像篡改检测方法在不同域偏移、质量、类型和尺寸下的鲁棒性，包含53万张来自用户与新闻照片的图像，并基于扩散模型生成多种篡改样本。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI的发展，图像篡改更易实现且更具欺骗性，可能引发虚假信息传播；然而当前针对跨视觉域的高级篡改检测研究仍严重不足。
AI.method: 构建了AUDITS基准，涵盖两大图像来源（用户/新闻照片）、多种篡改类型与尺寸、不同质量级别，并在多种域偏移设定下系统评估现有检测方法。
AI.result: 实验揭示了当前主流图像篡改检测方法在域偏移等现实挑战下的显著性能下降，验证了AUDITS作为诊断性基准的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AUDITS为图像篡改检测提供了多维度、高覆盖的评估框架，有助于推动更鲁棒、泛化性更强的新方法研发。

title: To Call or Not to Call: Diagnosing Intrinsic Over-Calling Bias in LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents exhibit a consistent tendency to over-call, invoking tools even in situations where none is needed. On the When2Call benchmark, six models from three families show high call accuracy but much lower no-call accuracy, leaving overall accuracy in the 55%-70% range. We trace this to an Intrinsic Bias Hypothesis (IBH): the call/no-call decision mapping carries an activation-independent call offset, so the model favors call even at activation parity. Using Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs), we recover behavior-aligned feature bases for the call/no_call decision, reduce them to a signed activation margin, and estimate the offset directly. Across all six models, the model is decision-neutral only when no_call activation outweighs call activation, consistent with IBH. We then causally test IBH with Adaptive Margin-Calibrated Steering (AMCS), a closed-form counter-bias shift along SAE decoder directions. Cancelling the diagnosed offset mitigates over-calling and improves overall accuracy with a negligible drop in call accuracy. Our work recasts over-calling from an empirical phenomenon into a mechanistic object amenable to causal correction. Code is available at https://github.com/SKURA502/agent-sae/.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大语言模型（LLM）代理存在固有调用偏差（IBH），即倾向于过度调用工具；通过稀疏自编码器（SAE）识别并量化该偏差，并提出自适应边界校准引导（AMCS）方法进行因果干预，显著缓解过调用问题。
AI.motivation: LLM代理在无需调用工具时仍频繁调用，导致整体准确率偏低（55%-70%），亟需从机制层面理解并纠正该过调用现象。
AI.method: 基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）提取与调用/不调用决策对齐的特征基，构建带符号激活差值，并估计固有调用偏置；进一步设计AMCS方法沿SAE解码方向施加闭式反偏置干预。
AI.result: 在六个模型上验证了IBH的存在（模型仅在不调用激活显著高于调用激活时才决策中立）；AMCS有效降低过调用，提升整体准确率，且调用准确率几乎无损。
AI.conclusion: 过调用并非单纯经验现象，而是可建模、可量化、可因果修正的内在机制问题；本工作为LLM代理行为的可解释性与可控性提供了新范式。

title: MSAVBench: Towards Comprehensive and Reliable Evaluation of Multi-Shot Audio-Video Generation
summary: Video generation is rapidly evolving from single-shot synthesis to complex multi-shot audio-video (MSAV) narratives to meet real-world demands. However, evaluating such frontier models remains a fundamental challenge. Existing benchmarks are limited in scope and data diversity, and rely on rigid evaluation pipelines, preventing systematic and reliable assessment of modern MSAV models. To bridge these gaps, we introduce MSAVBench, the first comprehensive benchmark and adaptive hybrid evaluation framework for multi-shot audio-video generation. Our benchmark spans four key dimensions, video, audio, shot, and reference, covering diverse task settings, varying shot counts of up to 15, and challenging non-realistic scenarios. Our evaluation framework improves robustness through an adaptive self-correction mechanism for shot segmentation, instance-wise rubrics for subjective metrics, and tool-grounded evidence extraction for complex judgments. Furthermore, MSAVBench achieves high alignment with human judgments, reaching a Spearman rank correlation of 91.5%. Our systematic evaluation of 19 state-of-the-art closed- and open-source models shows that current systems still struggle with director-level control and fine-grained audio-visual synchronization, while modular or agentic generation pipelines offer a promising path toward narrowing the gap between open- and closed-source models. We will release the benchmark data and evaluation code to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个面向多镜头音视频生成的综合基准MSAVBench，包含四维评估体系与自适应混合评估框架，显著提升评估鲁棒性与人类判断一致性（Spearman 91.5%），并系统评测19个SOTA模型，揭示当前模型在导演级控制与音画同步上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有评测基准在覆盖范围、数据多样性和评估流程灵活性方面存在局限，难以支撑前沿多镜头音视频（MSAV）生成模型的系统、可靠评估。
AI.method: 构建MSAVBench基准，涵盖视频、音频、镜头、参考四个维度；设计自适应镜头分割自校正机制、实例级主观指标量表、工具驱动的复杂判断证据提取等混合评估方法。
AI.result: MSAVBench与人类判断高度一致（Spearman相关系数达91.5%）；对19个SOTA模型的系统评测发现当前模型在导演级控制和细粒度音画同步上仍存明显短板。
AI.conclusion: MSAVBench为多镜头音视频生成提供了首个全面、鲁棒、高信度的评估标准；模块化或智能体式生成范式是缩小开源与闭源模型差距的可行路径；基准数据与代码将开源以推动领域发展。

title: Prediction Is Not Physics: Learning and Evaluating Conserved Quantities in Neural Simulators
summary: A diffusion model trained on Hamiltonian trajectories can achieve rollout MSE near $10^{-3}$, but the standard deviation of its energy over time is between 7500 and 36000 times larger than the ground-truth energy standard deviation, indicating a failure to preserve conservation laws. This gap motivates our central question of whether neural networks can learn or select globally conserved quantities from physical trajectories. We investigate this across three Hamiltonian systems: projectile motion, pendulum, and spring-mass. We use a structured $T(v)+V(q)$ energy model, a black-box Conservation Discovery Network (CDN), a polynomial CDN, and a conditional diffusion baseline. The structured network reaches $R^2 \geq 0.9999$ against analytical energy on clean data, while the black-box CDN reaches $R^2 \geq 0.996$ when trained with temporal consistency plus a small alignment loss to analytical energy at $t=0$ ($λ_{\mathrm{align}}=0.2$). With $λ_{\mathrm{align}}=0$, CDN Pearson $R^2$ collapses on pendulum and spring-mass ($< 10^{-3}$), showing that temporal consistency alone is not enough to reliably identify the true energy. Under $1\%$ additive Gaussian noise, the CDN outperforms the structured model on the projectile and spring-mass systems, suggesting that the CDN may be more robust to noisy inputs in this setting. However, the polynomial CDN is sensitive to training configuration: it achieves $R^2=0.78$ under a short training schedule on the pendulum system, but reaches $R^2=0.9998$ with more training time and data, regardless of whether noise is added.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨神经网络能否从物理轨迹中学习或识别全局守恒量，特别是在哈密顿系统中。作者比较了结构化能量模型、黑盒守恒发现网络（CDN）、多项式CDN和条件扩散模型在三种哈密顿系统（抛体、单摆、弹簧-质量）上的表现，发现仅靠时间一致性不足以可靠识别真实能量，需辅以初始时刻对齐损失；CDN在含噪声数据下更鲁棒，而多项式CDN性能高度依赖训练配置。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽能在轨迹预测上达到低MSE，但严重违背能量守恒（能量标准差比真实值高数千倍），由此引出核心问题：神经网络能否从数据中自动学习或识别物理系统的全局守恒量。
AI.method: 在抛体、单摆、弹簧-质量三个哈密顿系统上，对比四种方法：(1) 结构化T(v)+V(q)能量模型；(2) 黑盒 Conservation Discovery Network (CDN)，引入时间一致性约束与t=0时刻能量对齐损失；(3) 多项式形式的CDN；(4) 条件扩散基线。评估指标包括R²、Pearson相关系数及能量标准差。
AI.result: 结构化模型在干净数据上R² ≥ 0.9999；黑盒CDN在加入λ_align=0.2对齐损失时R² ≥ 0.996，无对齐损失时R²崩溃至<10⁻³；CDN在1%高斯噪声下于抛体和弹簧-质量系统上优于结构化模型；多项式CDN性能随训练时长与数据量显著提升（R²从0.78升至0.9998）。
AI.conclusion: 仅时间一致性不足以保证守恒量识别的可靠性，需额外物理先验（如初始状态对齐）；CDN具备更强噪声鲁棒性；多项式CDN可逼近高精度但对训练配置敏感；结果表明神经网络能有效发现守恒量，但需合理设计归纳偏置与训练策略。

title: Spectral Gradient Surgery for Domain-Generalizable Dataset Distillation
summary: Dataset Distillation (DD) synthesizes a compact synthetic dataset that preserves the training utility of a full dataset. However, its standard formulation assumes that test data follow the same distribution as training data, an assumption that rarely holds in practice. A straightforward extension-applying post-hoc Domain Generalization (DG) techniques to distilled data-is ill-suited because existing DG methods rely on the natural diversity of real datasets, which compact synthetic sets inherently lack, while also incurring substantial augmentation overhead that conflicts with the efficiency objective of dataset distillation. To address this limitation, we introduce Domain Generalizable Dataset Distillation (DGDD), a new problem setting that explicitly targets out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization of distilled datasets. We study this problem through a widely adopted DD baseline of Distribution Matching (DM). We attribute the OOD vulnerability of DM to the entanglement of class-discriminative and domain-specific information within the compressed synthetic set, and propose Spectral Gradient Surgery (SGS) to disentangle the two. The key insight of SGS is that cross-domain agreement among domain-wise gradients in the spectral domain reveals which gradient components are shared across source domains-and are therefore class-discriminative-and which are domain-specific. Based on this observation, SGS augments the standard DM update with two complementary gradients: one that reinforces cross-domain shared components and another that explicitly promotes diversity within the distilled dataset. Extensive experiments on diverse-scale benchmarks demonstrate that SGS substantially improves OOD generalization while remaining plug-and-play compatible with existing DM methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向域泛化（OOD）的新型数据集蒸馏方法DGDD，通过谱梯度手术（SGS）解耦类别判别性与域特异性信息，显著提升蒸馏数据在分布外场景下的泛化能力，且兼容现有分布匹配类蒸馏方法。
AI.motivation: 标准数据集蒸馏假设测试数据与训练数据同分布，但现实中常不成立；而直接将域泛化技术应用于蒸馏数据效果差，因其缺乏真实数据的自然多样性，且后处理增强开销大，违背蒸馏的效率目标。
AI.method: 提出Domain Generalizable Dataset Distillation（DGDD）新问题，并基于分布匹配（DM）基线，设计谱梯度手术（SGS）：利用多源域梯度在谱域的跨域一致性识别共享（类别判别性）与特有（域特异性）成分，进而引入两个互补梯度更新——强化共享成分、促进蒸馏数据内部多样性。
AI.result: 在多尺度基准上实验表明，SGS显著提升蒸馏数据在分布外场景下的泛化性能，同时保持即插即用特性，可无缝集成到现有DM方法中。
AI.conclusion: DGDD为数据集蒸馏开辟了面向域泛化的研究方向，SGS提供了一种有效解耦并增强泛化能力的机制，兼顾性能与效率。

title: Soft Learning
summary: Modern machine learning forces practitioners to choose between powerful but expensive deep networks and fast but limited classical algorithms. Here we introduce Soft Learning, a framework that maintains a library of heterogeneous specialists -- spanning linear models, tree ensembles, kernel machines, and neural networks -- and discovers provably optimal combination weights through cross-validated non-negative least squares. Soft Learning is guaranteed to match or exceed the best weighted combination of its specialists, trains over two orders of magnitude faster than deep networks on CPU alone (72-435x faster across tested configurations), provides inherent interpretability through learned weights that reveal which algorithmic paradigm best fits the data, and is future-proof: adding specialists is mathematically guaranteed to maintain or improve performance. Across 37 datasets (25 classification, 12 regression) against nine methods including CatBoost and tuned deep networks, Soft Learning ranks first on 70% of tasks, achieves the best mean rank (Friedman test, p = 1.12 x 10^-12), and is the only method to simultaneously excel at both classification and regression -- all without GPU hardware or hyperparameter tuning. These results suggest a paradigm shift from "which algorithm is best?" to "what is the provably optimal combination?" -- a question Soft Learning answers with formal guarantees for any data modality.

AI.tldr: Soft Learning 是一种新型机器学习框架，通过交叉验证的非负最小二乘法，自动学习异构模型（线性模型、树集成、核方法、神经网络等）的最优加权组合，在保证性能不降的前提下大幅提升训练速度与可解释性，并在多任务基准中全面领先。
AI.motivation: 解决现代机器学习中深度网络昂贵低效与传统算法能力有限之间的权衡问题，寻求兼顾性能、速度、可解释性与通用性的新范式。
AI.method: 构建包含多种异构模型的专家库，利用交叉验证驱动的非负最小二乘法求解最优组合权重，理论保证组合性能不低于任一单个专家。
AI.result: 在37个数据集（25分类+12回归）上超越CatBoost和调优深度网络等9种方法，70%任务排名第一，平均排名最优（Friedman检验p=1.12e-12），且唯一同时在分类与回归上表现卓越；CPU训练速度比深度网络快72–435倍，无需GPU或超参调优。
AI.conclusion: Soft Learning 实现了从‘选最佳单一算法’到‘求最优组合’的范式转变，为任意数据模态提供有理论保障的自适应集成方案。

title: INAR-VL: Input-Aware Routing for Edge-Cloud Vision-Language Inference
summary: Edge deployment of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) faces a tradeoff between latency and accuracy: cloud execution provides high-quality predictions but incurs communication delay and energy cost, while edge-only execution is faster but less accurate due to limited model capacity. This trade-off is further complicated by heterogeneity in image quality and reasoning complexity, making static placement suboptimal. We present INAR-VL, a lightweight edge-cloud routing system for multimodal inference in a two-tier deployment. INAR-VL maintains complementary VLMs across edge and cloud and uses lightweight image and text complexity signals to guide routing and model selection, executing simple queries locally while offloading complex ones when beneficial. Evaluation on visual question answering shows that INAR-VL executes 36% of requests on the edge, reduces latency by 24%, lowers energy by 26%, and preserves 97% of cloud-level accuracy.

AI.tldr: INAR-VL 是一种轻量级边缘-云路由系统，通过图像和文本复杂度信号动态分配视觉语言模型（VLM）推理任务，在边缘与云端协同执行，兼顾低延迟、低能耗与高精度。
AI.motivation: 边缘部署视觉语言模型面临延迟与精度的权衡，且图像质量与推理复杂度的异质性使静态部署策略次优。
AI.method: 提出 INAR-VL 系统，在双层架构中部署互补的轻量级 VLM；利用轻量级图像与文本复杂度信号进行动态路由与模型选择，简单查询本地执行，复杂查询按需卸载至云端。
AI.result: 在视觉问答任务上，36% 请求在边缘执行，延迟降低24%，能耗降低26%，同时保持97% 的云端精度。
AI.conclusion: INAR-VL 有效缓解了边缘VLM部署中延迟、能耗与精度之间的矛盾，实现了自适应、高效的多模态推理调度。

title: Auditing Reasoning-Trace Memorization Claims after Unlearning with Head-Conditioned Canaries
summary: Evaluations of unlearning on reasoning models sometimes show a bypass pattern. The answer side looks unlearned, but the model's own thinking trace keeps emitting the forgotten content, and the gap is taken as evidence that the weights still remember. We audit this reading on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B with LoRA-memorized fictional authors and NPO unlearning, conditioned on a six-token canary head. On one seed, swapping the thinking trace for a short non-canary prefill on the same weights drops the answer rate by as much as the bypass gap itself, whether the prefill mimics the training template or not. On a second seed the bypass gap shrinks rather than vanishing, and the prefill swap reverses direction and brings the answer rate to ceiling. A positive parser-split bypass gap thus does not by itself identify hidden weight-level memorization, and does not rule it out either. On a different distillate the same metric flips sign because the parser cannot find the closing tag. We recommend a decode-time template swap as a cheap sanity check alongside the canonical audit.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在推理模型上进行遗忘学习（unlearning）时出现的‘绕过模式’（bypass pattern），即答案看似被遗忘，但思维链仍泄露原始内容；作者通过LoRA记忆虚构作者、NPO遗忘及六词canary头实验，发现‘绕过间隙’不能单独证明或排除权重层面的记忆残留，并建议用解码时模板替换作为廉价验证手段。
AI.motivation: 现有对推理模型遗忘效果的评估常依赖‘绕过模式’——答案被抑制但思维链仍泄露，该现象被直接解读为权重仍存记忆；本文质疑这一解读的可靠性。
AI.method: 在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B模型上，使用LoRA注入虚构作者记忆，结合NPO方法进行遗忘；引入六token canary头触发检测，并通过交换思维链前缀（替换为非canary短prefill）来干预解码行为，在不同随机种子下观测答案率变化。
AI.result: 在某一随机种子下，替换思维链前缀可使答案率下降量等于原始绕过间隙；在另一种子下，绕过间隙缩小甚至反转，答案率升至上限；另在不同蒸馏模型中，因解析器无法识别闭合标签，同一指标符号翻转。
AI.conclusion: 正向的parser-split绕过间隙既不能证实、也不能排除权重级记忆；应辅以解码时模板替换等简单验证手段，避免对遗忘效果的误判。

title: Delta Attention Residuals
summary: Attention Residuals replace standard additive residual connections with learned softmax attention over previous layer outputs, enabling selective cross-layer routing. However, standard Attention Residuals still attend over cumulative hidden states in previous layers, which are highly redundant. We show that this redundancy leads to routing collapse in deeper layers: attention weights become low-contrast and closer to uniform (max weight ${\approx}$0.2), limiting the model's ability to select informative states in previous layers. This raises a key but underexplored design question: what layer-wise representations should be routed in Attention Residuals? To answer this question, we propose Delta Attention Residuals, which attend over deltas -- the change introduced by each sublayer ($\mathbf{v}_i = \mathbf{h}_{i+1} - \mathbf{h}_i$) -- instead of cumulative states. Delta representations are structurally diverse and yield higher-contrast attention distributions (max weight ${\approx}$0.6), enabling more selective and effective routing across layers. This principle applies at both per-sublayer and block granularity. Across all tested scales (220M--7.6B), Delta Attention Residuals consistently outperform both standard residuals and Attention Residuals, with 1.7--8.2\% validation perplexity gains. Delta Attention Residuals also enables converting pretrained checkpoints into Delta Attention Residuals via standard fine-tuning. Code is available at https://github.com/wdlctc/delta-attention-residuals-code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Delta Attention Residuals，通过让注意力机制作用于各子层输出的差值（delta）而非累积隐状态，缓解标准Attention Residuals在深层出现的路由坍缩问题，显著提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 标准Attention Residuals在深层存在路由坍缩现象——注意力权重趋于均匀，导致无法有效选择前层中有信息量的状态；其根本原因在于对高度冗余的累积隐状态进行注意力计算。
AI.method: 提出Delta Attention Residuals：将注意力对象从各层累积隐状态替换为各子层引入的增量（即delta = h_{i+1} - h_i），从而利用结构更丰富、区分度更高的delta表示进行跨层路由；该方法适用于子层级和模块级。
AI.result: 在220M至7.6B参数规模模型上，Delta Attention Residuals持续优于标准残差和Attention Residuals，验证困惑度降低1.7–8.2%；且可通过常规微调将预训练检查点转换为Delta形式。
AI.conclusion: 使用delta表示作为Attention Residuals的路由源，能显著提升注意力分布对比度与跨层路由有效性，是一种简单、通用且可迁移的残差结构改进方案。

title: Data-Free Client Contribution Estimation via Logit Maximization for Federated Learning
summary: Federated learning (FL) enables collaborative learning of computer vision models, where privacy and regulatory constraints prevent centralizing data across devices or organizations. However, practical FL deployments often exhibit severe class imbalance and label skew, causing standard aggregation protocols to overfit dominant clients and degrade minority-class performance. We propose a data-free, class-wise contribution estimation and aggregation framework based on logit maximization (CELM) that does not require sharing raw data, client metadata, or auxiliary public datasets. The FL server probes client updates to obtain class-wise evidence scores and assembles a cross-client evidence matrix, which quantifies both per-class competence and class coverage. Using this matrix, we compute contribution weights that upweight clients providing strong, discriminative evidence for underrepresented classes. The resulting aggregation is stable due to simplex constraints and momentum smoothing, and it remains compatible with standard FL training pipelines. We evaluate the approach on representative vision benchmarks under controlled non-IID and pathological label splits, demonstrating that CELM-based aggregation improves robustness to imbalance and statistical heterogeneity, while yielding better performance without requiring any additional data exchange.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需数据、基于logit最大化（CELM）的类级别贡献估计与聚合框架，用于解决联邦学习中因类别不平衡和标签偏斜导致的模型性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 实际联邦学习部署中普遍存在严重的类别不平衡和标签偏斜问题，导致标准聚合方法过拟合主导客户端，损害少数类性能。
AI.method: 提出CELM框架：服务器通过探测客户端更新获取类级别证据得分，构建跨客户端证据矩阵，量化每类的胜任力与覆盖度，并据此计算贡献权重，提升对少数类提供强判别性证据的客户端的权重；聚合过程受单纯形约束并结合动量平滑以保证稳定性。
AI.result: 在受控非独立同分布及病理性标签划分的视觉基准上验证表明，CELM聚合显著提升了对不平衡和统计异质性的鲁棒性，在不增加任何数据交换的前提下获得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: CELM是一种数据免费、无需元数据或公共数据集的通用聚合机制，兼容标准FL训练流程，有效缓解标签偏斜与类别不平衡带来的负面影响。

title: From Llama to Cria: Scaling Down Neural Networks via Neuron-Level Spectral Structural Importance Evaluation
summary: This paper proposes a neuron pruning framework based on neuron-level spectral structural importance evaluation. Given a trained neural network, we record the hidden states of each hidden layer during inference and model neurons as graph nodes, with hidden states treated as graph signals. Using ideas from graph signal processing, we infer layer-wise input and output graphs that characterize the structural relationships among neurons before and after each layer transformation. We then evaluate the spectral structural importance of neurons by analyzing the transformation between these graphs based on spectral graph theory. Neurons with high spectral structural importance are regarded as strongly involved in the internal representation transformation and are therefore preserved, while neurons with low importance scores are selected as pruning candidates. The pruning process is conducted iteratively until a predefined effective parameter reduction target is reached. Instead of fine-tuning after every pruning step, the proposed strategy first removes low-importance neurons to obtain a compact architecture and then applies a final recovery fine-tuning stage to restore task performance. By connecting neuron pruning with graph signal processing and spectral structural analysis, the proposed framework offers a principled way to reduce neural network size while maintaining solution quality. Experimental results on CIFAR-10 image classification and SST-2 sentiment classification show that our method can effectively remove low-importance neurons and achieve compact networks with competitive performance after recovery fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经元级谱结构重要性评估的剪枝框架，利用图信号处理和谱图理论分析神经元在层间变换中的结构性作用，迭代剪除低重要性神经元，并在最后统一微调以恢复性能。
AI.motivation: 传统神经元剪枝方法缺乏对神经元在内部表示变换中结构性作用的深入理解，难以兼顾模型压缩率与性能保持。
AI.method: 将神经元建模为图节点，隐藏状态作为图信号；利用图信号处理推断层输入/输出图；基于谱图理论分析图变换以评估各神经元的谱结构重要性；迭代剪除低重要性神经元，最后统一微调。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和SST-2任务上，该方法能有效剪枝并获得紧凑模型，在恢复微调后仍保持有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 将神经元剪枝与图信号处理及谱结构分析相结合，为网络压缩提供了一种原理清晰、效果可靠的新型范式。

title: A Multi-Dimensional Clustering Approach for Identifying Inborn Errors of Immunity
summary: Rare diseases such as inborn errors of immunity (IEI) require early diagnosis to prevent end organ damage and improve quality of life. Hurdles in accessing and curating large scale electronic health record (EHR) data limit routine data driven analyses to remain on the forefront of IEI and other rare disease trends. Development of machine learning (ML) algorithms in IEI for pattern recognition as well as published methodology examining how to systematically process and integrate complex medical data is limited. Our proposed pipeline, including data curation and ML clustering algorithms, is designed to recognize novel rare disease patterns and extract IEI- associated features from a national data registry. Our methodology for EHR data formatting and processing presents the pipeline that transforms raw immunologic lab data into vectors. This is further combined with hyperparameter tuning for diseases pattern recognition via clustering. This study refines IEI feature awareness, develops data tool kits for rare disease populations analysis, and expands on transforming complex medical records in data structures interpretable by unsupervised ML.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合EHR数据整理与无监督机器学习聚类的分析流程，旨在从国家级注册数据中识别罕见免疫缺陷病（IEI）的新模式并提取相关特征。
AI.motivation: 罕见病（如先天性免疫缺陷病IEI）需早期诊断以防止终末器官损伤；但大规模电子健康档案（EHR）数据获取与整理困难，且现有机器学习方法在IEI中的模式识别及复杂医疗数据系统化处理方面严重不足。
AI.method: 构建包含EHR数据整理与ML聚类算法的端到端流程：将原始免疫学检验数据标准化为向量表示，并结合超参数调优进行疾病模式的无监督聚类。
AI.result: 实现了对IEI相关特征的精细化识别，开发了面向罕见病人群分析的数据工具包，并推进了复杂医疗记录向无监督ML可解析数据结构的转化。
AI.conclusion: 该流程有助于提升罕见病数据驱动研究能力，为IEI及其他罕见病的早期识别与机制探索提供了可扩展的方法学基础。

title: Don't Let Bandit Feedback Pull Continual LLM-Recommender Updates Off Target
summary: Generative LLM-based recommenders (LLM-Rec) require continual post-deployment updates, yet deployment logs provide only policy-shaped contextual bandit feedback: outcomes are observed solely for items exposed by a prior serving policy, inducing exposure bias and yielding partial, asymmetric signals consisting of relatively reliable positive responses and ambiguous no-responses. We propose an Anchored Bandit Policy Optimization (ABPO) framework for continual LLM-Rec updates that combines group-relative policy optimization (GRPO) with explicit treatment of exposure bias and feedback ambiguity. Specifically, we insert the exposed recommendation as a logged anchor into each GRPO rollout group, so that group-relative normalization is calibrated against the action actually exposed by the prior policy rather than against newly sampled rollouts alone. Because both positive- and no-responses are observed only through prior-policy exposure, we apply self-normalized inverse propensity scoring to the fixed anchor for both feedback types to correct for policy mismatch. At the same time, we treat the two feedback types asymmetrically in reliability: positive responses provide relatively direct endorsement signals, whereas no-responses remain ambiguous because they may reflect either true disinterest or unobserved external factors. To avoid overly aggressive updates from ambiguous no-responses, we temper their penalties with self-certainty, using the model's output-token confidence as a verifier-free reliability signal. Across five domains from Amazon Reviews and MovieLens, our method yields consistent post-update gains in recommendation accuracy while mitigating prior-policy-induced exposure bias more effectively than prior baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Anchored Bandit Policy Optimization (ABPO)的框架，用于在部署后持续更新基于大语言模型（LLM）的推荐系统，通过结合组相对策略优化（GRPO）与对曝光偏差和反馈模糊性的显式建模，提升推荐准确性并缓解曝光偏差。
AI.motivation: 生成式LLM推荐系统在部署后需持续更新，但部署日志仅提供策略塑造的上下文赌博机反馈，存在曝光偏差及正响应可靠、无响应模糊的问题。
AI.method: 提出ABPO框架：在GRPO中将已曝光推荐作为‘锚点’嵌入每组rollout，以先验策略曝光动作为基准进行组内归一化；对正响应和无响应均采用自归一化逆倾向评分校正策略不匹配；对两类反馈不对称处理——用模型输出token置信度作为无响应的可靠性调节信号，降低其惩罚强度。
AI.result: 在Amazon Reviews和MovieLens的五个领域实验表明，ABPO在更新后持续提升推荐准确率，并比现有基线更有效地缓解先验策略引发的曝光偏差。
AI.conclusion: ABPO通过锚定曝光动作、联合校正偏差与区分反馈可靠性，为LLM推荐系统的在线持续学习提供了更鲁棒、更实用的优化范式。

title: Navigating the Emotion Tree: Hierarchical Hyperbolic RAG for Multimodal Emotion Recognition
summary: Multimodal emotion recognition aims to integrate text, audio, and video sources to understand human affective states. Although multimodal large language models excel at multimodal reasoning, they typically treat emotion categories as independent labels, ignoring the rich hierarchical taxonomy of human psychology. Moreover, lacking external contextual knowledge makes them highly susceptible to over-interpreting noisy cues, further complicating fine-grained emotion classification. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{HyperEmo-RAG}, a retrieval-augmented generation framework that leverages a structured emotional knowledge base. Our framework introduces two key innovations. 1) Hierarchical hyperbolic grounding. Recognizing the inherent hierarchical tree structure of emotion taxonomies, we jointly embed hierarchical emotion labels and multimodal samples into a continuous hyperbolic space (Poincaré ball) and design a hierarchical beam-search deliberation process that progressively retrieves samples from coarse to fine-grained levels. 2) Structured evidence injection. Based on the retrieved evidence, we construct an evidence graph and inject the structured knowledge as explicit cognitive context into the LLM through a Tree-Aware Attention mechanism and an EmotionGraphFormer, preserving the integrity of graph-structured information. Experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that HyperEmo-RAG significantly outperforms existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperEmo-RAG框架，通过超球面空间中的分层嵌入与检索增强生成，结合结构化情感知识库和图注意力机制，提升多模态细粒度情绪识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将情绪类别视为独立标签，忽略心理学中情绪的层次结构，且缺乏外部知识导致对噪声敏感，难以进行细粒度情绪分类。
AI.method: 提出HyperEmo-RAG：1）在Poincaré球中联合嵌入分层情绪标签与多模态样本，并设计分层束搜索推理；2）构建证据图，通过Tree-Aware Attention和EmotionGraphFormer将结构化知识注入大语言模型。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用超球面几何建模情绪层次结构并融合结构化外部知识，可有效提升多模态情绪识别的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Reasoning Portability: Guiding Continual Learning for MLLMs in the RLVR Era
summary: Vision-Language Models in Continual Learning (VLM-CL) aim to continuously adapt to new multimodal tasks while retaining prior knowledge. The emerging paradigm that couples Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) with Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) calls for a new pattern to guide continual adaptation. Advances in reasoning capability now make it feasible to impose constraints at the reasoning level. We formalize portability, a sample-level measure of how reusable the previous policy's behavior is on a new task, and empirically show that reasoning-level signals remain reliable on out-of-distribution samples while answer-level signals do not. We instantiate this as Reasoning Portability (RP) and propose Reasoning-based Dynamic Balance Continual Learning (RDB-CL), which modulates the per-sample Kullback-Leibler regularization in RLVR according to RP: a tight anchor preserves reusable reasoning on high-RP samples, while a relaxed anchor on low-RP samples permits exploration of new reasoning pathways. Experiments show that RDB-CL consistently outperforms baselines, improving Last accuracy by +12.0% over the vanilla RLVR baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于推理可迁移性（RP）的动态平衡持续学习方法RDB-CL，用于提升多模态大语言模型在持续学习中的表现，通过在推理层面调节KL正则化强度，显著提升了任务准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM-CL方法在持续适应新多模态任务时面临知识遗忘问题，尤其在分布外样本上答案级信号不可靠；而推理能力的进步使得在推理层面施加约束成为可能。
AI.method: 提出样本级可迁移性度量'portability'，并据此定义Reasoning Portability（RP）；进而设计Reasoning-based Dynamic Balance CL（RDB-CL），根据RP动态调整RLVR中每个样本的KL正则化强度：高RP样本采用紧锚点保留已有推理，低RP样本采用松锚点鼓励新推理探索。
AI.result: RDB-CL在Last Accuracy上较基础RLVR提升+12.0%，且在多个实验中持续优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 推理层面的可迁移性信号比答案层面更鲁棒，基于RP动态调节正则化是提升VLM持续学习性能的有效范式。

title: Stability and Discretization Error of State Space Model Neural Operators
summary: Neural operators have emerged as a powerful, discretization-invariant framework for solving partial differential equations (PDEs). Although established approaches like the Deep Operator Network (DeepONet) have successfully achieved universal approximation for operators, and architectures such as Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) have shown algebraic convergence rates, a precise theoretical connection between the continuous theory and its discrete numerical implementation remains a challenge. Specifically, the relationship between the continuous formulation and the discrete numerical stability has yet to be fully explored. In this paper, we address this gap by establishing theoretical guarantees for the discretization error and stability of neural operator approximation schemes. We prove analytical bounds that link solution regularity to input discretization, providing a formal quantification of neural operator accuracy under real-world numerical constraints. We derive these bounds to the specific cases of State Space Model-based Neural Operators (SS-NOs) and FNOs, thus providing a new discretization error theorem for these models. Additionally, through an input-to-state stability (ISS) analysis, we formally assess the impact of discretization on the stability of SS-NOs results obtained in the continuous domain. Our empirical experiments on 1D and 2D benchmarks validate our theoretical bounds and show the robustness of SS-NOs under varying resolutions.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了神经算子离散化误差和稳定性的理论保证，为SS-NOs和FNOs提供了新的离散误差定理，并通过ISS分析评估了离散化对SS-NOs稳定性的影响，实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 现有神经算子方法（如DeepONet、FNO）虽在逼近能力和收敛性上表现良好，但其连续理论与实际离散实现之间的理论联系，尤其是离散化误差与数值稳定性关系尚未明确。
AI.method: 通过建立解析误差界，将解的正则性与输入离散化精度关联；针对SS-NOs和FNOs分别推导离散误差定理；引入输入到状态稳定性（ISS）分析，刻画离散化对SS-NOs连续域稳定性的影响。
AI.result: 获得了SS-NOs和FNOs的离散误差上界；给出了SS-NOs的ISS理论保证；1D/2D基准实验验证了误差界的有效性和SS-NOs在不同分辨率下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了神经算子连续理论与离散实现之间的理论鸿沟，为设计更可靠、可解释的神经PDE求解器提供了坚实的数学基础。

title: Does Your Wildfire Prediction Model Actually Work, or Just Score Well?
summary: Wildfire prediction is important for early warning and resource allocation, yet existing Earth foundation models (Earth FMs) are pretrained for general atmospheric and geophysical objectives rather than wildfire forecasting. To address this gap, we introduce WILDFIRE-FM, the first foundation model pretrained specifically for wildfire prediction using weather, active-fire observations, topography, vegetation, and static environmental data. However, introducing a domain-specific backbone alone does not solve the evaluation problem: wildfire events are sparse in space and time, making transfer conclusions highly sensitive to matching rules and evaluation settings. To address this problem, we introduce a fixed-contract evaluation framework with two controlled checks: a fixed-output check for matching-rule effects and a fixed-feature check for head-selection effects. Under matched contracts, we compare WILDFIRE-FM with ten Earth-FM baselines across occupancy, spread, retrieval, and regression tasks. Our results show that wildfire transfer conclusions depend strongly on evaluation design and task formulation. We hope this framework and WILDFIRE-FM provide a foundation for future wildfire-specific Earth-FM research and benchmarking. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Wildfire-fm-evaluation-contracts-5AE9/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个专为野火预测设计的基础模型WILDFIRE-FM，并引入一种固定契约评估框架，以解决野火事件稀疏性带来的评估敏感性问题；结果表明评估设计和任务设定显著影响迁移结论。
AI.motivation: 现有地球基础模型（Earth FMs）面向通用大气与地球物理目标预训练，不适用于野火预测；同时，野火事件在时空上高度稀疏，导致评估结果对匹配规则和设置高度敏感。
AI.method: 提出专用于野火预测的WILDFIRE-FM模型，融合天气、活跃火点、地形、植被及静态环境数据；并设计固定契约评估框架，包含固定输出检查（匹配规则影响）与固定特征检查（头部选择影响）。
AI.result: 在匹配契约下，WILDFIRE-FM在占用率、蔓延、检索和回归任务中优于十个Earth-FM基线；证实迁移结论强烈依赖于评估设计与任务形式。
AI.conclusion: WILDFIRE-FM与所提评估框架为未来野火专用地球基础模型研究与基准测试提供了新基础。

title: Worst-Group Equalized Odds Regularization for Multi-Attribute Fair Medical Image Classification
summary: Diagnostic performance in medical AI varies systematically across demographic groups, yet subgroup AUC can mask clinically important disparities. At a fixed inference-time operating point, some groups may exhibit over-diagnostic behaviour, characterized by elevated true and false positive rates, while others show under-diagnostic patterns with reduced true and false positive rates. These opposing tendencies can cancel in aggregate AUCs while producing meaningful inequities in clinical decision-making. Motivated by the need to assess and mitigate such disparities at the operating point and across multiple demographic attributes simultaneously, we propose a worst-group equalized-odds margin regularizer. The proposed regularizer explicitly targets subgroup-level deviations on both the true positive and false positive sides at inference. At each update, the method identifies subgroups defined by explicit demographic attributes (e.g., age, sex, and race) that exhibit the most extreme margin deviations and applies a unified penalty, enabling fairness optimization across multiple demographic axes without requiring explicit intersectional constraints. Across two medical imaging datasets in realistic multi-label settings, our method consistently reduces disparities in Equalized Odds and Equalized Opportunity with minimal impact on AUC, preserving diagnostic performance while improving fairness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种最差组均衡化几率间隔正则化器，用于在推理时操作点上同时评估和缓解多个群体（如年龄、性别、种族）的诊断偏差，显著减少均衡化几率与均衡化机会的不公平性，同时几乎不损害AUC性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于AUC的评估方法可能掩盖临床重要的群体间差异；在固定操作点下，不同人群可能出现过诊断或欠诊断现象，导致临床决策不公，亟需一种能同时在多个显式人口统计维度上评估和缓解此类偏差的方法。
AI.method: 提出最差组均衡化几率间隔正则化器，显式惩罚在真阳性率和假阳性率两侧偏离最严重的子群体（由年龄、性别、种族等显式属性定义），每步更新识别最极端偏差子群并施加统一惩罚，无需显式交集约束。
AI.result: 在两个真实多标签医学影像数据集上，该方法一致降低了均衡化几率（Equalized Odds）和均衡化机会（Equalized Opportunity）的群体差异，对AUC影响极小。
AI.conclusion: 所提正则化器能有效提升医疗AI在多个敏感属性上的公平性，兼顾诊断性能，为临床部署中的公平性优化提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: HypergraphFormer: Learning Hypergraphs from LLMs for Editable Floor Plan Generation
summary: In this work, we propose HypergraphFormer, a novel and efficient approach to floor plan generation based on learning hypergraph representations with a large language model (LLM). The model is trained via supervised fine-tuning to generate a hypergraph-based textual representation that encodes spatial relationships and connectivity information within floor plans. We train and evaluate our approach on the RPLAN dataset, and further demonstrate its generalizability on a separate out-of-distribution dataset, which we release in this paper. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art techniques based on rasterized or vectorized representations across a diverse set of metrics. We also show improved data efficiency, particularly under distribution shift. The hypergraph formulation enables the generation of floor plans for arbitrary, irregular, user-specified boundaries by decoupling apartment footprints from their functional and geometric subdivisions. Furthermore, we show that the proposed methodology offers a high degree of editability, making it particularly well suited to design-oriented workflows supported by LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HypergraphFormer，一种基于大语言模型学习超图表示的新型高效平面图生成方法，通过监督微调生成编码空间关系和连接信息的超图文本表示，在RPLAN数据集及新发布的分布外数据集上均优于现有基于光栅化或矢量化表示的方法，并展现出更好的数据效率、泛化性和可编辑性。
AI.motivation: 现有平面图生成方法在处理任意不规则用户指定边界、分布偏移下的数据效率以及设计导向工作流中的可编辑性方面存在局限，需要一种更灵活、鲁棒且与LLM协同友好的表示和生成范式。
AI.method: 提出HypergraphFormer模型，利用大语言模型对超图结构进行文本化建模与生成；通过监督微调训练模型输出能编码空间关系与连通性的超图文本表示；在RPLAN数据集上训练，并在自建的分布外数据集上验证泛化性。
AI.result: 在RPLAN及新发布的分布外数据集上，全面超越基于光栅/矢量表示的SOTA方法；在分布偏移下表现出更高数据效率；支持任意不规则边界的平面图生成；具备高可编辑性，适配LLM驱动的设计流程。
AI.conclusion: 超图文本表示为平面图生成提供了更解耦、更结构化、更易编辑的建模范式，HypergraphFormer有效融合了LLM的语义生成能力与超图的空间建模能力，推动了AI辅助建筑设计的发展。

title: Shaping the Prior: How Synthetic Task Distributions Determine Tabular Foundation Model Quality
summary: What determines the quality of a tabular foundation model? Unlike language or vision, tabular foundation models acquire their inductive biases almost entirely from synthetic pretraining distributions, yet the design of these distributions remains poorly understood. Standard synthetic priors are too well-behaved: they omit the irregularities and failure modes that determine deployment robustness. We introduce O'Prior, a compositional realism prior built around four coupled components: a hierarchical SCM meta-generator spanning diverse functional families; a modular realism engine covering heterogeneous marginals, missingness, and target transforms; an explicit stress module injecting confounding and support-query mismatch; and a curriculum-governed, leakage-safe generation protocol. To isolate prior design as the scientific variable, we hold architecture, optimizer, and compute budget fixed and vary only the synthetic task distribution. O'Prior yields consistent and substantial improvements in downstream accuracy and robustness across real tabular benchmarks, with gains concentrated in regimes characterized by distributional irregularities. Ablations confirm that mechanism diversity, realism composition, and shift-aware stress each contribute independently, their effects are not interchangeable. These results establish synthetic prior construction as a first-order and largely overlooked determinant of tabular foundation model quality

AI.tldr: 本文提出O'Prior，一种面向表格数据基础模型的合成先验构造方法，通过分层SCM元生成器、模块化真实性引擎、显式压力模块和课程驱动生成协议四个耦合组件，显著提升模型在真实表格基准上的下游准确率与鲁棒性，证实合成先验设计是决定表格基础模型质量的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 现有表格基础模型依赖合成预训练分布获取归纳偏置，但标准合成先验过于理想化，缺乏实际部署中常见的不规则性和失效模式，导致鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出O'Prior：包含分层结构因果模型（SCM）元生成器、覆盖异构边缘分布/缺失机制/目标变换的模块化真实性引擎、注入混杂因子和支持-查询不匹配的显式压力模块，以及课程驱动且防泄漏的生成协议；在固定架构、优化器与计算预算前提下，仅改变合成任务分布以孤立研究先验设计的影响。
AI.result: O'Prior在多个真实表格基准上带来一致且显著的下游准确率与鲁棒性提升，增益集中在存在分布不规则性的场景；消融实验证明机制多样性、真实性组合与偏移感知压力各自独立贡献，不可相互替代。
AI.conclusion: 合成先验的构造是表格基础模型质量的一阶决定因素，长期被忽视，O'Prior为该方向提供了系统化、可解耦的设计范式。

title: Distilling Linearized Behavior for Effective Task Arithmetic
summary: Task vector composition has emerged as a promising paradigm for editing pre-trained models, enabling model merging through addition and unlearning through subtraction. Fine-tuning in the tangent space of a pre-trained model (linear fine-tuning) has proven effective, as it produces task vectors that are naturally disentangled and resistant to interference. However, linearized models suffer from limited expressivity during training and incur higher computational costs at inference time, which restrict their practical applicability. In this work, we bridge the gap between linear and standard non-linear fine-tuning. We show that linearity with respect to weight perturbations, a property defined in parameter space, can be enforced through constraints in activation space during training. Concretely, we distill hidden representations from a curvature-regularized linearized teacher into a non-linear student trained via conventional fine-tuning. We find that the resulting model inherits key properties of linearized models for task arithmetic, enabling effective composition of task vectors and achieving strong performance across vision and language benchmarks without incurring any inference-time overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新方法，通过激活空间约束在非线性微调模型中强制实现参数空间中的扰动线性，使非线性模型具备线性模型的任务向量可组合性优势，同时避免推理开销。
AI.motivation: 线性化微调虽能产生解耦、抗干扰的任务向量，但表达能力受限且推理成本高；标准非线性微调则缺乏任务向量的可组合性。需弥合二者差距。
AI.method: 提出在激活空间施加约束以实现参数扰动线性的思想；具体采用知识蒸馏方式，将曲率正则化的线性化教师模型的隐藏表示蒸馏到常规非线性微调的学生模型中。
AI.result: 所得非线性模型在视觉与语言基准上实现了强性能，支持有效的任务向量加减（如合并与遗忘），且无任何推理时开销。
AI.conclusion: 在激活空间引入约束可使标准非线性微调模型继承线性模型的关键性质（如任务向量可组合性），兼顾表达力、效率与可编辑性。

title: KVBuffer: IO-aware Serving for Linear Attention
summary: Linear attention has recently gained significant attention for long-context inference due to its constant decoding cost with respect to context length. However, existing serving systems typically serve linear attention by recurrently computing and updating a large linear attention state in every decoding step. Since the state is much larger than the per-token key and value, recurrent decoding incurs substantial memory access and becomes inefficient for serving linear attention. In this paper, we propose KVBuffer, an IO-aware serving mechanism for linear attention. By buffering recent keys and values, KVBuffer enables serving systems to compute linear attention outputs in more flexible and memory-efficient ways. For decoding, KVBuffer enables chunkwise computation, which reduces average memory access and decoding latency by deferring state updates and applying them in batch. For speculative decoding, KVBuffer verifies draft tokens in parallel and avoids storing temporary states. For short contexts, KVBuffer computes attention outputs directly from buffered keys and values, without creating or updating the linear attention state. We implement KVBuffer in SGLang for Qwen3-Next. Our evaluations show that KVBuffer can reduce linear attention decoding latency by up to 45.17% and increase the maximum number of serving requests by 5x for speculative decoding when verifying four draft tokens.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KVBuffer，一种面向IO的线性注意力服务机制，通过缓存近期键值对，实现更灵活、内存更高效地计算线性注意力输出，在解码、推测解码和短上下文场景中均显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有线性注意力服务系统在每步解码中反复计算和更新庞大的线性注意力状态，导致高内存访问开销和低效服务。
AI.method: 提出KVBuffer机制，通过缓冲最近的键（key）和值（value），支持分块计算解码、并行验证推测token、以及短上下文下直接使用缓存计算，避免状态创建与更新。
AI.result: 在SGLang中实现KVBuffer用于Qwen3-Next，实验显示解码延迟最多降低45.17%，推测解码（验证4个draft token）时最大并发请求数提升5倍。
AI.conclusion: KVBuffer是一种高效、IO感知的线性注意力服务方案，显著改善内存访问效率与服务吞吐，适用于多种解码场景。

title: Riemannian Networks over Full-Rank Correlation Matrices
summary: Representations on the Symmetric Positive Definite (SPD) manifold have garnered significant attention across different applications. In contrast, the manifold of full-rank correlation matrices, a normalized alternative to SPD matrices, remains largely underexplored. This paper introduces Riemannian networks over the correlation manifold, leveraging five recently developed correlation geometries. We systematically extend basic layers, including Multinomial Logistic Regression (MLR), Fully Connected (FC), and convolutional layers, to these geometries. Besides, we present methods for accurate backpropagation for two correlation geometries. Experiments comparing our approach against existing SPD and Grassmannian networks demonstrate its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在相关矩阵流形上的黎曼网络，利用五种新开发的相关几何，并扩展了基本层（如多项式逻辑回归、全连接和卷积层），同时为其中两种几何提供了精确的反向传播方法。实验表明其优于现有的SPD和Grassmannian网络。
AI.motivation: 对称正定（SPD）流形表示已被广泛研究，而满秩相关矩阵流形作为SPD的归一化替代，却鲜有探索。
AI.method: 构建基于五种相关几何的黎曼网络，系统扩展MLR、全连接和卷积层，并为其中两种几何设计精确的反向传播算法。
AI.result: 在多个实验中，所提方法在性能上优于现有SPD和Grassmannian网络。
AI.conclusion: 相关矩阵流形是值得深入挖掘的新型几何表示空间，所提出的黎曼网络为其建模提供了有效框架。

title: MANGO: Meta-Adaptive Network Gradient Optimization for Online Continual Learning
summary: In Online Continual Learning (OCL), a neural network sequentially learns from a non-stationary data stream in a single-pass with access only to a limited memory replay buffer. This contrasts sharply with off-line continual learning where training is multiple epoch dependent on large datasets. The main challenge faced by OCL is to overcome catastrophic forgetting of past tasks (stability) while learning new ones efficiently (plasticity). Existing methods counter forgetting via replay-based rehearsal, output level distillation, fixed regularization, or meta-learning on the current data. However, these methods have limitations: rehearsal introduces a stored sample bias; distillation operates on output-distributions without modulating parameter updates; fixed-regularization penalizes parameters irrespective of sensitivity; stream-only meta-learning lacks a feedback controlled parameter update. We propose Meta-Adaptive Network Gradient Optimization (MANGO), an OCL framework that balances stability-plasticity via gradient-gating and meta-learned regularization. Gradient-gating scales parameter updates based on sensitivity, preventing destructive updates. Meta-learned regularization adapts stability coefficients, evaluating the effect of parameter update on replay. In MANGO, replay acts as both a training signal and a forgetting evaluator. We evaluated our method on three standard OCL benchmark datasets. MANGO outperforms strong baselines, achieving state-of-the-art results with consistent performance across replay sizes. In domain incremental learning on CLEAR-10 and class incremental learning on CIFAR-100 and Tiny-ImageNet, it achieves highest accuracy among all baselines and achieves positive Backward Transfer, overcoming forgetting on CLEAR-10.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MANGO框架，通过梯度门控和元学习正则化在在线持续学习中平衡稳定性与可塑性，显著缓解灾难性遗忘，并在多个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 在线持续学习（OCL）面临灾难性遗忘（稳定性）与新任务高效学习（可塑性）的固有矛盾，现有方法如重放、蒸馏、固定正则化或流式元学习均存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出Meta-Adaptive Network Gradient Optimization（MANGO）：1）梯度门控——依据参数敏感性缩放更新，防止破坏性更新；2）元学习正则化——自适应调整稳定性系数，利用重放样本评估参数更新对遗忘的影响；重放兼具训练信号与遗忘评估双重角色。
AI.result: 在CLEAR-10（领域增量）、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet（类别增量）三个标准OCL基准上，MANGO超越所有强基线，取得最高准确率；在不同重放容量下性能稳定；在CLEAR-10上实现正向后向迁移（positive Backward Transfer），有效克服遗忘。
AI.conclusion: MANGO通过将重放机制同时用作训练信号与遗忘评估器，结合敏感性感知的梯度门控与自适应元正则化，为OCL提供了一种更鲁棒、更通用的稳定性-可塑性协调机制。

title: ScheduleFree+: Scaling Learning-Rate-Free & Schedule-Free Learning to Large Language Models
summary: Schedule-Free Learning has shown promise as a practical anytime training method for machine learning, showing success across dozens of standard benchmark problems. However, strong performance for LLM training has only been demonstrated at small scales. We identify a number of fixes necessary to scale up Schedule-Free Learning to larger batch sizes and model sizes, and present a learning-rate-free and schedule-free method (ScheduleFree+) for training large language models which greatly outperforms Warmup-Stable-Decay (WSD) schedules. We also demonstrate that Schedule-Free Learning is most effective for long duration training, and at 1000 tokens per parameter, it outperforms SOTA schedules by 31%. Schedule-Free Learning provides a theoretical foundation for the use of model averaging and checkpoint merging during pretraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ScheduleFree+方法，解决了Schedule-Free Learning在大规模LLM训练中的扩展性问题，实现了无需学习率和调度策略的高效训练，并在长时训练中显著优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: Schedule-Free Learning在小规模模型上表现良好，但在大规模LLM训练（大batch size和大模型尺寸）中尚未展现出强性能，需针对性改进。
AI.method: 提出ScheduleFree+方法，是一种无需学习率调优、无需训练调度的优化方法，并结合模型平均与检查点合并机制。
AI.result: ScheduleFree+在大规模LLM训练中大幅超越Warmup-Stable-Decay（WSD）调度；在1000 tokens/parameter长训设置下，性能比当前最优调度高31%。
AI.conclusion: Schedule-Free Learning不仅实用，还为预训练中模型平均与检查点合并提供了理论基础，是面向大规模、长时间LLM训练的有效替代方案。

title: Flash PD-SSM: Memory-Optimized Structured Sparse State-Space Models
summary: State-space models (SSMs) face a fundamental trade-off between efficiency and expressivity that is mainly dictated by the structure of the model's transition matrix. Unstructured transition matrices enable maximal expressivity, as measured by their ability to model finite-state automaton (FSA) transitions, but come at a prohibitively high compute and memory cost. In contrast, most structured transition matrix forms are highly efficient both in runtime and memory consumption, but suffer from limited expressivity. Building on recent work on structured sparse SSMs, we propose Flash PD-SSM, a novel SSM that achieves comparable throughput to widely-used structured SSMs with significantly better expressivity guarantees. Flash PD-SSM maintains a trainable set of structured sparse matrices, a single one of which is discretely selected at each time-step, enabling FSA expressiveness at the level of unstructured matrices while maintaining the efficiency required for training models at scale. First, we validate Flash PD-SSM against a suite of alternative models on synthetic mechanistic and state-tracking tasks, finding that its theoretical expressivity is achieved in practice. Second, on multivariate time-series tasks involving sequences of length over 17,000, we find that Flash PD-SSM defines a new state-of-the-art (SoTA) accuracy among competing SSM methods. Finally, we demonstrate that Flash PD-SSM is an effective drop-in replacement for hybrid LLMs, yielding improvements both in natural language state-tracking and in common language modeling scenarios. The model exhibits increased throughput and decreased memory consumption compared to SSMs widely used in frontier language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Flash PD-SSM，一种新型状态空间模型，在保持结构化SSM高效性的同时，通过可训练的稀疏矩阵离散选择机制，显著提升对有限状态自动机（FSA）的建模能力，实现在合成任务、长序列时间序列及语言建模中的SOTA性能与更高吞吐、更低内存开销。
AI.motivation: 解决状态空间模型（SSMs）中效率与表达力的根本权衡问题：非结构化转移矩阵表达力强但计算代价高，结构化矩阵高效但表达力受限。
AI.method: 提出Flash PD-SSM，维护一组可训练的结构化稀疏转移矩阵，并在每个时间步离散选择其中一个，从而兼顾FSA级表达力与结构化计算效率。
AI.result: 在合成机制与状态跟踪任务上验证了理论表达力；在超17,000长度的多变量时间序列任务上达到SSM方法SOTA精度；作为LLM混合架构的即插即用组件，在自然语言状态跟踪和通用语言建模中均提升性能，且吞吐更高、内存更低。
AI.conclusion: Flash PD-SSM成功弥合了SSM中效率与表达力之间的鸿沟，为大规模时序建模与语言建模提供了兼具理论保证与实用优势的新范式。

title: Bridge: Retrieval-Augmented Spatiotemporal Modeling for Urban Delivery Demand
summary: Forecasting urban delivery demand becomes substantially more challenging when newly added service regions lack historical records. Existing spatiotemporal forecasters effectively model spatial dependence once sufficient node histories are available. Still, they remain parametric and therefore struggle to recover short-term operational dynamics in cold-start regions. Geospatial embeddings help identify where a region is and what function it serves, yet they do not directly reveal how a similar region behaves under a comparable temporal context.
